subject: The first step to stopping Trump

| | This is urgent: **Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president in 2024.** We MUST send a clear message this December that Georgia will NOT be reclaimed by Trump and the GOP – and that starts with defeating Trump’s handpicked Senate candidate, Herschel Walker: [ So please, at this critical moment, will you rush a split donation of $10 or more now between Raphael Warnock and the DLCC to help Rev. Warnock keep Georgia blue and build Democratic power in state legislatures? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJ5IkCFzHdXQ9TnuD658DMDVAgj8HdJGja6l-2w8SOKS4iorZkBZxKPg3_TjTUVbQVFzLUNGK613V8sXDf3j1LXimJwrXQHV-T4UKyNHg0oRBq9Iby2fSsIw02ZmSoP-BMLYSvJvtwNEi_941wJZBgLHV6AgFOlwlM5COrgi6WxZOHQw1A8_tBxiy694k81xUMl496S6zMvMuVOFuHdth1Jd-GiSaZMReVAahZiCyPrpp_njaTxVNY1xbaAIbGZXGvQP5lnqwkmXwuP_OKKN9Y_VG5kIo7U_dIQm9bQV_B5OSU8PDQiPq_lIKVdVZArwr_c-KvyvBzneLlVSWlG5aMLKAvnudCOmrqpSmlXM2VqOWreLt4vyKFPdcVeReuQilF/3r8/u7rhwLtPSOajz-Wd8pzUrA/h0/y5W3QHln1p1o87-pqgaZIRT2FYkbO0aUYEZmSTZS0VY) Trump knows that Democrats’ strength in Georgia in 2020 cost him the White House and delivered the Senate for Democrats. That’s why he’s laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race – already holding multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat. **Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right before the runoff to mobilize the GOP base, try to swing the momentum in Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red.** **We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump – and now, this race is neck and neck. We set a rapid-response goal to raise $1 million by midnight tonight so we can fight back and pull ahead – but right now, we’re dangerously short.** [So please, will you split $10 or more between my campaign and the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee to help defeat Herschel Walker, keep Georgia blue, and continue work electing Democrats to state legislatures? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xtkPMy1D1zHzXpPa6X6gVJ5IkCFzHdXQ9TnuD658DMDVAgj8HdJGja6l-2w8SOKS4iorZkBZxKPg3_TjTUVbQVFzLUNGK613V8sXDf3j1LXimJwrXQHV-T4UKyNHg0oRBq9Iby2fSsIw02ZmSoP-BMLYSvJvtwNEi_941wJZBgLHx6kYj0JtlhKYpCvfC-1UEuam489gHU88k10Mkq1oO4rp5CwtE7OI9JIxp6v6Inr0CfBuaXqZTMdZBBfj9nS5rB_e010XSRMmif8-Ztj6Rt1O1ISnxnfEZZPiWciTuIZo1R-F_0_-mnih7UlhPR2mIM5k-j8AnAYpZr95gqkFA-wrZB6a9M1oj9ThtkVTaR9yOfrJfY4L4D5I2RtNI8kQQq1PLVix_2TQrYK310HBwt/3r8/u7rhwLtPSOajz-Wd8pzUrA/h1/oOW01SbMUd0fCCDlNxqc1EE5xT5a53uL969yGEGYfEo) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Raphael Warnock and the DLCC.

That’s why he’s laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race – already holding multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat. Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right before the runoff to mobilize the GOP base, try to swing the momentum in Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red. We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump – and now, this race is neck and neck. body:
We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own.

| This is urgent, Peter: **Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president in 2024.**

We MUST send a clear message this December that battleground Georgia will NOT be reclaimed by Trump and the GOP – and that starts with defeating Trump’s handpicked Senate candidate, Herschel Walker: [_**So please, at this critical moment, will you split $10 or more with BACKROADS PAC now to help Rev. Warnock keep Georgia blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54710647/379386749/919785734?refcode=BLU-BRP-20221116-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWZiZDA0NC0wZTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Haous69NMY1kcnSB3stVnHqzb6QLlFW8-I5YOQ9QkLU=)

Trump knows that Democrats’ strength in Georgia in 2020 cost him the White House and delivered the Senate for Democrats. That’s why he’s laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race – already holding multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat.

**Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right before the runoff to mobilize the GOP base, try to swing the momentum in Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red.**

**We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump – and now, this race is neck and neck. We set a rapid-response goal to raise $1 million by midnight tonight so we can fight back and pull ahead – but right now, we’re dangerously short.**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s time to blacklist AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we have a
problem.

AIPAC dropped millions of dollars to ensure progressives lost primaries in
key races this cycle. The only thing AIPAC cares about is suppressing any
dissent against their extreme agenda — which is exactly why they endorsed
109 Republican election deniers.

In Summer Lee’s race, AIPAC endorsed a Republican over a Democrat for the
first time, spending over $3 million to try to stop her people-powered
movement. AIPAC proved they will do whatever it takes to squash opposition
— even if it meant we could lose a Democratic majority.

Summer overcame their attacks and won a historic victory — but AIPAC
remains more dangerous than ever. It’s time for the Democratic Party to
immediately condemn AIPAC’s actions and cut all ties.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121081?refcode=em20221116-26109&t=1001&akid=26109%2E1203867%2ESivpQ6 ]We need to be prepared for far-right Super PACs like AIPAC, which means
fundraising quickly and early. We can’t count on Democratic leadership to
step up, but we can count on you,
Peter. Will you chip in now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121081?refcode=em20221116-26109&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26109%2E1203867%2ESivpQ6 ]Contribute

After AOC defeated the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House in 2018,
Democratic leadership went to extreme lengths to stop progressives like
AOC from ever winning again.

The DCCC blacklisted any vendors, staff, and organizations that helped
Democratic primary challengers – AKA us. But now with AIPAC, they’re ...
silent.

AIPAC’s right-wing Super PAC aggressively spent millions to attack
progressives in critical Democratic seats around the country. While party
leaders named a Democratic majority as their #1 priority, AIPAC was
supporting over a hundred extreme GOP candidates.

If Democratic leaders were so comfortable blacklisting progressives
organizations like us, where are they now while AIPAC actively undermines
not just the Democratic Party but the fabric of our democratic elections?

Peter, it’s
beyond clear that our work to transform the Democratic Party is more
important now than ever.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121081?refcode=em20221116-26109&t=1021&akid=26109%2E1203867%2ESivpQ6 ]We rely on your support so we can recruit, support, and elect Justice
Democrats — but far-right groups like AIPAC will try to stop us. Can you
chip in so we can start to prepare right now?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26109%2E1203867%2ESivpQ6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26109%2E1203867%2ESivpQ6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221116-26109-footer&t=1024&refcode2=26109_1203867_SivpQ6&akid=26109%2E1203867%2ESivpQ6

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=26109%2E1203867%2ESivpQ6

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Cathy=20McMorris=20Rodgers?=
subject: Thank You!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Peter, Thank you for your support this election. It's an honor of a lifetime to continue to serve you in Congress. With our new majority, House Republicans are committed to building an economy that is strong, a nation that is safe, a future built on freedom, and holding our government accountable. We are committed to unleashing American energy, easing the tax burden on families, and ensuring our communities receive the resources they need to increase public safety. Our commitment to strengthen America will get us back on track. As the next Chairwoman of the Energy & Commerce Committee, I look forward to working on policies that will benefit Eastern Washington and America. From healthcare to hydropower, to holding Big Tech accountable, there are so many things I look forward to accomplishing. I am grateful to have earned your trust to be your representative in Congress. Winning the election was the first step, and now it is time to win the future.

Sincerely,

Cathy
---
|

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Did you see Senator Warnock’s message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
**_URGENT, Peter:_** We wanted to make sure you saw Senator Raphael Warnock’s message to you yesterday. We promise it’s worth taking two minutes out of your day to read — re-electing Senator Warnock is crucial for the Democratic agenda. We need to mobilize in Georgia now -- this race is too important to sit out. We’re going all in to support Raphael Warnock and we hope you will, too. [**Will you take 2 minutes to read Senator Warnock’s message and then rush a split donation to his campaign right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23082?refcode=em20221116-1835&t=1&akid=1835%2E420207%2Els0GBJ) **[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23082?refcode=em20221116-1835&t=2&akid=1835%2E420207%2Els0GBJ)** — Team Jayapal
---
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Raphael Warnock** via Team Jayapal
Date: Wednesday, Nov 16, 2022
Subject: I'm humbly asking
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Pramila to keep Georgia blue?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23082?refcode=em20221116-1835&t=3&akid=1835%2E420207%2Els0GBJ)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23082?refcode=em20221116-1835&t=22&akid=1835%2E420207%2Els0GBJ)**
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.
**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. **
[**Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $5 or more right now between me and Pramila so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23082?refcode=em20221116-1835&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1835%2E420207%2Els0GBJ)
Thank you for all that you do.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221116-1835-footer&t=24&refcode2=1835_420207_ls0GBJ&akid=1835%2E420207%2Els0GBJ)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. That's why I'm humbly asking: GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help. Thank you for all that you do. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Here's how you can have the biggest impact on helping us win this runoff election:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'm running against Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker, in Georgia's runoff election, and I need your help to win.
While my opponent has aligned himself with Trump, McConnell, and the GOP in an all-out effort to try to buy this seat, I’m a pastor who’s devoted my life to service – and who's powering my campaign with grassroots donations from folks like you. I'm in this fight to make life better for working families and restore moral leadership to our government.
**Right now, this race is _neck and neck,_ and national Republicans are funneling in more than $52 million to turn Georgia red. That's why it's absolutely critical that we have a reliable flow of resources between now and Dec. 6 to counter the GOP's massive spending and pull ahead.**
[**Please, friend – we can EXPAND our Democratic Senate majority, but only if we keep Georgia blue. Will you****become a weekly donor today so we can win in Georgia and defend the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54711312/379402360/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4755-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJjOWNkZi0xMzY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rikmxoc45dUQDHRq_YIiPHWCYzfZTR_DvZx2mYtmw14=)
If Democrats want to enact our bold agenda, we need to not only _hold_ our majority, but _expand_ it. **Winning this race is our last chance to make that happen.** And in order to effectively budget, plan our ad spend, fund our voter protection efforts, and more, we've got to have consistent funds that we can rely on for the next few weeks.
**That's why weekly contributions are so critical, especially for campaigns like ours that don't accept corporate PAC money. Weekly contributions made today could be what puts us over the top on Dec. 6.**
**[I'm counting on you, friend: With time running out, will you please become a weekly donor of our grassroots movement? The resources we have NOW – not weeks from now – will have the biggest impact in helping us win this runoff election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54711313/379402361/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4755-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJjOWNkZi0xMzY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rikmxoc45dUQDHRq_YIiPHWCYzfZTR_DvZx2mYtmw14=)**
Thanks for sticking with me,
– Raphael Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we’re in a runoff election against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That’s why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you’re with me, _[**please donate now to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54711314/379402362/-1468610671?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4755-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmJjOWNkZi0xMzY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rikmxoc45dUQDHRq_YIiPHWCYzfZTR_DvZx2mYtmw14=)_ If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, **text “GEORGIA” to 52005.**

Thank you!

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'm running against Trump's handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker, in Georgia's runoff election, and I need your help to win. While my opponent has aligned himself with Trump, McConnell, and the GOP in an all-out effort to try to buy this seat, I’m a pastor who’s devoted my life to service – and who's powering my campaign with grassroots donations from folks like you. I'm in this fight to make life better for working families and restore moral leadership to our government. Right now, this race is neck and neck, and national Republicans are funneling in more than $52 million to turn Georgia red. That's why it's absolutely critical that we have a reliable flow of resources between now and Dec. 6 to counter the GOP's massive spending and pull ahead. = If Democrats want to enact our bold agenda, we need to not only hold our majority, but expand it. Winning this race is our last chance to make that happen. And in order to effectively budget, plan our ad spend, fund our voter protection efforts, and more, we've got to have consistent funds that we can rely on for the next few weeks. That's why weekly contributions are so critical, especially for campaigns like ours that don't accept corporate PAC money. Weekly contributions made today could be what puts us over the top on Dec. 6. = Thanks for sticking with me, – Raphael Warnock Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock: Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we’re in a runoff election against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win. Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That’s why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory. If you’re with me, = If you’d like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, text “GEORGIA” to 52005. Thank you! – Senator Reverend Raphael Warnock = Text GEORGIA to 52005 • | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hi Peter,

I’d like to thank everyone who was a part of the campaign for the communities of CA27. While the results are not as we’d hoped, our team is grateful to every donor and every volunteer who was part of #TeamChristy.

There is so much more work to be done to reach voters here who for too long haven't seen the value of their vote. I know that work to ensure every voice -- and every vote -- is valued will continue in the hands of very dedicated local Democrats.

I’m so proud of and forever grateful to my campaign team! Through this campaign we supported Black maternal health, foster youth, literacy, public health, our unhoused neighbors, victims of domestic violence and more.

Never forget that leadership is the practice of making others successful and we all have a role to play.

\- Christy

subject: Are you getting our emails about Georgia?

body:
We have just a few weeks left to save Senator Warnock
| Hi, my name is Heather and I help run Voter Protection Project.

I wanted to make sure you saw our urgent email about the Georgia Senate race:

[Our critical ad fund deadline is in just 5 hours and we’re still $5,912 short. We need these ads on the air to defend Democrats like Warnock and _expand_ our Senate majority, so please, chip in $7 today »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34748?t=6&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk) | [**RUSH $7 TOWARD OUR AD FUND TO RE-ELECT DEMOCRATS LIKE SENATOR WARNOCK & EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34748?t=7&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk)
---
Your support makes our work possible,

Heather
\--------- Forwarded message ---------
From: 🚨Georgia Ad Fund (via VPP) <[info@e.protectvoting.org](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34748?t=8&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk)>
Date: Monday, November 14, 2022 at 5:10 PM
Subject: GOP ads are drowning us out in the runoff
To: <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34748?t=9&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk)>
**We’re starting to panic:_**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34748?t=10&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk)
[We don’t have a SECOND to lose! Rush $7 to our urgent $33,000 Ad Fund before our deadline to save the Senate from MAGA extremists like Herschel Walker and re-elect Senators like Warnock! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34748?t=11&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk)
| [**RE-ELECT DEMOCRATS LIKE SENATOR WARNOCK & EXPAND OUR SENATE MAJORITY: RUSH $7 NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34748?t=12&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk)
---
**$33,000 AD FUND GOAL // DEADLINE @ MIDNIGHT WEDNESDAY**
**If we hit this goal** , we can do our part to protect Democrats like Warnock from vicious MAGA attack ads.

**But if we don’t have the resources to fully fund our ads** , Georgia will be blanketed by relentless MAGA attack ads – _and Dems like Warnock will be left defenseless!_
[There’s too much at stake to sit on the sidelines! Don’t abandon vulnerable Democrats like Raphael Warnock when they need us most: Rush $7 to our $33,000 Ad Fund goal to _expand_ our Senate majority »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34748?t=13&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34749?t=14&akid=5391%2E878179%2Ep2IGxk)

Thank you for stepping up,

VPP

name: Joe Biden
subject: re: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president again. | |
---
**Last night, Donald Trump announced he’s running for president again. I’m going to let you in on a secret, Derek: He will fail.[In a moment, I’m going to tell you why, but people like you stepping up will be a big part of how it’s done.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x_Axe9OmaJo0FwLB4twDFs7PxKRTDqGm2wucZ9VNlK2VFz-LCEpUJhbuYz-MeLu4hceZMGvfvwEIMtUmt0MM_YRaWRDJD1DKMml9DvkZ4htPlLZaKqaIqa6ZJCvn8Q_qnGtQGO2FkAH_-5rezggoRKpN6Y7dv22kpq43PDzHrDGji5UxIzhmk8bLPtUiwhONdP3dW6gUwLx0BA9OI27rQBPeSYM9CRDQNiVA7wjEhVVMugm-LZz-BUulB_ffU2-qKH0cHWuGeHMIjyD-ERWOTDAA9soyOztQel3-QGtZwvG9ztvHYIbkRFyRUG_QReZuyWZSLrXns9ft1Rib-aqPDx6PqwoTCmhjs9W4tVKXqQk6pwhsCHEg74K1dsCAaIdd8cPHLc3hEINVNm21CO2oHixk_c5oGmPgWROUGSWa0QI8CLb0Lw7hpZ5YIr80S0CLcnqt4DnBHvNCJ_3pwiuimb01TLBgOwnICFnxIuxCoo_u-Cepn0tRdE43TLerrYFj6LbuPBsREBjDXBoQKjUig_tZXfHdwUKVZGOrbZQmazaEq0io6RJI83oweE3coHUTQFJykCwtYqYUq9maF5hesR/3r8/y6GTsorSRKmjVTBpFuW8SQ/h0/JnAmcEbsIqavopw-x7_e4sevbrWliLZSO_Xi1HD4nQk)** Over the last few years, our democracy was put to the test. In the midterm elections, the American people voted to uphold our democracy. That fight isn’t over. This team defeated Donald Trump just over two years ago. It wasn’t a fluke. Trump pitted neighbors against neighbors. He rigged the economy for the rich. He left behind a mess. But a dedicated base of millions of grassroots supporters just like you came together to donate, volunteer, and vote in record numbers, and together, we defeated him. This year, you buckled down and got back to work to beat Trumpism at the ballot box. Just one week ago, you proved that together, we can defeat the extremism, divisiveness, and corruption that he and his party represent. Thanks to you, we protected the Senate and lost fewer seats in the House this year than in any Democratic president’s first elected midterm in the last 40 years. [**And if you step up now, our party will defeat MAGA Republicans again in 2024.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x_Axe9OmaJo0FwLB4twDFs7PxKRTDqGm2wucZ9VNlK2VFz-LCEpUJhbuYz-MeLu4hceZMGvfvwEIMtUmt0MM_YRaWRDJD1DKMml9DvkZ4htDOotRGFPjhelbU9JwM___KCTHke7Bk02o1ykfdVb8s1G5JWEzXUa9O3XGoxkaCVTBTKByigdD2DiU7c-Lnxp_SWyosamiWU3bbUasOX-MvUeE9D2mxPCEd9hnh20lTlSDTeoBxuDXJgRg8YfcN6K0SRCVKE8Vfog1_sCl3FheWFv8tGydmFh9VnoEcIBQn3fkLMq2CSzCXdTvxRRIDod2dBwV2CyNIKz85e_n34KUhldLFs8C_YIGdmjfMOadnE2pub5q3EQ8A2KpWnwrDDZfdfTBPIuq9fLrqh164HJ3PSD8omW0QpHIxbzpCGU18S4neD-NdWfCCo2Fqit0tVCIo_F-jScB7VlAmXSeu-243lXMX5x8h7SeXgVxGYczi8iiF46AHLDpvWjhWsRbCoS1fm7KSgJOvHz73fFfyLPwi1pI3aM0niX69yBjiDm8-CCr_oSn5Z07Z3BBxHQb7flzbtxEIvQ9VLkWPcNg5JHMrM/3r8/y6GTsorSRKmjVTBpFuW8SQ/h1/BetcSjViCYn72Mu2hXUJhAMCHb9scOQefrxKRgBPLkA) **Now you’re probably asking yourself: “All right, Joe, what’s your plan?” And I promise you, I’ll have more to say on that soon. But, in the meantime, I’ll leave it at this: Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was defeated. You’re the reason Kamala and I are here. And your support of the Democratic Party is going to be the reason he will never be president again.** _We won in 2020 and 2022 because you donated your hard-earned time and money to defeat Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans._ You haven’t donated to the DNC this year. With Trump running for president again, our party’s work is more important than ever. **Derek: Will you make your first $7 donation of the year to the DNC now?**

clean_body: Donald Trump just announced he’s running for president again. | | Last night, Donald Trump announced he’s running for president again. I’m going to let you in on a secret, Derek: He will fail. Over the last few years, our democracy was put to the test. In the midterm elections, the American people voted to uphold our democracy. That fight isn’t over. This team defeated Donald Trump just over two years ago. It wasn’t a fluke. Trump pitted neighbors against neighbors. He rigged the economy for the rich. He left behind a mess. But a dedicated base of millions of grassroots supporters just like you came together to donate, volunteer, and vote in record numbers, and together, we defeated him. This year, you buckled down and got back to work to beat Trumpism at the ballot box. Just one week ago, you proved that together, we can defeat the extremism, divisiveness, and corruption that he and his party represent. Thanks to you, we protected the Senate and lost fewer seats in the House this year than in any Democratic president’s first elected midterm in the last 40 years. Now you’re probably asking yourself: “All right, Joe, what’s your plan?” And I promise you, I’ll have more to say on that soon. But, in the meantime, I’ll leave it at this: Grassroots supporters are the reason Donald Trump was defeated. You’re the reason Kamala and I are here. And your support of the Democratic Party is going to be the reason he will never be president again. We won in 2020 and 2022 because you donated your hard-earned time and money to defeat Donald Trump and his MAGA Republicans. You haven’t donated to the DNC this year. With Trump running for president again, our party’s work is more important than ever. Derek: Will you make your first $7 donation of the year to the DNC now? Think of where we were two years ago. Millions of people were out of work. COVID was running rampant. The country seemed to be coming apart at the seams. But you kept the faith. You believed, like I did, that we were in a battle for the soul of this nation. That we needed to rebuild the backbone of this country: the middle class. That we needed to put unity over division. Truth over lies. Hope over fear. And thanks to you, we did. Today, we’ve created more jobs than any administration ever at this point in a presidency. Vaccines and tests are easily available for every American. We’ve worked with Republicans to rebuild our nation’s infrastructure. We’ve tackled the inflation crisis head-on by investing in our supply chain, and we’ve passed historic legislation to bring down costs for families. Millions of Americans will be relieved of crushing student debt. And we’ve made the single-biggest investment in climate in our nation’s history. Still, the battle for the soul of our nation was never going to be won in a single presidential election -- or a single midterm election. Just take a look at this last election: Our party’s work is about more than defeating Donald Trump. It’s about defeating Trumpism. It’s about being able to live in a country where neighbors aren’t pitted against each other. Where elected officials go to bat for the middle class. Where racism and violence are given no safe harbor. Keep the faith -- and remember to spread it. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Rick Scott
subject: I challenged Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
Today, I challenged Mitch McConnell in an election for Senate Republican Leader. I’ve been frustrated by the broken status quo in Washington that continuously fails to deliver on its promises to the American people.| | | Peter, Today, I challenged Mitch McConnell in an election for Senate Republican Leader. Although the results of today’s elections weren’t what we hoped for, this is far from the end of our fight to Make Washington Work. I’ve been frustrated by the broken status quo in Washington that continuously fails to deliver on its promises to the American people. That’s why I ran for Senate in 2018 – to end the status quo by fighting every day to Make Washington Work for Florida families. We’ve made progress in this fight, but there is so much more we could get done. Today certainly marks the beginning of a new era in the Senate Republican Conference. We’ve sent a message to Mitch McConnell that we need to stand strong on our principles and be accountable to those that elected us. I could not be more grateful for the support I’ve received from many of my colleagues and from Americans across our great country. I never thought for a moment that this fight would be easy, but I’m optimistic that, together, Republicans can rescue America with the principles that unite us against the dangerous path Democrats have set it on. Thank you for your support. Rick Scott
---

Peter,

# [Official Election Results: Ellis leads the way in final count for Manassas City](https://theresacoatesellis.com/2022/11/17/official-election-results-ellis-leads-the-way-in-final-count-for-manassas-city/)
| | theresacoatesellis Nov 17
---|---
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
CONTACT: Theresa Coates Ellis, Manassas City Council Member
TheresaCoatesEllis@gmail.com
Cell: (571)247-6729
SUBJECT: Theresa Coates Ellis, lone Republican on Council, leads the way as official top vote-getter in Manassas City local election
[Manassas, Virginia, November 15, 2022] — Election 2022 results are now reported as official with the Manassas City Registrar's office. Theresa Coates Ellis received the highest votes in Manassas City for the local slate of Council and School Board. Now, once again, Ellis is the lone Republican on Council with an official vote count of 5,369 -- a lead of 427 votes. This will be her 2nd term.
**OFFICIAL MANASSAS CITY ELECTION RESULTS 2022 (From the Registrar's office):**
As a long-time resident, Ellis raised 6 daughters and 1 son (2 U.S. Air Force Vets) with her husband George. Ellis is a successful small business owner for 30 years with a background in healthcare, finance, communication, management, and marketing. She opened and operates Tackle Management and Marketing and is an owner and Director of SFMC Inc. with her husband.
As a volunteer leader, Ellis is an American Red Cross Chair, who started a campaign to rally donors to overcome the severe blood shortage during the height of the pandemic, and recruited large spaces to reach an over-capacity level of blood to save lives.
Human Trafficking is a national crisis. Ellis brings awareness of this horrific problem impacting mostly women and children in the local community. As a Councilwoman, she recently led with a proclamation to end Human Trafficking along with her fellow Rotary District members. As a member of Rotary, she also started the annual Flags for Heroes display during Veterans Week to benefit the Warrior Retreat of Bull Run for our wounded vets.
She is an experienced decision-maker for solutions to overcome the challenges and hardships that face our families, businesses, education, organizations, and community.
"During my first term, I was elected and served before, during, and now in recovery from the pandemic. I set up and continued my "Shadow for a Day" mentorship and volunteer relief programs, worked with the Inter-Faith Council, and added English/Spanish messaging to educate all of our residents and small businesses about available resources," said Ellis.
As a beekeeper and trained master gardener, Ellis is also a champion for saving the pollinators. She worked to win unanimous support for Manassas to be designated as a Bee City USA and as a patron, launched the popular annual Manassas Bee Festival (next: June 24, 2022), with a working apiary at Liberia House that produces honey for the event.
"There’s so much more work to do! I am grateful to serve four more years to help us continue to thrive together. And as I promised, I will fight hard and now across the aisle every meeting, to keep taxes and spending down and for fiscal responsibility," said Ellis.
As a Business Communication graduate of George Mason University, she was awarded, ”Alumna of the Year,” in 2019 for her work in education connecting students with businesses and organizations for internships and jobs.
"Excellence in education is absolutely necessary for our children to compete in their future world stage," Ellis said.
Visit TheresaCoatesEllis.com to learn more about upcoming events, and Manassas City news.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=557bfedca3254d3487e39adcf69a8681&_e=Gmz75T3NniKAEyFdXu_YJrO3oppt-3ixQ_fIkPpfpb5-J34bTyJJseibSwguvRkh96O8iwHxtjOFu8odEX5kzMrsrjAZLDeO5DqyT_W5QCB3kKPAtqS46hOIAABvz_DyiBMZ4nGtL9-FMZRsX10DtQ3aHaJzyR9gmQWk6xSlBmmS2bwYWOCKS6dXHITw6Lak39JQAoLi3CT8g_DlvYJgDP9lDPJezk9pMj0AsHt8rw_ZTcKHgz3KDAWEU5WOISxzQAFji10TiHlnjEWSkSVnN1JUfHVdL1YcXlpVD4HIJJL98at7cY1xC6hgY3xS6FpxhwrmLtPn7J6V8xPNErOIGAjjItuBBrGlJLgBUjvHnStAcpwYokHBHr-9Nef8RaRL1V-G1W3g4Du3c2JP6F7_gLna-6iXbwIwBYrAsw2LKnn1rKiuxdRuOcmyjdCpizqugOtdEFD_IM_qaDy30otVPiO_TYsQHskG0QduEnZK530%3D)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

clean_body: We launched our first ad of the runoff, but we’re not up on as many stations as we’d like to be. | Peter, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. clean_body: Friend, Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again! When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, the Democrats, threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to Make America Great Again. And, Friend, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our Country faster than anyone could ever imagine. That 's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country. Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny. I will NEVER let them do that, which is why I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024. I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founders. Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we 've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message. I need your support now more than ever, Friend. The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020, and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them. We need to prioritize PROTECTING the integrity of our Elections, SECURING our Southern Border, RESTORING our once-great economy, and STANDING UP to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help. My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder. Will I see your name on the list? Thank you, Donald J. Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Peter,
---
Herschel Walker is on the 1-yard line and he's counting on us to help him punch the ball into the endzone with just weeks to go until his runoff election.
---
_An overtime victory for Herschel is our last line of defense to STOP Kamala from gaining a 51-seat majority in the Senate._
---
**But there 's one major problem: _Herschel was just OUTRAISED 2:1 by radical liberal Raphael Warnock in the final stretch!_ **
---
And now, with the runoff drawing MILLIONS in dark money from far-left Super PACs to attack Herschel, he needs our help to ensure these FINAL WEEKS of his campaign are fully funded.
---
[**Please make an urgent contribution to our RUNOFF VICTORY FUND to help ensure Herschel Walker has every last dollar he needs to FLIP this Senate seat.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890700:JezpWAGNS:m:1:3317145305:CB97F7EF80BE09F2FA50289813DC90A2:r)

It's crystal clear what's at stake here in Georgia, Peter.

**_There 's no denying that this 1 FINAL SEAT in the Senate will decide the fate of Congress for years to come. _**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890716:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890716:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890716:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890716:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890716:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890716:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890716:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890716:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890717:6BF_WAGNQ:m:1:3331421248:A2F554B2D808812FD7F289C8E71FE015:r)
Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

name: American Defense News
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis o
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z203aspedte1bdicl5b05hdvipobdd81afloc0ro_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o76cjh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zulg1r3bgtt1j5qntq965vlv5hod44u1dvm6t858_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o76cjh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf6o9k7gir2bv0a316ne2gouumokcvqfip011dv0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o76cjh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjkh6b98djvapapgift90fh0g41e1fm1ggbve0fg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o76cjh2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](https://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zn3t3c901ig9eguuavceg2ce4h96hcvc842to6e0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl2tet6s9du9gbc7ubtl0bs66ll1i9l9ssno81c8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o76cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “C.S. Lewis on Christianity.” [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6337%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=H3icvAnLWS4GwvIc%2bRBsYA&sysid=1)

| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“C.S. Lewis on Christianity.”**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis’s writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here’s a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_“Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking.” - Tammy from Georgia_

_“The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately.” - Bob from Colorado_

_“It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now.” - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on “C.S. Lewis on Christianity” for FREE -starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83680%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wWVyEELhb6DJby%2fgV6D5iA&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis’s timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Did you see this?
body:
I’m not sure if you saw the recent uproar in Dearborn, Michigan, where parents crashed a school board meeting to demand that o
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcgh37ajd9fj41avib6jkins6t0nqb723hh44dk8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, I’m not sure if you saw the recent uproar in Dearborn, Michigan, where parents crashed a school board meeting to demand that objectionable books were removed from the library.

The big story behind it all was that Christian parents and Muslim parents had united to demand removal of certain books from their public school library.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4acep7124dcqp9ocrluujhg2v0j4bptnkdvo8ho_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs)
---
| | When I saw it, I couldn’t help but ask a slightly different question: who will speak up for which books should be _in _public school libraries?

I’m glad that parents have freedom of speech to protest this—it’s one of the best things about our country. And public school libraries matter. It’s where kids go to pick books off the shelves that influence them at an early age.

That’s why I’m concerned about _putting books into libraries_. If all we do is remove books from libraries, they’ll eventually be empty.

But I want to put books into libraries that inspire kids to love liberty, learn more about our amazing country, and learn about classical economics and how the government should work.

A few years ago, these books didn’t exist, so I wrote them!

---
| | Now, the Tuttle Twins books have sold millions of copies. But they are largely nonexistent in public school libraries, where so many kids look for their next read.

I’d like to get a set of Tuttle Twins books in every public school library in America. And my friends at Moms for Liberty have stepped up to hand deliver them. Here’s the thing—kids LOVE these books. That’s why librarians are so happy to receive them (see the picture). But they also teach kids about topics that are important to you and I.

If these books are in libraries, kids will learn about the rule of law, and why it matters. They’ll learn about entrepreneurship. They’ll learn about free markets, and America’s founders.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3j7gnhca55obufj9vjqvo72a6k1svsru6mbh3r0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs)
---
| | So that’s why I’d like to ask you: **[_would you help fund a set of Tuttle Twins books for your local public school library?_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6dll7p4jjgr7fra17jjt9fnmtv0jfhacb332o30_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs)

** **[_Just a $50 donation will help put a set of books in a library so a kid can discover them_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z79oa272cojtfi3eni6cu3f9jsb45atg3g0ajedg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs)** —and in doing so, discover a love of liberty that will last their entire life.

I’m so grateful to my friends at Moms for Liberty who will help deliver your books. But we need your generosity to fund the books to deliver.

[__](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbtlpbli1ejiam45rngiuivht9ucfcdb451stc98_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs)[**If you can give $50 today,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcs2ue7nn903lm3mngnggc2a04fuu7hi0t1pneb0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs) they’ll be able to deliver a set of children’s books in your honor.

[**If you can give $100 today,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbe9rab2c1ek8vntb6csblv4fvhgjk00c9q6m9d0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs) they can deliver two sets, so that multiple kids can check them out at the same time.

[**If you can give $250 today,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z093lbi5ipp2tgr7qqaa8aftgtjm1skai3mo02f0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs) they can deliver a whole set of books that includes Tuttle Twins for children and teens plus our history books.

[**If you can give $500 today,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhiu69r3lpq906um2pesdk3ve30i3mkoto6o12c8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs) they can deliver two whole sets of those books! Would you consider making a gift today?

Thanks for your support of this initiative. Let’s get better books into libraries for our kids and help them learn to love liberty at a young age.

Sincerely,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---
| | 2183 W Main St, Lehi, UT 84043, USA
Libertas Institute
---

name: Candace Owens
subject: I will always tell the TRUTH
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890745:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)

Peter,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in just $25, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890745:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890745:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890745:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890746:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890747:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890748:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890749:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890750:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890751:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890752:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890753:6Zxt7AGNs:m:1:3317145305:E084F751D0DE4F055F0E9B06E6AC9258:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn19r3721dpvpps9pf6oluvut8gocde2is2l3ht0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4p70s9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z875r1hakvo5g8ls94bpdtpig4vv0v6tdlsbqi68_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4p70s9h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvqfp4v6uen61i9cgq6d0rpbe5t6k0l044gju0ng_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4p70s9h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z88dn2hfefiuqcfg2eppk76370cprak9bk2uori0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4p70s9h2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2hpu3itqs7e25h5603tfa8o1vk6t2usphjk8eo0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4p70s9h2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: American Action News
subject: President Trump Warned Us
body:
“They’re looking to destroy the country,” Trump warns as he calls out the threat from the Left.
| | Dear Reader, "They're looking to destroy the country," Trump warns as he calls out the threat from the Left. He even states they are a greater threat to America than hostile foreign nations. Unfortunately, he's right. And President Biden confirmed how far they are willing to go when he wrote Executive Order 14067. It was just signed into law without the approval of Congress or the American people, and it's leading toward a future that is so aggressive even the left-leaning Newsweek warns it's... **" The End of American freedom." ** Freedom of speech ... gone. Freedom of religion ... gone. Freedom of self-defense ... gone. **[Go here to get the full story.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zafce2mo84t5qa2kf1bcs59dtgqsm90ebk2fij8g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge2or6c3h2bs)** **[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs414pqhi12sn2stmmgei6lejgck8fcic1qbiaj8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge2or6c3h2bs)** Regards, Aaron James

subject: I’ve got some BIG news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official—what I said to the president and how I w

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1orvdalg5ot7ko7ql2lfpmjl90hvdfpqri0j0ao_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs)
---

Mike Pence here, did you hear the news?

_**[I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people-the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear more?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg5a9aad7gc9251v25vbl47a5ti9d9fn1fvdgm5o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4o72chh2bs "I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people–the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear more?")**_
**⬇️⬇️⬇️**

---
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official--what I said to the president and how I was tested.

I share exclusively how the faith that I embraced as a young man guided each and every decision I made at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.

**I 'm giving you a look into every second of my experiences in public service, from the early lessons to the major accomplishments.**

I will forever remain grateful for the grace of God, the love and support of my family, and the blessings of liberty that are every American's birthright.
---

If you chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, I'll send you a signed copy.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

For Faith & Freedom,
Vice President Mike Pence

---

body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5rgl0vqql27rmdde1fctnpkibch4md10uaae0ko_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4p77cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zluk106ng9gcgctnbsucdqcsa81k5g5k3bllc1ko_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4p77cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zor5ek2kci98dsf0uofi03vfafol2daeubmfojj0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdge4p77cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zledvp54iui1iq89vt56c2qnhrt3k9u4p22eb1qg).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfsqpqqk6jikpeoraflcm4qne24fajatr8rf1rog_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3c3hm1oj4stj649fg)

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Report: TSA Director Accused of Fraud, Waste for Unlawfully Deploying Assets to Mexican Border
body:
The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the
nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and abuse
of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican border to
perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to a report
filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector
General.

[alt_text]

[*****]
November 16, 2022

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61066&L=28460&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHNhLWRpcmVjdG9yLWd1aWx0eS1vZi1mcmF1ZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=]

The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the
nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and abuse
of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican border to
perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to
a report filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS)
Inspector General. In the formal complaint to the DHS watchdog, the
Air Marshal National Council, which represents thousands of Federal
Air Marshals (FAM) nationwide, accuses Transportation Security
Administration (TSA) Administrator David Pekoske and FAM Director
Tirrell Stevenson of violating federal law and overstepping their
authority for assigning the highly trained aviation security
specialists to assist the U.S. Border Patrol with the illegal
immigration crisis. FAM operates under TSA and both function under
DHS.

clean_body: The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and abuse of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to a report filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector General. [alt_text] [*****] November 16, 2022 [article-image] [=] The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and abuse of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to a report filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector General. In the formal complaint to the DHS watchdog, the Air Marshal National Council, which represents thousands of Federal Air Marshals (FAM) nationwide, accuses Transportation Security Administration (TSA) Administrator David Pekoske and FAM Director Tirrell Stevenson of violating federal law and overstepping their authority for assigning the highly trained aviation security specialists to assist the U.S. Border Patrol with the illegal immigration crisis. FAM operates under TSA and both function under DHS. Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892997:J32ZJAGNo:m:1:3345639852:A0EEA6F061D3EF0145A14BDC4D700C4E:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892997:J32ZJAGNo:m:1:3345639852:A0EEA6F061D3EF0145A14BDC4D700C4E:r)**

Thanks,

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892997:J32ZJAGNo:m:1:3345639852:A0EEA6F061D3EF0145A14BDC4D700C4E:r)**
