subject: I’m tired of criminal idols
body:
The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon. But I don’t care about idolizing a criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4n767ldi8238q282aorj5d9psedj1ba0d6cj5q0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)

Friend,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Friend, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in just $5, $25, $50, or any amount? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znrmcpt3f2m39kit7lbr58e93q0non4q5lpoho8o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqf07msebj0og43cusvg9aqflvk05dp48vq1h3g0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z36n5sq7jdtnm68hna8icss5os2q8glkvd5nu200_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Friend, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqkvfqaau0thkrjv0ja03efgtu10him7am90hmcg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlcf6k4niv48sjsvuo9ar9k90q5mi533i6cgman8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmo1ipkk8tojbthfs5uqd4m9svcaiqvs9quv8pfo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zigm6ap4brfr5u1l5mlht5u753bro7rflv8lhfno_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo4d5fcvf8ng2e8lua9sq49blbrnqmdn1v1ic2s0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zij8534kn57luvheh91cuab0skpd86e4vvtc7jl0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0f5410lf48ebf7tl5cado2lkqngrqa0gheuh2b8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh7j0596r7bfbitl4mivsb2mr53gilrncjt0rcl8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zce4a51t3gqthnrej35uj7ae7p6l131bla2v93go_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie0o36c5h2bs)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Donald Trump's a laughing stock, but a dangerous one. Stop him before he even gets started.
body:
Fightback starts this week
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e79e6ad-a951-4e8a-9f4b-f0645a395ec1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Donald Trump dragged his lazy, criminally-inclined husk onto a stage Tuesday, in the wake of a stunning rebuke in the midterms, and attacks from his own party, and declared...something._** **I guess it's that he's running for President, though it seemed more like his usual free-style-grievance session filled with up-is-down logic about how "strong," and "prosperous" we were while he was soiling the Oval Office with his presence there. ** **[Trump's a laughing stock, but a dangerous one. So to stop him before he even gets started, can you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to the Democratic National Committee (DNC), to keep up the fight vs. Trump?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3585522c-7bea-442a-8fc4-301eb300d818/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Help the Democratic National Committee stand up to Donald Trump!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc1bc5c3-cfe7-4b8c-8f25-613db92b7c00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_It was a good reminder, though, that this traitor who stole national security secrets, bowed to Putin, ignored and then lied about COVID, put the religious zealots on the Supreme Court who overturned Roe, profited from his presidency and generally acted like a child-having-a tantrum 24 hours a day, exhausting all of us, isn't going away. Not by a longshot._** **[Trump's a laughing stock, but the media never seems to get tired of giving him a big megaphone and helping him spread his message. So to stop him before he even gets started, can you join us in giving $5, $10 or $25 to the Democratic National Committee (DNC), to keep up the fight vs. Trump?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb46ec988-3bfd-45dc-b9e6-0ae89ff3f0c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Thank you friends--we MUST fight to ensure this man never again becomes President._**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Help the DNC fight Trump’s presidential campaign megaphone!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06adeeef-a0af-4e1f-b417-b07702299e01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/dnc-trump2024candidacyannouncement2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te196be1b-8961-4e78-a8ea-4774cba07daa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892695:J5mLaAGDN:m:1:3331703221:994A69E5C7D80DCA05309210972D6AB2:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892695:J5mLaAGDN:m:1:3331703221:994A69E5C7D80DCA05309210972D6AB2:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892695:J5mLaAGDN:m:1:3331703221:994A69E5C7D80DCA05309210972D6AB2:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892695:J5mLaAGDN:m:1:3331703221:994A69E5C7D80DCA05309210972D6AB2:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892695:J5mLaAGDN:m:1:3331703221:994A69E5C7D80DCA05309210972D6AB2:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892695:J5mLaAGDN:m:1:3331703221:994A69E5C7D80DCA05309210972D6AB2:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A runoff request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority.
|
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z121mcdarctkgnne7cphnqqk86tfu0mq6qpe3pc0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie8o74cth2bs)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0umeql4skiajc3prjlbhpust7rrrovr9riuecq0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie8o74cth2bs)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk0sscd6q1nb9p4vgh7vnlksocp6e0a3mt07fdng_)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbacqkhiq9rs2vnh9jqni02r5jq1des6d2rfkj88_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie8o74cth2bs)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm3o6396di72asj59jr6eafbuimdp4emgp7d0ijg_)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk965brc9n48u10tuctd1tkiv2sh3fiftgpidi08_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie8o74cth2bs)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1umr3r8t3ro6pahh90m910r1nb0cd9qigugnn6g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdie8o74cth2bs)**

Thanks,

We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Look at the damage Biden caused
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890926:62xxaAGNZ:m:1:3368395361:33278199662A9D6EA6D6DC05FBEA4338:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890926:62xxaAGNZ:m:1:3368395361:33278199662A9D6EA6D6DC05FBEA4338:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61890926:62xxaAGNZ:m:1:3368395361:33278199662A9D6EA6D6DC05FBEA4338:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

subject: Tell the Senate to pass the Respect for Marriage Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Big news: the Senate is getting ready to officially vote on the Respect for Marriage Act.
The Respect for Marriage Act will protect marriage equality for millions of Americans. It will permanently guarantee that people in same-sex or interracial marriages have the same rights and freedoms as every other marriage.
**[The Respect for Marriage Act passed in the House this summer, but now the Senate is getting ready to vote on it. Add your name now to show support for this bill and help pass this legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54715949/379422287/1172578443?refcode=dd_em_221117_1&ms=dd_em_221117_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA1ZWYxZi04MDY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tRv78H_f9CRYjAPYLGhOUo0CemG0O98WX2xQW89LTmM=&emci=44aff9d8-ea65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=ba05ef1f-8066-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2727974)**
If the Supreme Court already legalized same-sex and interracial marriages, why do we need to pass the Respect for Marriage Act? The Supreme Court can overturn decisions. Codifying marriage equality is the best way to ensure these rights.
We saw the importance of codifying your rights and freedoms when Roe was overturned earlier this year. In that decision, the right-wing Justices set the groundwork to potentially eliminate marriage equality next.
Passing the Respect for Marriage Act will give the millions of same-sex and interracial couples the certainty that they will continue to enjoy the freedoms, rights, and responsibilities that all other marriages enjoy.
**[Sign our petition now and tell the Senate to pass the Respect for Marriage Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54715951/379422289/1172578443?refcode=dd_em_221117_1&ms=dd_em_221117_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA1ZWYxZi04MDY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tRv78H_f9CRYjAPYLGhOUo0CemG0O98WX2xQW89LTmM=&emci=44aff9d8-ea65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=ba05ef1f-8066-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2727974)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54715952/379422291/1172578443?refcode=dd_em_221117_1&ms=dd_em_221117_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTA1ZWYxZi04MDY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tRv78H_f9CRYjAPYLGhOUo0CemG0O98WX2xQW89LTmM=&emci=44aff9d8-ea65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=ba05ef1f-8066-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=2727974)****

Friend, thanks to grassroots folks like you, we just forced our must-win Senate race into a runoff election.
But with the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking: [Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Jacky Rosen to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54716418/379424270/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2247-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDA1ZWYxZi04MDY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n80Rm9Ud8cyF2Mpkc68X6W8e-1ND848uH-tIeex9f7g=)**

subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj3cv802ih3ali2l2l481cu55k71qtu6b0fsnd6o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1gedin1dr1mppb6ppkekoras36epob8olgearr2o9m6pi3asbmc2pj4shle2o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32dpl6dg7eor664qb6phnm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6o73cjj66p36c8iv0)
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcpapjvfpehn49ehe08ffvfp580tqrtubqcdg35o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdiecor4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl0skkpo2gmqdh7sgbsh2oa0f0e44768ghm40imo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sdiecor4cph2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

name: Josh Shapiro, Governor-Elect
subject: We have a lot of work to get done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
My team and I are laying the groundwork for what we can accomplish in the Governor’s office — because there are a lot of real challenges that Pennsylvanians are facing right now.

Derek, now that it’s official, we have a lot of work to get done. My team and I are laying the groundwork for what we can accomplish in the Governor’s office — because there are a lot of real challenges that Pennsylvanians are facing right now. My priority as Governor will be the same as it has been over the past 13 months: building opportunity here in Pennsylvania. That opportunity starts by investing in every child’s public school to make sure they have a fair shot, investing in public safety to make sure they live past their 18th birthday, and investing in an economy where they can find high-paying union jobs and support their families right here in the Commonwealth. I will be a Governor you can count on to get things done. Throughout my career, I’ve taken on the status quo, brought people together, and fought to deliver real results for Pennsylvanians — and that’s exactly what I’ll do as Governor. [**Take a look at the newly-launched transition website for the Shapiro-Davis Administration. You can learn more about me, Austin Davis, and the work we’re doing to move Pennsylvania forward here:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54719396/379435834/-85006198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzlkMzczNi04MzY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kacQDYnt7lLFP1LhAarKv0H_BEbJFYyxtAHidj3_4M=&emci=9a44c73e-7866-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=079d3736-8366-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=21962291) | | [Learn more →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54719397/379435835/-85006198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzlkMzczNi04MzY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3kacQDYnt7lLFP1LhAarKv0H_BEbJFYyxtAHidj3_4M=&emci=9a44c73e-7866-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=079d3736-8366-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=21962291)

body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running... [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6330%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=4WO4vxTgbuf2CRQWjuY6DQ&sysid=1)
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83684%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Af2hwgUtj1Rba%2bDejNurnw&sysid=1)

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83695%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jeIO2klVkANC1gfWUFZBKg&sysid=1)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024\. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83696%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wHs%2fAZbgUZXQ7zX8CMEfzg&sysid=1)**_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83697%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fFzm9bFAh6NOJUW0VqSNsg&sysid=1)

**[CONTRIBUTE $250 = $3500>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83698%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lAI9iTVoA3adwI1NdT1yew&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83699%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1ysVx5EqtkEodGG7gWZG9A&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83690%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Buht2jOaH0haORZyP%2f8d7Q&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83691%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fvqJpKdV52eHdTqF9bGNxg&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83692%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ebLMd%2bSF7sW2U2YmwHEg9Q&sysid=1)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

_**[Please contribute $20.24 or more IMMEDIATELY to claim your 1300%-IMPACT and get your name on the Official 2024 Donor List that I'll review.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83693%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KRp18A9T2P7%2fC8RrKMopag&sysid=1)**_

Thank you,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83694%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IhOfjnXAHLJfvpqI5KRYsg&sysid=1)
Donald J. Trump

**[CLAIM 13X-IMPACT>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83605%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lraYDVCtSaeiH4j3XHPqFQ&sysid=1)**

name: House Republicans
subject: REPUBLICANS HAVE TAKEN BACK THE HOUSE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | We've been through a lot together, Peter. We've watched our country. get torn apart at the hands of the Radical Left. **But not once did you back out of the fight.**

For TWO LONG YEARS, we've fought tooth and nail to restore our Conservative Majority, and we know things got tough out there, and sometimes it was hard to see the light at the end of the tunnel, _but you never gave up on America._

This win was all because of **YOU.** We couldn't have done it without you. **_[Now, we want to say thanks for all that you've helped us accomplish. Will you claim your FREE "I Fired Nancy Pelosi" sticker?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895861:6pZ6ZAGNd:m:1:3361486117:8FE2E0FFFE048C33B9065CAC7A9C14CF:r "Now, we want to say thanks for all that you’ve helped us accomplish. Will you claim your

subject: Next Stop: The White House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
---
Our nation is hanging in the balance. We cannot let Tuesday night's results distract us from our next goal: **t he White House in 2024.** Peter, this fight isn't over, it's only just beginning.
If we're going to see the results we are hoping for in 2024 we have to start NOW. That is why we are **kick-starting** the fight to **FIRE** Joe Biden in 2024 and **RESTORE THE MAGA NATION**.
---
| | [**FIRE JOE BIDEN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894189:J6Xk9AGNt:m:1:3331421248:F41A706611BDC9DDE52ED8B6C161BF49:r)
---
We cannot afford to let the results stop President Trump from running in 2024. Peter, we must show him that the GOP is a rock SOLID party prepared to FULLY support him and SAVE America.
---
[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP IN 2024**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894189:J6Xk9AGNt:m:1:3331421248:F41A706611BDC9DDE52ED8B6C161BF49:r)
---
Peter, it is full steam ahead toward the White House in 2024. **[The only question is if YOU will be by our side?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894189:J6Xk9AGNt:m:1:3331421248:F41A706611BDC9DDE52ED8B6C161BF49:r)**
---
[**RESTORE THE MAGA NATION**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894189:J6Xk9AGNt:m:1:3331421248:F41A706611BDC9DDE52ED8B6C161BF49:r)
---
Thank you for your commitment to restoring America. MAGA Nation
---

---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Unbelievable… how the media framed Trump’s announcement
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896866:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)
Peter,

It shouldn't surprise me how despicable the left-wing media is. But somehow, they still manage to stoop lower in their ethics. They are nothing more than the propaganda arm of the Democrats.

Looks like the new talking points were released by Pelosi. Here's how the left-wing media framed President Trump's announcement:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896866:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)

This is why Trump calls them Fake News.

And this is why it is my personal mission to expose and destroy the left-wing bias in the media.

I am Brent Bozell, President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.

[_**I am humbly asking for your support to expose the fake news media. Can you send an urgent donation of $250, $100, $50, or any amount you can generously contribute?**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896866:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)

I am preparing a bold new plan to defeat the radical left's lies before 2024. Voters must know the truth when it comes to fake news.

**FIRST:** MRC records thousands of hours of media clips each week. Our servers host over 800,000 hours of media clips to hold the media accountable.

**NEXT:** Our team of researchers comb through the clips for the most egregious examples of left-wing agenda... many times outright lies... being told in the media.

**THEN:** Using our massive online following, MRC releases our findings in online videos, articles, and published research. Our videos often go viral comparing the lies the media tells. And our research has been used in lawsuits against the Biden administration and others.

[_**Please rush your support today for America 's only organization holding the radical leftwing media accountable >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896866:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)

We already know the fake news will attack Trump non-stop. But our biggest victory will be exposing them to voters. The media's lies only work when they go unchecked. Our accountability has proven time and again to destroy their ratings and have voters lose trust in their lies.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore. **

Now is the time for conservatives to go on the offensive. Our success will be determined when these corrupt media companies go bankrupt and lose the public's trust.

I will not be satisfied with anything less.

Here's how you can help.

Our goal is to raise $100,000 before the new year. 2023 is the year we defeat the media before 2024. I cannot do this alone. It will take millions of conservatives teaming up to topple the corrupt fake news corporations.

Please select an amount below to send your support today.

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896867:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896868:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896869:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896870:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896871:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896872:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896873:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896866:6G9h9AGNQ:m:1:3317145305:9407114FECC432DC3D5FA16D9BBD40C9:r)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running... [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0030%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=r1KDpjzKxoS1Dth2p6Cjww&sysid=1)
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40943%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RDdPuv4Hz6rUPdN4XIgE9Q&sysid=1)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.
AND WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

It was hardworking Patriots like YOU who built this Country, and it is hardworking Patriots like you who are going to SAVE our Country with ME in 2024\. Together, we will take back our beautiful, magnificent White House from Joe Biden and the radical Left.

We have a lot of work to do, and we're only just getting started. Can I count on YOU to rush in an inaugural donation of $20.24 RIGHT NOW? When you do, you'll go down in history as one of the FIRST Patriots to donate to my 2024 Presidential Campaign.

_**For TODAY ONLY, all gifts will receive a 1300%-IMPACT!**_
** **
_**[Please make a contribution of $20.24 or more RIGHT NOW to proudly stand with me as I run for President in 2024 and your gift will be INCREASED by 1300%.>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40944%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=13edNm%2f48yseUDMAvy6j2g&sysid=1)**_

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 = $1400>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40057%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fGiFruCMA7MO05XKrKjR2g&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50 = $700>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40058%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B%2b6Q5XJJ4xsQbtFMiKU1Ug&sysid=1)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40059%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fcjjb%2boDAiaO136QyVdRDA&sysid=1)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down._

Can I count on you at this critical time?

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894319:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894319:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894319:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894319:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894319:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894319:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894319:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894319:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894320:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)
Trump Save America JFC, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219

[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894321:JG3J9AGnN:m:1:3331703221:0F5C28E60B45EC7383D3F26E3235A937:r)

name: Full Mag News
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4fbed126bc47483ba93054c671cac80e&_e=4B_w95Ga-4GNNn6I3E0mn7TF4MM4RHd7tb0V1pCHMflu9OsA2y3FM8QztUeazlaVGVskewaZenz98ZJeBEyR3zvu5v4oN2DL8zaUpc_v9oQhHB39iAYRZjEhyISXNBpMPBvf2Oyq-jOuThAx2Qlf4Ca1PI94mYRyXoz7HzyCbWydzrYVADVZcuSKA3mgrLHw46wLAHoZw6dP-m2rgFFpJTY0QcJEGKh2PGNtk8CcuiiwE4S7EEQVrEEcc85vz9FNDr8H8OOy0vtTc9aFZ6f3dLaQd44pgnpQEQmjIc6E1xr_diQJ5EUpriEZ7BCSVtEC6Z6XIhRDtn0mX_D3kwnNUddXz-CFPwBE9YB01rl_f_DDn410JKPG3Uw8BdfwcHveHmEcvyRK75SfmSphOaxBCQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. clean_body: The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is flawed and outdated --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: The Federalist Papers. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described The Federalist Papers as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "The Federalist Papers ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. " The Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of " The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Herschel Walker isn’t just fighting to flip this seat; he’s fighting to stop Kamala from turning the Senate into one of the most radical and extreme majorities our country has ever seen. But with Warnock continuing to rake in cash from liberal billionaires like George Soros, YOU are Herschel’s only hope of leveling the playing field before it’s too late. Thank you, GAGOP HQ Paid for by the Georgia Republican Party, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee P.O. Shafer, Chairman • Joseph Brannan, Treasurer Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, At this point: EVERY VOTE COUNTS 218 House votes have been called for Republicans, giving them a one-seat majority in the House of Representatives. But, there are still a half dozen races or so outstanding, and every seat matters. If Democrats can deny Republicans more than a 1-3 seat majority, it will lead to chaos on the GOP side. One Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats. THIS WOULD BE HUGE. We could get legislation we want put on the House floor this way, to then be ratified by the Senate and signed by Joe Biden. | | | | | | | | | One of the races outstanding is California's 13th District. Liberal Democrat Adam Gray is leading conservative Republican, John Duarte, 50.3% to 49.7%. His lead is about 800 votes, with 30,000 left to count. In the areas left to count, there is very good reason to believe we'll pull this off over a Republican in Duarte, who has said he won't work with Democrats in Washington whom he sees as "socialists" Thanks Blue Amp Action Community!! It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896695:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896695:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896695:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896695:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896695:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896695:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896695:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896695:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)**

Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America. [donaldjtrump.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896696:JinqtAGXN:m:1:3369487795:CA0580935F20D7BEE44F43FE85170238:r)

Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892974:6EWlXAGiN:m:1:3350876382:7222B636A3A49C72970313024E0913A0:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892974:6EWlXAGiN:m:1:3350876382:7222B636A3A49C72970313024E0913A0:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892974:6EWlXAGiN:m:1:3350876382:7222B636A3A49C72970313024E0913A0:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892974:6EWlXAGiN:m:1:3350876382:7222B636A3A49C72970313024E0913A0:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892974:6EWlXAGiN:m:1:3350876382:7222B636A3A49C72970313024E0913A0:r)**

name: Senator Edwards Press
subject: State Sen. Chuck Edwards Now Taking on Constituent Federal Issues
body:
Just because a federal office closed, does not mean constituents stop needing help
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| PRESS RELEASE Senator Chuck Edwards
---
| |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE November 17, 2022
---
| Contact: [Heather Millett](mailto:heather.millett@ncleg.gov) (919) 733-5745
---
| | |
---
| Senator Chuck Edwards to Assist Constituents with Federal Issues Just Because a Federal Office Closed Does Not Mean Constituents Stop Needing Help
---
| | |
---
| Raleigh, N.C. - Sen. Chuck Edwards (R-Henderson) will utilize his office to help WNC citizens with federal issues.
Senator Edwards said, "I have always made it a priority to assist constituents when they face difficulty navigating the bureaucracy of a state government agency. I've heard from many people they're now having difficulty getting their federal office to respond to their needs. My office stands ready to help those who can not get a call returned."
If you or someone you know is facing a federal issue and you cannot get in contact with your federal office, please contact Senator Edwards' Raleigh office at (919) 733-5745, or via email at [Chuck.Edwards@ncleg.gov](mailto:Chuck.Edwards@ncleg.gov).
###

| | |
---
| | |
---

clean_body: Just because a federal office closed, does not mean constituents stop needing help | | | | | | | | | PRESS RELEASE Senator Chuck Edwards | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE November 17, 2022 | Contact: mailto:heather.millett@ncleg.gov (919) 733-5745 | | | | Senator Chuck Edwards to Assist Constituents with Federal Issues Just Because a Federal Office Closed Does Not Mean Constituents Stop Needing Help | | | | Raleigh, N.C. - Sen. Chuck Edwards (R-Henderson) will utilize his office to help WNC citizens with federal issues. Senator Edwards said, "I have always made it a priority to assist constituents when they face difficulty navigating the bureaucracy of a state government agency. I've heard from many people they're now having difficulty getting their federal office to respond to their needs. My office stands ready to help those who can not get a call returned." If you or someone you know is facing a federal issue and you cannot get in contact with your federal office, please contact Senator Edwards' Raleigh office at (919) 733-5745, or via email at mailto:Chuck.Edwards@ncleg.gov. | | | | | | | | | | FOLLOW US == == == | | | | North Carolina Senate | 300 N. Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892959:JTDj_AG-N:m:1:3331703221:5FB95CBDEA47499496FE5DA2092575C3:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892959:JTDj_AG-N:m:1:3331703221:5FB95CBDEA47499496FE5DA2092575C3:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892959:JTDj_AG-N:m:1:3331703221:5FB95CBDEA47499496FE5DA2092575C3:r)**

After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61892959:JTDj_AG-N:m:1:3331703221:5FB95CBDEA47499496FE5DA2092575C3:r)**

name: Veronica Escobar
subject: Here’s why 51 Senators is greater than 50
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VERONICA ESCOBAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Senator Warnock still needs our support.

| |
---
Friend, we saw Democratic wins all across the country. However, Republicans now hold a slim majority in the House of Representatives. name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Response needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message.
Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message.
---
When I first became your attorney general, I made it one of my top priorities to provide the people I represent with a platform where they can freely share their thoughts and concerns. I just earned a second term, and that goal remains the same.
I’m counting on you to update our record of your top priorities so I can keep your voice centered throughout my next term – but my survey closes at MIDNIGHT tonight, and I still need 525 responses before then. **So please, will you take a minute now to answer these quick questions so I can continue to fight for what matters most to you?**
Here’s the best link for the survey: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-2022-post-elections-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54737458/379482749/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk919-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ5NzI0NS05OTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuR-qKmwK1E-qKGead3vA3c7L5tOnLu7w_labPrnIxg=&emci=6211c440-1765-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=24497245-9966-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you,
Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Fri, Nov 11, 2022
Subject: I need your input, Peter
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54737459/379482757/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk919-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ5NzI0NS05OTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuR-qKmwK1E-qKGead3vA3c7L5tOnLu7w_labPrnIxg=&emci=6211c440-1765-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=24497245-9966-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, earlier this week, we made history.

**A little after 10 p.m. on Tuesday night, I became the first Black woman ever to win re-election as New York’s attorney general** – and it’s all because of fearless fighters like you.

Peter, together we showed the powerful and corrupt in every corner of our nation that New Yorkers will never bow, break, or be bullied. And now, as I look ahead to my next term as your attorney general, it’s time to take stock of where we are in this never-ending fight for justice and where we still have to go.

**That’s why I put together this quick priorities survey for you to fill out. As your attorney general, it’s my duty to fight for the things that matter most to the people I represent – but I don’t have your response on file yet.**
**[So please, will you take 60 seconds now to give me your input so I can continue to fight for your top priorities in my next term?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54737462/379482773/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk919-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ5NzI0NS05OTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuR-qKmwK1E-qKGead3vA3c7L5tOnLu7w_labPrnIxg=&emci=6211c440-1765-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=24497245-9966-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54737465/379482782/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk919-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ5NzI0NS05OTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuR-qKmwK1E-qKGead3vA3c7L5tOnLu7w_labPrnIxg=&emci=6211c440-1765-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=24497245-9966-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)
---
Here’s why your response to my priorities survey is so important: Growing up in Brooklyn in the 1960s, I didn't have much power or privilege. I received all of my education – from elementary school to college – through the New York City public school system. And, like so many New Yorkers before me, I had no real platform to speak up about the decisions that were directly affecting me and my family.

**What I’m saying is, I know what it is to feel powerless and voiceless.** And so, when I won my first term as attorney general in 2018, I vowed to fight for all New Yorkers, especially those who don’t usually feel represented – and I’m carrying that vow with me into my next term.
**So please, Peter, before my priorities survey closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight:[Will you take 60 seconds now to answer some quick questions about your top concerns and priorities? I want to ensure that I am fighting for the things that matter to you and your loved ones. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54737468/379482791/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk919-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ5NzI0NS05OTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuR-qKmwK1E-qKGead3vA3c7L5tOnLu7w_labPrnIxg=&emci=6211c440-1765-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=24497245-9966-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54737471/379482803/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk919-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDQ5NzI0NS05OTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QuR-qKmwK1E-qKGead3vA3c7L5tOnLu7w_labPrnIxg=&emci=6211c440-1765-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=24497245-9966-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for taking the time to record your responses – and thank you for helping me win re-election. I’m honored to fight for you for another four years.

Letitia
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0_qpfjczsECwUbLJUZRAAg2?unsubscribedata=PeG7E9yp8nCs3WCUpFH%2FnNFsEgxg34zzIQtx%2F0rVHpuBVLq4ENiLCKm4CU1L%2FnHj3CrK4vWKxK3fkZx5xNnHaMXs980NFrO5rVSVlKmZX7a%2B9%2FUxmneZBodmDAfCOOqge0juY4WevVsVebj%2FFTuJP9eZCweLCuVJYjlxpEc79MGLaX9LRUCUIf0t3IutIzTNhKZ8IAogBd6RH3ldPxE%2Fwzh2XOPle6o45hevND6E15IMZ9xrrAMi3RHWxLYuLIcu4H43%2F7JYLly2dQnzeh0qx6pIGZztsqgCJn22qP%2B27%2BiFfENDlSfP1eQcyT7UgLNuisenmDIwAmiwW3oZ54uiyvlS3obM%2BYtUEz2fTNgcvpQ%2BsA6GsDoBjzy4xOBJUEOiMf4C3OC%2BP1Y%2BrLWNHHoKV03JhyOlDnqqZGnnkjZlHvCOkQ6ebheBqlqXoViXHIgY) James for NY

New York, NY 10034

name: American Firearms Association
subject: [BREAKING] Biden still wants Gun Control
body:
The Red Wave didn't happen... Now our 2A rights are in jeopardy.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "Headline") Peter: Guess what? The Red Wave didn't happen. Now, our Second Amendment rights are in jeopardy. Biden has spent the past several months calling for more erosions of our Constitutional rights, including passing the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban." And with the poor showing on Election Day, we could see the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" become law! Let me tell you, neither Kevin McCarthy nor the conservative stalwarts in Congress will be able to stop this so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" unless you step up and help us fight back TODAY! **[We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from
being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?")** Here at the American Firearms Association, we are working around the clock to rally opposition against Biden's increasing efforts to take away your guns. We've got to mobilize now and get Senators and Members of Congress to commit to the Second Amendment and state their clear opposition to Biden's gun grab. But that means increasing the pressure on them. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "Headline")**Because if you sit and do nothing, the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" will be the least of your concerns.** **National Gun Registration.** **Ammo Bans.** **Magazine Bans.** **National Red Flag Gun Confiscation.** **Forcing you to give the code to your gun safe to Federal Agents.** **[Even the complete seizure of the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "Even the complete seizure of the guns you
own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!")** If you value defending your family from criminals, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "donate today.")** If you value owning as many guns as you damn well please, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "donate today.")** If you don't want Brandon to freely decide what guns you're allowed to keep in your home, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "donate today.")** **[Whatever you can chip in, whether it's $100, $500, or $1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "Whatever you can chip in, whether it’s $100, $500, or
$1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!")** We're working around the clock to make sure Pelosi and Schumer don't sneak in their gun-grabbing legislation through the lame-duck session before year-end. That means we need all the help to ensure we keep our Second Amendment intact. Otherwise, only Hunter Biden will be allowed to "legally" own a gun. Don't delay. Every day wasted is a day closer to Biden shredding your right to bear arms! **[Save the Second Amendment today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "Save the Second Amendment today!")** For America,

Chris Dorr
President, American Firearms Association | | [PROTECT THE 2A!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896857:6srVxAGTN:m:1:3331421248:9171EADDADB39E8B8BCD91DCA76EF4F0:r "PROTECT
THE 2A!")
---

Let me tell you, neither Kevin McCarthy nor the conservative stalwarts in Congress will be able to stop this so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" unless you step up and help us fight back TODAY! "We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?" Here at the American Firearms Association, we are working around the clock to rally opposition against Biden's increasing efforts to take away your guns. We've got to mobilize now and get Senators and Members of Congress to commit to the Second Amendment and state their clear opposition to Biden's gun grab. But that means increasing the pressure on them. "Headline"Because if you sit and do nothing, the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" will be the least of your concerns. National Gun Registration. Ammo Bans. Magazine Bans. National Red Flag Gun Confiscation. Forcing you to give the code to your gun safe to Federal Agents. "Even the complete seizure of the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!" If you value defending your family from criminals, then "donate today." If you value owning as many guns as you damn well please, then "donate today." If you don't want Brandon to freely decide what guns you're allowed to keep in your home, then "donate today." "Whatever you can chip in, whether it’s $100, $500, or $1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!" We're working around the clock to make sure Pelosi and Schumer don't sneak in their gun-grabbing legislation through the lame-duck session before year-end. That means we need all the help to ensure we keep our Second Amendment intact. Otherwise, only Hunter Biden will be allowed to "legally" own a gun. Don't delay. Every day wasted is a day closer to Biden shredding your right to bear arms! "Save the Second Amendment today!" For America, Chris Dorr President, American Firearms Association | | "PROTECT THE 2A!" The American Firearms Association is a nonprofit organization registered in the state of Ohio. While contributions are limitless, they are not tax-deductible. name: Liz
subject: Make no mistake – fair maps are important for democracy.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team -- There is a clear message here from the midterm election. **Fairness and democracy won on election night.**

**[How did we get here?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54738065/379483944/-1411470677?refcode=20221115_AOTL_C_postelection_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDk3MjQ1LTk5NjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U5Gun1Orh_u7TVWzyBaN2AbYF9o6rhI_TjYG4Nzn-ok=)**
In 2019, President Obama and Attorney General Eric Holder launched All On The Line as a national campaign to restore fairness to our democracy and ensure every American has an equal say in our government.

**We made a commitment to protect our democracy using a three-prong strategy:**
* We committed to holding leaders accountable for manipulating maps and pursuing an extreme anti-democratic agenda through our on-the-ground volunteer and advocacy work.
* We stayed loud consistently, pushing for equitable maps in courts around the country, while in states like North Carolina and Pennsylvania, our affiliates pushed litigation that challenged gerrymandered maps.
* Most importantly, we dedicated our work to democracy reform and protecting election integrity.

_Our strategy paid off and resulted in the fairest congressional map in 40 years._

Our collaborative partnership with Power to the Polls to recruit poll workers for 2022 resulted in nearly 4000 volunteers safeguarding election infrastructure and ensuring voters had the opportunity to exercise their constitutional rights fairly.

**[How did fairness and democracy win this week?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54738066/379483945/-1411470677?refcode=20221115_AOTL_C_postelection_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDk3MjQ1LTk5NjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U5Gun1Orh_u7TVWzyBaN2AbYF9o6rhI_TjYG4Nzn-ok=)**
Despite anti-democracy and map manipulators' best efforts, fair maps and democracy won. We witnessed a historic night in states like Michigan and Colorado, where citizen-commission-drawn maps allowed communities to elect candidates reflective of their unique values and cultures.

On election day, voters in Colorado's 8th congressional district elected the first Latina from Colorado to Congress. Specifically, the newly created competitive 8th Congressional District – a district with the highest percentage of Latinos in the state – was created after calls from the public for the final congressional map to reflect the growth of the Latino community in Colorado. All On The Line Colorado trained hundreds of Coloradans to understand how to participate in the map drawing process and make their voice heard.

**[Where do we go from here?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54738067/379483947/-1411470677?refcode=20221115_AOTL_C_postelection_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDk3MjQ1LTk5NjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U5Gun1Orh_u7TVWzyBaN2AbYF9o6rhI_TjYG4Nzn-ok=)**
We are still fighting for our democracy. In 2023, multiple states will redraw maps, and pending U.S. Supreme Court cases are crucial in moving our country forward. These cases could determine voter rights suppression for generations and affect federal elections. But we've seen what we can accomplish together and will continue to do democracy.

**[Know this: the success we achieved was because of you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54738068/379483949/-1411470677?refcode=20221115_AOTL_C_postelection_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDk3MjQ1LTk5NjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U5Gun1Orh_u7TVWzyBaN2AbYF9o6rhI_TjYG4Nzn-ok=)**

Everything you did: giving volunteer time, donating to support our resources, or taking action in advocacy for fair maps was valuable and made a difference. We could not have done any of it without you. Because of your support, our movement empowered voters and ensured map manipulators did not hold our nation.

**[If you’re able, we’d appreciate a donation of any amount:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54738069/379483950/-1411470677?refcode=20221115_AOTL_C_postelection_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlNDk3MjQ1LTk5NjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U5Gun1Orh_u7TVWzyBaN2AbYF9o6rhI_TjYG4Nzn-ok=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
