clean_body: The Red Wave didn't happen... Now our 2A rights are in jeopardy. "Headline" Peter: Guess what? The Red Wave didn't happen. Now, our Second Amendment rights are in jeopardy. Biden has spent the past several months calling for more erosions of our Constitutional rights, including passing the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban." And with the poor showing on Election Day, we could see the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" become law! Let me tell you, neither Kevin McCarthy nor the conservative stalwarts in Congress will be able to stop this so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" unless you step up and help us fight back TODAY! "We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?" Here at the American Firearms Association, we are working around the clock to rally opposition against Biden's increasing efforts to take away your guns. We've got to mobilize now and get Senators and Members of Congress to commit to the Second Amendment and state their clear opposition to Biden's gun grab. But that means increasing the pressure on them. "Headline"Because if you sit and do nothing, the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" will be the least of your concerns. National Gun Registration. Ammo Bans. Magazine Bans. National Red Flag Gun Confiscation. Forcing you to give the code to your gun safe to Federal Agents. "Even the complete seizure of the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!" If you value defending your family from criminals, then "donate today." If you value owning as many guns as you damn well please, then "donate today." If you don't want Brandon to freely decide what guns you're allowed to keep in your home, then "donate today." "Whatever you can chip in, whether it’s $100, $500, or $1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!" We're working around the clock to make sure Pelosi and Schumer don't sneak in their gun-grabbing legislation through the lame-duck session before year-end. That means we need all the help to ensure we keep our Second Amendment intact. Otherwise, only Hunter Biden will be allowed to "legally" own a gun. Don't delay. Every day wasted is a day closer to Biden shredding your right to bear arms! "Save the Second Amendment today!" For America, Chris Dorr President, American Firearms Association | | "PROTECT THE 2A!" clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

In two years, the American People can make their voices heard - LOUDER, STRONGER, and MORE PASSIONATE than ever before. This road will not be easy, but if every red-blooded Patriot does their job, freedom WILL prevail. The Democrats want to distract you from EVERY problem they have created, but the American People will never fall for their tactics. Your unwavering support is the backbone of my SAVE AMERICA movement, so I have ACTIVATED a 1300%-IMPACT offer on ALL GIFTS made towards our Official Trump 2024 Victory Fund. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Join the exclusive C.S. Lewis study group
body:
This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study group

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47a54067757f4bb8a837fead22f76c82&_e=E3GbuIWdJllYQhU38eecJXmaAr_rngHgspT0ro0TUHPs9rroudx4ENpb_EneU3JzZIoCI5Wix7chzPH_so0C1pcjzLOA6sDgicnMyRfU4f_fsoEvaRf9jxbIeYlck1Wp6I4qrek9sEV2iCScuJnaC3qUNGVQVnsj2TMHPhBTr-0aDB7kUj3Pwu48x8sxshUAZHExpBQg-Gq-K-2JW75k8AKufe9AIELFL0-WRwna8E-H7LUC-AmdOV9WFF5-FgWFhPmGLIOO6CPW8p_6nin8k5tCZjsJc_Wc1RVvv6chHsxQJrdb7c8HKOXNxqWPnIwEegNTeSYiVDG1ffM4t0ALtCBq2oCvU1s7R1gZbFqH7W-vr7C62gDHtNny3AuPLlR4EGKYFF2K9N75kJGBDWyfNnQGtE-pr54OATJ3NOxXQco%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=47a54067757f4bb8a837fead22f76c82&_e=E3GbuIWdJllYQhU38eecJXmaAr_rngHgspT0ro0TUHPs9rroudx4ENpb_EneU3JzZIoCI5Wix7chzPH_so0C1pcjzLOA6sDgicnMyRfU4f_fsoEvaRf9jxbIeYlck1Wp6I4qrek9sEV2iCScuJnaC3qUNGVQVnsj2TMHPhBTr-0aDB7kUj3Pwu48x8sxshUAZHExpBQg-Gq-K-2JW75k8GOMPhv-bKHRWkuBY4a47cU6xX2lTW7sLk0p54XDYhWTvF9VQ7RUKRCWm5dWyiQ4FvRdTXdcMbi0aEllGMsdfF0wHQsm3RLGsdwuJWraH3e7hjn1gtpJDIS09AsloEF91HJ-T-ETxFJqNcphgaTlgNpm9YfTLygmOatKqiycpM3uoBraTUXlLkrFu8G57DXb4XGUjwJb6rMZvs2uzPG4F3U%3D)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi0tqig7tlidu077u35seivqmvevdje9h9rq3pmo_rp22sh2s8i66or0stg66oj6chh2bs)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvgr00o9mh67e2thv9ukvl2r5vbk5nkn44ah9lf0_rp22sh2s8i66or0stg66oj6chh2bs)**

body:
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4niootn667sm9445br5p9sdg7cbo3kqa7dcjpvo_rp22sh2s8i66or0stg6aor7c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkc9q6fcj16mojcdpks5qn9cr6m1qm8cri6uoj4t70c5on1cdmmopj4db4ear60puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4s36e5rj6p1nm9rmcd70m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
Are you going to stand with me? I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running...
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfi466is14v0ud8sp0idds09gh3pg8gfov3mj598_rp22sh2s8i66or0stg6aor7c9h2bs)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2rddkn15cqes1d3m3d7tt49l9dqj9qo3go9dk88_rp22sh2s8i66or0stg6aor7c9h2bs)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA PROUD AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA SAFE AGAIN.

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

subject: Peter, who do you want in the White House?
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61891877:JAi0eAGEN:m:1:3368395361:754D12AC39ABFFC288EBD34DFB5B9F28:r)

Peter,

Who do you want running the country?

_Biden, a spinless hypocrite, and a lifelong career politician._

**Or Ron DeSantis -- a veteran, father and husband, and freedom fighter.**

Biden changes his stances to follow the political breeze. He has flip-flopped on issues like protecting our Southern border from illegal immigration to cater to the woke Left.

**Ron DeSantis has a clear track record of keeping his promises and standing firm on his principles.**

Peter, who do you want in the White House?

[_**If you want Ron DeSantis in the White House, then we need your help today. Please click here to help us recruit Ron to run against Biden >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61891877:JAi0eAGEN:m:1:3368395361:754D12AC39ABFFC288EBD34DFB5B9F28:r)

Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement, is working to convince Ron DeSantis to run for President in 2024. We're gathering 1 MILLION petition signatures, but we can't do it alone.

**I invite you to join the Ready for Ron movement. **

We're raising $20,000 in the next 48 hours to gather petition signatures. Can we count on you to send a gift today?

subject: I am running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I need to know I have your support | Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894283:69nLSAGN1:m:1:3253819041:0E93EBD2155BC715543AB2C19AA762AB:r)

**[BREAKING NEWS FROM MAR-A-LAGO: DONALD J. TRUMP ANNOUNCES 2024 PRESIDENTIAL RUN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894283:69nLSAGN1:m:1:3253819041:0E93EBD2155BC715543AB2C19AA762AB:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894283:69nLSAGN1:m:1:3253819041:0E93EBD2155BC715543AB2C19AA762AB:r)

Peter,

Many people have been speculating for a long time, and today I can confirm it's true: **I am OFFICIALLY running to be the next President of the United States, and together we are going to make our Country great again!**

When I was your President, we put America First and accomplished more than any other president, and under circumstances that no president had to deal with before. No matter what the Left-wing media and their friends, _the Democrats,_ threw at us, we NEVER stopped working to **Make America Great Again.**

And, Peter, we did Make America Great Again. Then Joe Biden ruined our country faster than anyone could ever imagine. _That's why I'm running AGAIN, we need to save our Country._

Democrats have all but destroyed everything we accomplished under my administration because they want to take away your dignity and your destiny.

I will NEVER let them do that, which is why _I am proud to announce that I AM RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT IN 2024._ I'm calling on my most fierce and loyal supporters, like YOU, to cement your name in history as one of the FIRST _**Official 2024 Presidential Founders.**_

_Your generous contributions in the past have been a MAJOR reason we've been able to FIGHT BACK against the radical Left, and I'm counting on you to step up again at this critical time. We need to have the largest fundraising day ever to send a message._

**[Please contribute $20.24 IMMEDIATELY to become an Official 2024 Presidential Founder and go down in history with me.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894283:69nLSAGN1:m:1:3253819041:0E93EBD2155BC715543AB2C19AA762AB:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894283:69nLSAGN1:m:1:3253819041:0E93EBD2155BC715543AB2C19AA762AB:r)

I need your support now more than ever, Peter. _The Democrats hate me more now than they did in 2020,_ and I need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat them.

We need to prioritize **PROTECTING** the integrity of our Elections, **SECURING** our Southern Border, **RESTORING** our once-great economy, and **STANDING UP** to our enemies, domestic and abroad. All these things will be of the utmost importance, but I can only accomplish them with YOUR help.

My team is going to send me a list with the names of every Patriot who contributes to become an **Official 2024 Presidential Founder.** Will I see your name on the list?

**[Please donate RIGHT NOW to stand with me and get your name on the FIRST Official 2024 Presidential Founder roster I review.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894283:69nLSAGN1:m:1:3253819041:0E93EBD2155BC715543AB2C19AA762AB:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894283:69nLSAGN1:m:1:3253819041:0E93EBD2155BC715543AB2C19AA762AB:r)
Donald J. Trump

**[DONATE HERE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894283:69nLSAGN1:m:1:3253819041:0E93EBD2155BC715543AB2C19AA762AB:r)**

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Raphael Warnock is a lifelong advocate for affordable health care, fair wages, and voting rights, a fighter for a woman's right to control their body and keeping our schools, malls and other public spaces safe from gun violence. Because he doesn't court corporate donors, he needs grassroots support from communities like Blue Amp Action.
body:
Keep a good Senator
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91125d8d-3c99-41b3-b4c4-85139cc03cbe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | **[With a few weeks til the runoff election in Georgia, we ask you to please make a contribution of any amount to the Warnock campaign to keep Georgia blue.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b53ce35-38dd-43a0-996a-1b1b3adfb537/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
Raphael Warnock is the kind of man we simply must keep in the Senate--he understands how most Americans live, as he's lived an American story. Warnock grew up in public housing in Savannah, GA, with 11 brothers and sisters. He was the first in his family to graduate from a four-year college, and went on to earn a Ph.D. _When an historic opportunity presented itself, and Warnock was given the honor of serving as senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta--preaching from the very pulpit where Martin Luther King Jr. once stood--he proved the perfect choice._

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Keep a good man in the Senate**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb84d706d-f9e0-4aad-b673-5061b15b2917/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | A lifelong advocate for affordable health care, fair wages, and voting rights, a fighter for a woman's right to control their body and keeping our schools, malls and other public spaces safe from gun violence, he next proved himself the ideal choice to take on these crucial fights in Washington.
---
**Because Warnock doesn't court corporate donors, he needs grassroots support from communities like Blue Amp Action, as Mitch McConnell has dumped $52 million into Georgia to attack Warnock with dishonest smears.** **[Can you join us in supporting him with a donation of $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford? They don't make many like Senator Warnock. We need his empathy, morality and work ethic in Washington.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79901307-4025-49b5-ac24-e6d5cf8995f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you all for making this community a powerful supporter of progressive values across the country.
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T279f875a-6596-49bf-b212-377daf3525ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---

---

---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/warnockbackground3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td899cb88-2fa3-4686-8901-95c49209cd58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American😓
body:
| | | Dear Peter,[**Will you rush me your emergency donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND immediately?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898152:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r) On September 23, two dozen heavily-armed FBI agents...in tactical gear...guns drawn...raided the home of pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor Mark Houck...and, in front of his wife and seven children, handcuffed him and hauled him off to jail.Over what?Over a case so flimsy the District Court of Philadelphia already **_had thrown it out_.**Over an incident in which Mark was defending his 12-year-old son when an abortion clinic "escort" verbally abused and repeatedly violated his personal space._And despite the fact that Mark offered to appear voluntarily (an important detail which I 'll come back to in a minute)._Make no mistake, _this is_ the political weaponization of the FBI.Make no mistake, _this is_ retaliation for the overturning of Roe v. Wade (sidewalk counselors, crisis pregnancy centers, and even churches are now targets of the radical pro-abortion movement).And make no mistake, _this is_ an assault on all pro-life Americans.[**So, I hope I can count on your donation of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND to help us give Mark the best defense possible.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898152:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r) Now, I'll cut right to the chase.Mark is being charged under the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act - a law that dates back to Bill Clinton's pro-abortion presidency.If convicted, he faces **11 years** in prison and up to **$350,000 in fines**.Immediately upon hearing of the early morning raid and arrest, the Thomas More Society swung into action. Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.**That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILY****LEGAL DEFENSE FUND.** Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?**Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can.** "_We can get to you. We can get to your family._ "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap.[**But nothing could be more important. So your $35 or more tax-deductible gift to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND is vitally important.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898152:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r)The Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **_we fight back_**.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, _they 'll multiply._So please hurry. [**Stand with Mark**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898152:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r), before it's too late.For Life,
---
---
Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel
---
[**DONATE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898152:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r)
---
P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for _six to eight hours at a time_ , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide).[**Can I count on your emergency, tax-deductible donation to the HOUCK FAMILY LEGAL DEFENSE FUND so we can stand with Mark together?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898152:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r)
---
| | |
---
[ Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898152:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898153:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606[privacy policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898154:6aFlqAGuN:m:1:3317145305:1921A3CB4EDF4304873448966E158325:r)
---

Peter Breen (our vice president and general counsel) flew to Philadelphia for Mark's arraignment.Needless to say, Mark pled "NOT GUILTY!" to these sham charges.But the reality is this will be a long and expensive fight.That 's why I'm asking for your best gift of $35 or more to the HOUCK FAMILYLEGAL DEFENSE FUND. Mark is beloved by his family, friends, neighbors, and in the Philadelphia pro-life community.And I know your support means the world to Mark and his wife (Ryan-Marie).Now, imagine the terror and shock in the innocent faces of his young children as 25 armed federal agents descended on their home, threatened to break down the door, and then swarmed in with guns drawn and barrels pointed throughout the home.That's why I told you I would come back to the important detail that Mark offered to appear voluntarily to the FBI.His offer was rejected.Why?Precisely because Joe Biden and his radically pro-abortion administration are intent on inflicting as much suffering on Mark and his family (and intimidating pro-lifers in Philadelphia and across the nation) as they possibly can. "We can get to you. We can get to your family. "That's their message. That's the "street justice" they're looking to inflict.And it's that threat that we have to fight with our defense of Mark.It won't be easy. And it won't be cheap. Thomas More Society knows what it takes to fight and win this kind of fight against the abortion industry and against its allies in government. From the moment Kamala Harris weaponized the California attorney general's office against David Daleiden (when he exposed the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts), the Thomas More Society spearheaded his defense.And we are proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders like Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, the March for Life, Abby Johnson and many more.Because when dark forces of the abortion movement unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back.So, if you are able to give more - say as much as $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more - it would go a long way in helping us clear Mark of these charges.I know I don't have to tell you that if the long tentacles of the abortion industry can reach into the halls of the FBI and the Department of Justice and if pro-abortion politicians can rip the blindfold of impartiality from "Lady Justice" then the weaponization and the attacks won't stop, they 'll multiply.So please hurry. , before it's too late.For Life, Tom BrejchaPresident & Chief Counsel P.S. There's one more thing you should know about Mark Houck. He drove two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time , praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son.Make no mistake, that's why he was targeted. He doesn't just share our pro-life convictions... he fearlessly lives them out. That's why you and I must stand with him today and win this legal battle (the implications of which will be felt nationwide). | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. name: VICTORY IN PENNSYLVANIA!  (via VPP)
subject: addressed to Senator-elect John Fetterman:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Voter Protection Project
body:
CONGRATULATIONS!!
| Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please [click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg). If you wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg).
---
**BREAKING: Democrat John Fetterman Flips Key Toss-Up Senate Seat**
**This is a HUGE victory for Democrats and our Senate majority, so we’re sending Fetterman a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him!** [**We’re sending this letter to him in just a few hours – so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34850?t=8&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34850?t=9&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg) | [**Donate $7 to sign and congratulate Senator-elect Fetterman** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34850?t=10&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg)
---
TO: Senator-elect John Fetterman FROM: A grateful Democrat Subject: CONGRATULATIONS
**_Dear Senator-elect Fetterman – CONGRATULATIONS!_**
**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we had when we found out you soared to victory and flipped this crucial seat!**

Pennsylvania is a key battleground state that was absolutely _essential_ for Democrats to hold and expand our fragile Senate majority.

**We know fighting against GOP crony Dr. Oz and the MAGA mob’s vicious attacks wasn’t easy — _especially in such a close toss-up race._**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!**

[**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $7 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding victory and to continue to elect incredible Senate Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34850?t=11&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34850?t=12&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg) | [**Donate $7 to sign and congratulate Senator-elect Fetterman!** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34850?t=13&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg)
---

| | Paid for by Voter Protection Project
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=3&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=4&akid=5395%2E878179%2EOnmemg).**

**Team Lauren**
Lauren Boebert for Congress

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A simple request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0031%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=AlBxm8DJAXWvb6wLz7ShAQ&sysid=1)
|
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40064%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=76fw7J%2fPVbs3BCzKe5eqVQ&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40075%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5ARFSqBX4ZSIyy6QeweqAg&sysid=1)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40076%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AYqZ2dpgtdToMgFqUGhuzA&sysid=1)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40077%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KVmzjnI3d8iERh2AsJ1ZuA&sysid=1)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 →**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40076%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AYqZ2dpgtdToMgFqUGhuzA&sysid=1)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40078%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=McnZN9h8geWe9rU6S%2b%2bUPg&sysid=1)**

name: Justice Deliverers
subject: This Warrior was FINALLY reunited with his family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
Learn about the story of 1st Lieutenant Michael Behenna.| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d1ac2298957346099987e76e6c58bf76&_e=YLH0iZg-3jX37RYttm9eMxN-wmnbCVwq91rinY8W-i0Eyh-rmPIVlCcY-DZVN0h1SjqvMEtJ2ihhltkvZJyDLPPakMSROkJW7hxsZscO2cUCwjPlOhyfMEFY9CyJPJTiUKNJJflYYIJ15srFRNka6OVYbL7OQzc3V7Nm5c1OxYZ36LC6NyzeAxUAspI5Rs_q8LDSCyFO88O1E51ISIJxtIPluolWzpUcMSMVcrqV29Th2KFyu7CeuJxf24FTX8l3sc5PBddP_l3d9D3A8Qnc_LaiNu3dgkbOeAhMc3Pz_XAxUOp1o1_6YjMsHgrYVaQb8r2FwTP_k9M-Fhj5cOSdWSrukNSdoNuH5EMOgZD7fPDBMe7HH4N9EuA5PVLBmMHf7sxofXUvEpU7872aQcJFVuOyyl8agfat6Wayut5nTJaNiNrtaW9ubzmFRB1dQmTBw7RQM99GIiF-Apyjy2ohAw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, We often have to tell you a lot of heartbreaking stories about our Warriors, but today we get to do something different. Today, we get to tell you a story where justice was finally served, and a Hero was reunited with his family. This is the story of 1st Lieutenant Michael Behenna.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d1ac2298957346099987e76e6c58bf76&_e=YLH0iZg-3jX37RYttm9eMxN-wmnbCVwq91rinY8W-i0Eyh-rmPIVlCcY-DZVN0h1SjqvMEtJ2ihhltkvZJyDLPPakMSROkJW7hxsZscO2cUCwjPlOhyfMEFY9CyJPJTiUKNJJflYYIJ15srFRNka6OVYbL7OQzc3V7Nm5c1OxYZ36LC6NyzeAxUAspI5Rs_q8LDSCyFO88O1E51ISIJxtIPluolWzpUcMSMVcrqV29Th2KFyu7CeuJxf24FTX8l3sc5PBddP_l3d9D3A8Qnc_LaiNu3dgkbOeAhMc3Pz_XBf8Tja11_Ywor69kjh4jx1JnG3g_E5SrXfb2Sc0eOcFP67z2EjCBa8SNEd2skOcnCMpALrIrvooBXc_JUbwv6Xp0TRsg2z232qBPw0ME6cuoz1d_utozHSCGIWDRyBEZRl3wiWw4DDMexUxq5R2L1GGE8ZN31Zy_Q6A9bXsZNBug%3D%3D)
---
After witnessing the horrors of 9/11, Michael Behenna decided to serve his country and enlist in the military - where he quickly became known as a loyal and dedicated soldier. **That was until he got accused of murder... ** While serving in Iraq, Michael questioned a dangerous Iraqi prisoner accused of coordinating a deadly bombing against U.S. forces. During the interrogation, the prisoner reached for Behenna's weapon. To protect himself from the enemy, Lt. Behenna fired his gun, killing the prisoner. **Lt. Behenna was soon slapped with a bogus murder charge. ** After a wholly corrupt and unfair trial, Lt. Behenna was convicted of murder and sentenced to 25 years in prison. **Over the next six years, UAP donated tens of thousands of dollars to help in the efforts to get him released - and finally, our efforts paid off! ** Michael Behenna was released back to his family, and we helped as he fought to secure a Presidential Pardon throughout the following years.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d1ac2298957346099987e76e6c58bf76&_e=YLH0iZg-3jX37RYttm9eMxN-wmnbCVwq91rinY8W-i0Eyh-rmPIVlCcY-DZVN0h1SjqvMEtJ2ihhltkvZJyDLPPakMSROkJW7hxsZscO2cUCwjPlOhyfMEFY9CyJPJTiUKNJJflYYIJ15srFRNka6OVYbL7OQzc3V7Nm5c1OxYZ36LC6NyzeAxUAspI5Rs_q8LDSCyFO88O1E51ISIJxtIPluolWzpUcMSMVcrqV29Th2KFyu7CeuJxf24FTX8l3sc5PBddP_l3d9D3A8Qnc_LaiNu3dgkbOeAhMc3Pz_XCS_miU8R4HNugnHlFV5Q6ilfUkIbJxcJ4WrWT_Bou_rXFxcqH7W-hPbqxHnnRRtbT-XHRuhm-iFwMcc7LxSfQAOn5qpLYp6Hh_AcfSzVEeDWwJl9CAdIKwtOMjBD_YmovdIG7TWBPrOmdcB1Ev__IfJN3YqC1-u5TPH45tPvuAsA%3D%3D)
---
**Lt. Behenna is now a free man who finally got the justice he deserves, but so many of our Warriors aren't as lucky...** We need your help to keep creating success stories like these. Will you donate today to help us make more?
---

clean_body: Learn about the story of 1st Lieutenant Michael Behenna.| | | Peter, We often have to tell you a lot of heartbreaking stories about our Warriors, but today we get to do something different. Today, we get to tell you a story where justice was finally served, and a Hero was reunited with his family. This is the story of 1st Lieutenant Michael Behenna. After witnessing the horrors of 9/11, Michael Behenna decided to serve his country and enlist in the military - where he quickly became known as a loyal and dedicated soldier. That was until he got accused of murder... While serving in Iraq, Michael questioned a dangerous Iraqi prisoner accused of coordinating a deadly bombing against U.S. forces. During the interrogation, the prisoner reached for Behenna's weapon. To protect himself from the enemy, Lt. Behenna fired his gun, killing the prisoner. Lt. Behenna was soon slapped with a bogus murder charge. After a wholly corrupt and unfair trial, Lt. Behenna was convicted of murder and sentenced to 25 years in prison. Over the next six years, UAP donated tens of thousands of dollars to help in the efforts to get him released - and finally, our efforts paid off! Michael Behenna was released back to his family, and we helped as he fought to secure a Presidential Pardon throughout the following years. Lt. Behenna is now a free man who finally got the justice he deserves, but so many of our Warriors aren't as lucky... We need your help to keep creating success stories like these. Will you donate today to help us make more? Thank you, United American Patriots | | | | | ---|--- UAP, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Donations are tax deductible. name: Ready for Ron
subject: Who do you want in the White House?
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61891868:6Zg34AGeN:m:1:3369487795:A0F36F2E8F6F41B6305E6166C997C190:r)

Peter,

Who do you want running the country?

_Biden, a spinless hypocrite, and a lifelong career politician._

**Or Ron DeSantis -- a veteran, father and husband, and freedom fighter.**

Biden changes his stances to follow the political breeze. He has flip-flopped on issues like protecting our Southern border from illegal immigration to cater to the woke Left.

**Ron DeSantis has a clear track record of keeping his promises and standing firm on his principles.**

Peter, who do you want in the White House?

You are in the midst of a history-making fight on the ground in Georgia.

Senator Marsha Blackburn

body:

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895887:6eXI5AGuN:m:1:3360412034:7EB6D97C1193B64A173E5A92611B0191:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895887:6eXI5AGuN:m:1:3360412034:7EB6D97C1193B64A173E5A92611B0191:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895887:6eXI5AGuN:m:1:3360412034:7EB6D97C1193B64A173E5A92611B0191:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895887:6eXI5AGuN:m:1:3360412034:7EB6D97C1193B64A173E5A92611B0191:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895887:6eXI5AGuN:m:1:3360412034:7EB6D97C1193B64A173E5A92611B0191:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895887:6eXI5AGuN:m:1:3360412034:7EB6D97C1193B64A173E5A92611B0191:r)

Friend,

I am proud to tell you that I just announced from Mar-a-Lago that I am officially running for **President of the United States.**

It is with your help that:

**WE WILL MAKE AMERICA POWERFUL AGAIN.
WE WILL MAKE AMERICA WEALTHY AGAIN.

**[CONTRIBUTE $20.24 = $283>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3q5rvnlse1honghadne5l1vblrb4dl5v5uf0el8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti60pb0sjh2bs)**

I want to know who stood by me from the very beginning. My team is giving me the FIRST **Official 2024 Donor List** TOMORROW in my Mar-a-Lago office, and I want to see YOUR NAME, Friend.

_Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. Herschel Walker is in trouble.

In last week’s Georgia Senate election, **Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock got more votes.** That means as the two candidates head into a runoff, Herschel is the clear underdog.

But as a legendary football player, Herschel knows a thing or two about a “comeback.”

That’s why I’m heading to Georgia to support Herschel’s campaign, and I’m hoping you will do your part too.

---

---

If Herschel is going to flip this seat and make Georgia **RED** again, _**[he’s going to need your immediate support!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83707%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qvp1nXyvW2prpC0cpRbJwg&sysid=1 "he’s going to need your
immediate support!")**_** **

---
| | [HELP HERSCHEL WIN](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83708%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EkGyntZKuSfd%2fjJJh%2fSNow&sysid=1)
---

To date, Warnock has raised over **$100** _**MILLION**_ from big-money Democrats.

While Warnock relies on the help of left-wing billionaires and Hollywood liberals, Herschel relies on grassroots patriots like _**YOU**_. So please, don’t delay - _**[make a contribution to Herschel!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83709%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wt9Fxd51e88Xo2f766Pfog&sysid=1 "make a contribution to
Herschel!")**_

---
| | [HELP HERSCHEL WIN](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c83708%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EkGyntZKuSfd%2fjJJh%2fSNow&sysid=1)
---

**Should Herschel lose, the Democrats will be one vote closer to packing our courts with activist judges and ENDING the filibuster.**

I’ll be pulling the list of donors to Herschel’s campaign in the morning, and I hope to see your name on the list.

All eyes are on Georgia...will you step up?

Fighting For Our Future,

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Thank you, Nancy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
Friends,
Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced today that she will not seek election as Democratic leader this coming year.
When I was elected to Congress in 2006, one of the first and most important votes I cast was to elect Speaker Pelosi as the first—and only—woman to serve as Speaker of the House. I am so proud, and grateful, to call her both a mentor and a friend.
Speaker Pelosi didn’t just break down barriers. She led the fight to pass historic legislation that’s helped millions of families, from the Affordable Care Act to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill . And we worked together to repeal Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell and end decades of injustice in the military.
She is tenacious, a tireless public servant, and deeply committed to our democracy and the American experiment.
In her farewell speech, Speaker Pelosi said that she never intended to go from homemaker to House Speaker. But she was called—like so many of us—to get off the sidelines and represent the people of her community in Congress.
We owe her a debt of gratitude. And now, it’s on us to carry her mantle forward. To elect more history-making women to Congress who will bring their unique perspectives and experiences to Congress.
Will you join me in honoring Speaker Pelosi’s legacy by making a contribution to Off the Sidelines today? Your donation will go directly toward electing the next generation of women leaders to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ots-sms?refcode=2022_11_17_ND]
Thank you,
Kirsten
P.S. I’ll leave you with this photo of Speaker Pelosi and me at one of my early Congressional Women’s Softball Games. A picture is worth a thousand words.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ots-sms?refcode=2022_11_17_ND [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ots-sms?refcode=2022_11_17_ND]

CONTRIBUTE

Please mail checks to Verdolino & Lowey, 124 Washington St., Ste. 101, Foxboro, MA 02035.
To contribute by PERSONAL check, please make your contribution payable to “Off the Sidelines PAC"

We’d hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving messages from Off the Sidelines altogether, you can unsubscribe here: Unsubscribe

The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn't have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: _**conservative principles and us.**_
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth... ▶︎ To fight inflation?

name: Giffords.org
subject: Don’t miss the CNN premiere of Gabby Giffords Won’t Back Down on Sunday!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Tune in to CNN at 9 pm on Sunday, November 20th for the CNN premiere of Gabby Giffords Won’t Back Down
#

**After its successful premiere in select theaters this summer,_Gabby Giffords Won’t Back Down_ will be premiering on CNN this Sunday, November 20th at 9 pm local time.**
This documentary tells the extraordinary story of former Arizona Congresswoman Gabby Giffords. With never-before-seen footage, _Gabby Giffords Won’t Back Down_ shows Gabby in her relentless fight to recover following an assassination attempt in 2011, and delves into her new life as one of the most effective activists in the battle against gun violence.
This is a film you don’t want to miss. If you haven’t had the chance to watch the documentary, make sure you tune in to CNN this Sunday at 9 pm local time.
Thank you,
The team at Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22.2v05GQ&refcode=em221117-1-30&t=1&akid=2762%2E3935704%2Eio2I1l)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2762%2E3935704%2Eio2I1l) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: First ad of the runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895829:6pOWOAGSN:m:1:3372944669:6B48BF77E8B1B30BF95665CF4C24373D:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895829:6pOWOAGSN:m:1:3372944669:6B48BF77E8B1B30BF95665CF4C24373D:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895829:6pOWOAGSN:m:1:3372944669:6B48BF77E8B1B30BF95665CF4C24373D:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895829:6pOWOAGSN:m:1:3372944669:6B48BF77E8B1B30BF95665CF4C24373D:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895829:6pOWOAGSN:m:1:3372944669:6B48BF77E8B1B30BF95665CF4C24373D:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895829:6pOWOAGSN:m:1:3372944669:6B48BF77E8B1B30BF95665CF4C24373D:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895829:6pOWOAGSN:m:1:3372944669:6B48BF77E8B1B30BF95665CF4C24373D:r)

subject: We didn’t think it would happen this quickly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|

---
**🚨 BREAKING GA RUNOFF NEWS 🚨**

Peter, I have some disturbing news.

clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Herschel Walker HQ
subject: New ad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894214:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894214:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894214:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894214:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894214:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894214:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r)**

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894214:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894215:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894216:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894217:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894218:JwFSOAGNf:m:1:3253819041:B2501230ED43D934E679CC9B6387832B:r)

name: National Rifle Association
subject: We’ve made it so far, and we couldn’t have done it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Can you support the NRA on this huge anniversary? | We want this to be memorable. On November 17th, we're celebrating the NRA's 151st birthday.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899166:6xbp0AGVN:m:1:3346849603:B7DEBE003C337418A8BAADD703CCE16F:r)

Peter,

We want this to be memorable.

On November 17th, we're celebrating the NRA's 151st birthday. We can't think of a better time to help spread our pro-Second Amendment message and help move our initiatives forward. That's why we're reaching out to YOU for help.

Everyone knows that the Second Amendment is under siege. Our government's executive branch is determined to tear down your inalienable rights and replace them with big government freedom-restricting regulations that will NOT keep you safe. We can't let that happen.

**In honor of this HUGE 151-year anniversary, we're asking our top supporters like you to chip in $151 to help the NRA keep fighting for your rights.** $151 can go a long way in bolstering our movement. Can you help out?

**[Contribute $151 to proudly stand with the NRA and celebrate our 151st Birthday.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899166:6xbp0AGVN:m:1:3346849603:B7DEBE003C337418A8BAADD703CCE16F:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899166:6xbp0AGVN:m:1:3346849603:B7DEBE003C337418A8BAADD703CCE16F:r)

The government has made a habit of overstepping its bounds in recent years, and we can't let them think they can get away with continuing down that path by confiscating your guns. That would be a total violation of everything our country stands for. **NOW IS YOUR CHANCE TO FIGHT BACK.**

The NRA is the ONLY THING stopping the anti-gun politicians from achieving their goal to BAN guns. Please don't hesitate to step up.

**[Chip in $151 or more TODAY to support the NRA's efforts to protect our Constitutional rights and STAND UP to an overbearing government.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899166:6xbp0AGVN:m:1:3346849603:B7DEBE003C337418A8BAADD703CCE16F:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899166:6xbp0AGVN:m:1:3346849603:B7DEBE003C337418A8BAADD703CCE16F:r)**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Add your name if you support marriage equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
It’s time to codify marriage equality into law. If you agree, add your name:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54722847/379450862/-313238803?refcode=mh-jtk2098-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmQ4OTM4NS04ODY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lJ7lRg5tH9eX_1sxVPMWZiuyLfkdZlfmkZfSu64-elM=&emci=62177da0-fd65-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=92d89385-8866-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=5452893)
---
Hello –

Every American – regardless of gender identity or sexual orientation – deserves to be a full and equal citizen in our democracy.

As State Senator, I was proud to fight alongside LGBTQ+ advocates and make New Hampshire one of the first states in the country to pass marriage equality. While we have made tremendous progress, as a state and as a nation, there is more work to do.

When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ this summer, they indicated that marriage equality could be next. **This is unacceptable.**

**[_It’s time to codify marriage equality into law. clean_body: It’s time to codify marriage equality into law. If you agree, add your name: | | | Hello – Every American – regardless of gender identity or sexual orientation – deserves to be a full and equal citizen in our democracy. As State Senator, I was proud to fight alongside LGBTQ+ advocates and make New Hampshire one of the first states in the country to pass marriage equality. While we have made tremendous progress, as a state and as a nation, there is more work to do. When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade this summer, they indicated that marriage equality could be next. This is unacceptable. | | With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. My friend **Rev. Raphael Warnock** needs your help today, team. I first met Rev. Warnock during his days as a Pastor in Baltimore. He was a force for good in our community from the day I met him, and in the time since, he’s been a mentor and a friend. I was honored to join him as a guest preacher last fall at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54724986/379458903/255983381?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221117warnock_wm_od30da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDQ3N2U3NC04YjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WScmi5AjFATWVnxOcJkd4CHAw1Flgsotx3gYkuuSqo=)

Like me, Rev. Warnock is no political insider or career politician: he’s the son of two Georgia preachers who's committed his life to service, serving as Senior Pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the former pulpit of Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
Today, Rev. Warnock is the sitting U.S. Senator from Georgia who first won this critical seat during a 2020 special election that ended in a runoff. His victory helped Democrats retake the Senate and make historic progress, including passing the American Rescue Plan and Bipartisan Infrastructure Law.
While Rev. Warnock received more votes than his opponent in this November’s election, neither candidate received 50 percent of the vote. Now, after a neck-and-neck race for re-election, he’s going to a runoff yet again this December in order to save his seat and keep making progress for the people.
**Rev. Warnock is in the fight of his life, and it will determine whether or not the Democratic majority will have a 51st vote to continue making progress, or be dragged down by gridlock.**
**[Let’s keep Rev. Warnock working to lift up the people of Georgia and move our country forward: split a contribution between our campaigns today to help him win on December 6!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54724987/379458904/255983381?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221117warnock_wm_od30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDQ3N2U3NC04YjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_WScmi5AjFATWVnxOcJkd4CHAw1Flgsotx3gYkuuSqo=)**

name: Laura Nevitt,  Keystone Progress
subject: It's all thanks to you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://www.kpef.info [https://www.kpef.info]

Dear Friend,

We just want to say THANK YOU to each and every one of you who helped make democracy work last week - from the poll watcher to poll workers to the voters and to those who helped get folks to the polls. We appreciate you and what you did to make November 8th such a success here in Pennsylvania.

You stood up for democracy, kept our votes safe, and made sure every vote was counted. You are my heroes.

Take a bow, take some time to rest, celebrate, and then let’s get back to work. Democracy never sleeps and nor should we.

Laura
Executive Director
Keystone Progress

name: Herschel Walker HQ
subject: This is who Herschel Walker is…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898256:6SWTRAGbN:m:1:3317145305:DAE819AB7F8628E2F449EAF8D2D4F189:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898256:6SWTRAGbN:m:1:3317145305:DAE819AB7F8628E2F449EAF8D2D4F189:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgnla1nmpioolhea69rnbjs4lab25h88p7i7io5o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti6epj2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq39ppicepb1d9mepg74sbkcdin8odgeoq62d9imhq61phmmdp70pj2m9h65c5gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6ptie1j72t5jcko75cj661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu2osoi8d6bdt2rdsrlrbqn154j7h7lrnr83d0lg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti6epj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrrdr3e3sftsmcg2mea04snkmnuunpcriut5fuio_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti6epj2cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmh5nioalfcdv7bv16jpgep7d7kjcieqnd5ko2n8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti6epj2cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Herschel Walker HQ
subject: Need your help to get this out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We launched our first ad of the runoff, but we’re not up on as many stations as we’d like to be.
|
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrk7unomhvsmk3ma32p1lta9817k2t9hkp6r0628_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti6epb3clh2bs)

---
Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj4c0v1uag6uh1psbt8d983rhf47eurr488mu3t0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti6epb3clh2bs)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf1fmeouue3q745hevr81v83oi3s11a1jsulc4c0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti6epb3clh2bs)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuc5c8sniupi54hrrefafpm7h1edsk87redeiub0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti6epb3clh2bs)**

Thanks,

clean_body: We launched our first ad of the runoff, but we’re not up on as many stations as we’d like to be. | Fellow American, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. We’re overjoyed that we held the Senate, and we have you to thank for that. But before you lose interest and move on from the midterm elections, we have two words for you: Joe Manchin. Joe Manchin has been on a two-year power trip since Democrats won the Senate majority in 2020, blocking progress on everything from voting reforms to an expanded child tax credit. It’s time to expand our majority in the Senate and render him powerless. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We’re ready to fight HARD to re-elect a progressive Black champion to the Senate, not give power to another Trump-backed extremist. This runoff could decide EVERYTHING, and we hope you’ll join this fight. Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:
Can you support the NRA on this huge anniversary? | We want this to be memorable. On November 17th, we're celebrating the NRA's 151st birthday.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898940:6DDMgAGpN:m:1:3331421248:E056F3455827997FD97B83F12EA5C02E:r)

Peter,

We want this to be memorable.

On November 17th, we're celebrating the NRA's 151st birthday. We can't think of a better time to help spread our pro-Second Amendment message and help move our initiatives forward. That's why we're reaching out to YOU for help.

Everyone knows that the Second Amendment is under siege. Our government's executive branch is determined to tear down your inalienable rights and replace them with big government freedom-restricting regulations that will NOT keep you safe. We can't let that happen.

**In honor of this HUGE 151-year anniversary, we're asking our top supporters like you to chip in $151 to help the NRA keep fighting for your rights.** $151 can go a long way in bolstering our movement. Can you help out?

**[Contribute $151 to proudly stand with the NRA and celebrate our 151st Birthday.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898940:6DDMgAGpN:m:1:3331421248:E056F3455827997FD97B83F12EA5C02E:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898940:6DDMgAGpN:m:1:3331421248:E056F3455827997FD97B83F12EA5C02E:r)

The government has made a habit of overstepping its bounds in recent years, and we can't let them think they can get away with continuing down that path by confiscating your guns. That would be a total violation of everything our country stands for. **NOW IS YOUR CHANCE TO FIGHT BACK.**

The NRA is the ONLY THING stopping the anti-gun politicians from achieving their goal to BAN guns. Please don't hesitate to step up.

**[Chip in $151 or more TODAY to support the NRA's efforts to protect our Constitutional rights and STAND UP to an overbearing government.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898940:6DDMgAGpN:m:1:3331421248:E056F3455827997FD97B83F12EA5C02E:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

body:

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0jaldllikuc3ftbuke92hdbo5peo4d799cc3lhg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti61o76chh2bs)**_

[**CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zofim2pm6fjj2u3hl3r2b7ee8dgqvnbkinqnmkag_)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0aopn7kvbqf5ntsla00gul9mctvao2jopp1inj8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti61o76chh2bs)**
