The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv4ukhfa83tq2eds6fo7abm6fvh3chq9ekngii7o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti61o76chh2bs)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh6dv37478d0dg1l0699uhtkr8ublp768snlfkp8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti61o76chh2bs)**

subject: Humbly asking you to contribute $3 to stop Trump

body:
When I reported the infamous phone call that led to Donald Trump’s impeachment, I did it because someone had to hold him accountable.
#
Derek -
When I reported the infamous phone call that led to Donald Trump’s impeachment, I did it because someone had to hold him accountable.
Earlier this week he announced he was running for president again, and none of us can be naive enough to think the threat of Trump and his ilk is over just because we defeated him once.
We cannot go backward. Every single one of us has an obligation to make sure that doesn’t happen.
VoteVets stood up for me when no one else would. And not only were they one of the leading organizations in the fight to defeat Trump in 2020, they were one of the largest outside spending organizations holding his enablers accountable in 2022.
That’s why, as a Senior Advisor to VoteVets, I am asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution directly to VoteVets? They will put it right to work making sure Trump never sees the White House again, and that his enablers, including Herschel Walker, are defeated at the ballot box.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov22.YYvGrB&refcode=em221117-1-30&t=1&akid=7168%2E3013755%2EZwS3ou)

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1df50da489d/the-american-dream-7536650?e=659fba240e)
---
| | [ ](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=07b43926f1&e=659fba240e)

| |
# **THANK YOU, AZ-06!**
In the best country in the world where anything is possible, I am now honored to represent my hometown - Arizona's 6th Congressional District - in the United States Congress. I am ready to serve, find solutions for our district’s challenges, & be a strong independent voice for our community. **To our dedicated supporters and volunteers:** _thank you_ for your relentless and tireless efforts to get us across the finish line. No one can run for office by themselves, and this was truly a team effort. **None of this would be possible without my family.** Laura, our kids, my parents, my sisters and entire family — thank you for your unwavering support and encouragement throughout this journey. Doy gracias a Dios por mi familia y por la oportunidad de servir a mi comunidad. **Our country faces many challenges, but I am ready and eager to get to work for Arizona!

THANK YOU** 🇺🇸

Juan
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | THANK YOU, AZ-06! In the best country in the world where anything is possible, I am now honored to represent my hometown - Arizona's 6th Congressional District - in the United States Congress. I am ready to serve, find solutions for our district’s challenges, & be a strong independent voice for our community. To our dedicated supporters and volunteers: thank you for your relentless and tireless efforts to get us across the finish line. No one can run for office by themselves, and this was truly a team effort. None of this would be possible without my family. Laura, our kids, my parents, my sisters and entire family — thank you for your unwavering support and encouragement throughout this journey. Doy gracias a Dios por mi familia y por la oportunidad de servir a mi comunidad. Our country faces many challenges, but I am ready and eager to get to work for Arizona! THANK YOU 🇺🇸 Juan | | | | PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Ciscomani for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Join Derek in supporting the Speak Out Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Nobody who is a victim of workplace abuse should face retaliation when coming forward
Peter,

Nobody who is a victim of workplace abuse should face retaliation - or be ignored - when coming forward to report such abuse. But for too long, survivors of workplace assault and sexual harassment have been silenced with non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) and non-disparagement clauses.

America can and should do better to protect the rights of working people and survivors of workplace harassment and assault. That's why yesterday, Derek proudly helped pass the Speak Out Act through the House.

If, like Derek, you are ready to put an end to workplace assault and harassment and close dangerous loopholes that give perpetrators the opportunity to evade the repercussions of their actions: **[Sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the Speak Out Act today and urge President Biden to sign it into law ASAP.>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/QC3TDns6sU9n9TK1kVQ8ZkQ3IFOto6IL-BFUkPaNwI4=/62MnvrEYGM5M4K96Pq_R-IQZP7RWN3Bh4Cn_SByb0Qs=?ms=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**
[SIGN ON AS A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://act.myngp.com/el/QC3TDns6sU9n9TK1kVQ8ZkQ3IFOto6IL-BFUkPaNwI4=/62MnvrEYGM5M4K96Pq_R-IQZP7RWN3Bh4Cn_SByb0Qs=?ms=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})
Peter, **one-in-three women** report having faced sexual harassment in the workplace, while members of marginalized communities - including low-wage workers, people of color, and LGBTQI+ individuals - are disproportionately impacted by workplace sexual harassment.

**NDAs and non-disparagement clauses silence survivors of sexual assault and harassment and protect perpetrators.**

**Enough is enough.** Derek proudly supported the Speak Out Act to prohibit the enforcement of non-disclosure agreements and non-disparagement clauses in cases of sexual assault and harassment.

**[It's time to empower survivors and ensure they can no longer be silenced. Please add your name and join Derek in calling on President Biden to make the Speak Out Act law without delay.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QC3TDns6sU9n9TK1kVQ8ZkQ3IFOto6IL-BFUkPaNwI4=/62MnvrEYGM5M4K96Pq_R-IQZP7RWN3Bh4Cn_SByb0Qs=?ms=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&refcode=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&source=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&em={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&fn={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&ln={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&pc={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Thank you for your support,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/QC3TDns6sU9n9TK1kVQ8ZkQ3IFOto6IL-BFUkPaNwI4=/b2Ly_EgaHMjP4UpDqr7yu6JEApXkgG8bUcrp9Hm_pNI=?refcode=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221117_speako_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QC3TDns6sU9n9TK1kVQ8ZkQ3IFOto6IL-BFUkPaNwI4=/5Q2eCY9eTLVVnsWOlTJPmbTIQ5dF3x54UsfUfAF3go8=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QC3TDns6sU9n9TK1kVQ8ZkQ3IFOto6IL-BFUkPaNwI4=/R5NtMMYqk15NRa5uyxoe6FZoZ_Eg9Ahu-I8Kde7fjvQ=)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z309h492ljasb6eso8s7152es0rlm7lt84vs3h9o_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti69or7chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmceqj4sr5msoj8stle6prep1lchr66crl61on6d3le9i31p72mpo79ojhc6rj0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6kqj0tj1cpoj5ddgsuobapbi4no)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7k4fep469prgerqb5a1ej628m5av6fudqrqgcm0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti69or7chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6scbvevh9j2jm0eq04f8h4pde8p98cpkrif51co_rp22sh2s8i66or0sti69or7chh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

clean_body: We’re calling for grassroots supporters to activate their Official 2023 DLCC Membership right now: | | | | | State Democrats just claimed massive victories across the country – we held onto some critical majorities, flipped chambers in Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania and protected pro-choice governors’ veto power in Wisconsin and North Carolina. These results are thanks in large part to you. But state Democrats face multiple recounts, runoffs, and special elections every year – unlike the House or Senate where they’re few and far between. Investing in our movement right now will have even more impact in planning for special elections, boosting caucus support, and looking ahead to 2024. Every dollar from our members will go towards building the infrastructure needed to propel state Democrats to victory now, in 2023, and beyond – which means there’s not a second to waste. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks for being a part of this team, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Sen. Ron Johnson
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
| | After a tough race, we got Ron Johnson over the finish line. ** ** No matter how much the Left outraised and outspent him, no matter how many baseless attack ads they launched against him, it didn’t matter to the people of Wisconsin.**
**
---
|
---
| | The people of Wisconsin know that Sen. Johnson is fighting for them, which is why they rallied together to get him reelected in one of the toughest elections in the country. ** ** Before Ron Johnson began serving in the Senate, he spent more than 30 years creating jobs and solving problems. He learned the value of hard work at an early age. Before he got his first tax-paying job as a dishwasher at 15, he mowed lawns, shoveled snow, delivered papers, and caddied for a few extra bucks. ** ** After high school, he got his accounting degree. Then, he started working on his MBA and started a business with his brother-in-law.** ** Ron’s experiences fueled his passion for growing our economy, creating jobs, and slashing reckless spending. ** ** He’s a conservative warrior who won’t back down from a fight. Whether it’s the economy, national security, or punching back on the Left’s hypocrisy, Ron will always stand up for America. ** ** We are lucky to have him in our corner and I can’t wait to see what he does in his next term. ** ** My very best,
---
---
Nikki Haley
---
|
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=e0fd84fa3ab04465a5404f878256e1b5&_e=Ora3e6AgTTcbBbPAh-a_QZ8rZFt7Zzs_0kO651-kLlk8LLkAl_dqORIrkf3xSW3kTl3m1ms31k6Nq1tjHUUCL3Pu67UhzMkNdpa6tp2fyJLCy3as95Gg5ZYD3hOglCAQ-3U8S2iOdA3fgunudyhC-rfQDyw8k2OAnNKOfIt_qXRLqbd6X5HnKHFCcapUvL9tI-GB0_z5Grp7_X23H9ROBGDEwCVgZjUBsblP7bQcZgZ3OhVihlf2DZg9m3UIOUmXo4bR7Em8mDZWDwLs_Eou3aMjiNUoOGX_pYIbn_SebMGgnIRyQT0UTugN0PbEjNPk-0yt6c06cohMk2IBE01wJMUJLlGll_thmvV6oLGQGL2ajjHyU97wJ4UY78pLSe1C)

clean_body: | | | Friend, | | After a tough race, we got Ron Johnson over the finish line. No matter how much the Left outraised and outspent him, no matter how many baseless attack ads they launched against him, it didn’t matter to the people of Wisconsin. | | | The people of Wisconsin know that Sen. Johnson is fighting for them, which is why they rallied together to get him reelected in one of the toughest elections in the country. Before Ron Johnson began serving in the Senate, he spent more than 30 years creating jobs and solving problems. He learned the value of hard work at an early age. Before he got his first tax-paying job as a dishwasher at 15, he mowed lawns, shoveled snow, delivered papers, and caddied for a few extra bucks. After high school, he got his accounting degree. Then, he started working on his MBA and started a business with his brother-in-law. Ron’s experiences fueled his passion for growing our economy, creating jobs, and slashing reckless spending. He’s a conservative warrior who won’t back down from a fight. Whether it’s the economy, national security, or punching back on the Left’s hypocrisy, Ron will always stand up for America. We are lucky to have him in our corner and I can’t wait to see what he does in his next term. My very best, Nikki Haley | Special Message from Nikki Haley: I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms. This work is far from over. | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: that’s how much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **$10** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today.

Your $10 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.

Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than 30 days until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $10 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please: Will you split $10 now between me and Voter Protection Project to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?** **Here's a special link just for you:[https://act.protectvoting.org/go/elect-Warnock](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34863?t=6&akid=5399%2E878179%2EmkKf__)** Thank you for pitching in. I truly appreciate your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5399%2E878179%2EmkKf__). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5399%2E878179%2EmkKf__).**

name: Troy Newman
subject: Planned Parenthood is trying to destroy me
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| | Fellow Pro-Life American, Planned Parenthood has gone after me for years, and it's nearly cost me everything. This all started in 2016 after I, along with some fellow pro-lifers, exposed Planned Parenthood by producing the now infamous videos showing their directors bargaining over the illegal sale of baby body parts. **After our explosive findings proved that Planned Parenthood is exactly who we've always claimed they are -- bloodthirsty murderers who revel in the death of babies -- the Abortion Cartel went after us harder than ever before.** Despite never denying that our videos showed their high-level employees negotiating the sale of baby body parts, Planned Parenthood sued our group of pro-lifers for millions of dollars. [**I refuse to let the Abortion Cartel win this fight. Will you pledge a generous donation of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more, right now so Operation Rescue and I can continue to expose their evil for all the world to see?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-BEycK7-Iy_LoOr3IGUlw)
---
[ Fight against the Abortion Cartel](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._7_IFw)
---
The truth is, I don't really think this legal battle is anything more than Planned Parenthood trying to make an example out of me. The Abortion Cartel wants nothing more than to scare pro-lifers into being silent and docile. **_Well, I refuse to go quietly into the night!_** I don't fight day-in and day-out to make a ton of money or get invited to some fancy cocktail party. I have dedicated my life to protecting God's children, both the mothers who are lied to and tricked into killing their own children, and the babies themselves. I'll be damned if I let some genocidal maniacs from Planned Parenthood, or any other abortion practitioners, sway me from this path. [**I desperately need your support more now than ever. Will you please pledge your most generous donation of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more, to Operation Rescue so we can continue to expose Planned Parenthood and the rest of the Abortion Cartel and save lives?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-X-Sv4oQ5-igxH_BZZBqw) The fight to make America fully and forever Abortion free rests with all of us. God Bless you, and never stop fighting for the unborn!
---
Troy Newman President Operation Rescue
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-wFQsMjzRXkZJ9p08AA)
---

Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado’s 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes — 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it’s all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z837621c8umt9de1crii373smnn4p4un09sb9q9g_rp22sh2s8i66or0sth68pb2c5h2bs)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert’s opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvhigdk9cd9bmr7q0n4tpkfbgnev7hsvqnicba88_rp22sh2s8i66or0sth68pb2c5h2bs)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z85cbko8qblkb0tqrf3f0dfp8t9rt1bfp0nga7qo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sth68pb2c5h2bs)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---

|
---

---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.

name: Pete Maysmith, LCV Victory Fund
subject: Georgia run-off: serious gaps in turnout effort -- this is urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www
body:
(TIME SENSITIVE)? ? ? ? ? 3X MATCH ACTIVE: Help us defeat Big Oil this November >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Peter ? this is bad ? really bad. We've just received word that a major right-wing Super PAC has dropped $5 million into the Arizona Senate race, where Senator Mark Kelly is up against venture capital executive Blake Masters.

Mark Kelly is an environmental champion who just helped secure the most significant climate investment in history. Blake Masters is a climate change denier who's backed by white supremacists.

This move follows a poll that puts the race within two points. Masters' political backers see a window to swing this Senate race, and they've jumped on it. What's more: the same Super PAC has spent millions on the Senate race in Georgia for Herschel Walker to defeat Senator Raphael Warnock.

Peter: Bottom line, we need your help. Environmental field operations are still underfunded, and a group of donors has put together an emergency match fund to triple every contribution. We have to move now or we could lose these races.

Your support is needed to secure important wins from climate candidates in November. TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT when you make a gift of any amount ? even $5 makes a difference >>> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/L6b_

We have a goal to knock on 161,875 doors in Arizona, and a total of 1.17 million doors in critical swing states including Nevada, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. And we have digital ads running in support of dozens of pro-environmental candidates, which we'll continue leading up to the election.

Study after study shows that speaking with voters through field organizing is the best way to connect with voters about where candidates stand on critical issues ? and get them to turn out on Election Day.

We're scaling up on-the-ground canvassing operations, getting folks to sign commit-to-vote cards, and helping them sign up to vote by mail. And we're encouraging voters to commit to reminding three friends or family members to vote, a tactic called "Vote Tripling."

We're looking for fellow environmentalists like you, Peter, to help us continue our canvassing efforts and get pro-climate candidates elected in November. Can you chip in?

Every single vote counts. Please, pitch in ? ANY amount can really make a difference right now, even if it's just $5. This could be the difference between ensuring an environmental majority or setting us back indefinitely >> https://links.messages.lcv.

Help defeat Blake Masters and the other Big Oil candidates running this election cycle. Our future depends on it.

Onward,

Pete Maysmith
Senior VP of Campaigns
LCV Victory Fund

name: Herschel Walker HQ
subject: Need your help to get this out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61894219:6de4N1GKN:m:1:3369487795:1E0113B0EE23AFA7C465EE31BC383A53:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

name: American Firearms Association
subject: Only Hunter Biden will be a gunowner
body:
The Red Wave didn't happen... Now our 2A rights are in jeopardy.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "Headline") Peter: Guess what? The Red Wave didn't happen. Now, our Second Amendment rights are in jeopardy. Biden has spent the past several months calling for more erosions of our Constitutional rights, including passing the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban." And with the poor showing on Election Day, we could see the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" become law! Let me tell you, neither Kevin McCarthy nor the conservative stalwarts in Congress will be able to stop this so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" unless you step up and help us fight back TODAY! **[We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from
being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?")** Here at the American Firearms Association, we are working around the clock to rally opposition against Biden's increasing efforts to take away your guns. We've got to mobilize now and get Senators and Members of Congress to commit to the Second Amendment and state their clear opposition to Biden's gun grab. But that means increasing the pressure on them. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "Headline")**Because if you sit and do nothing, the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" will be the least of your concerns.** **National Gun Registration.** **Ammo Bans.** **Magazine Bans.** **National Red Flag Gun Confiscation.** **Forcing you to give the code to your gun safe to Federal Agents.** **[Even the complete seizure of the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "Even the complete seizure of the guns you
own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!")** If you value defending your family from criminals, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "donate today.")** If you value owning as many guns as you damn well please, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "donate today.")** If you don't want Brandon to freely decide what guns you're allowed to keep in your home, then **[donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "donate today.")** **[Whatever you can chip in, whether it's $100, $500, or $1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "Whatever you can chip in, whether it’s $100, $500, or
$1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!")** We're working around the clock to make sure Pelosi and Schumer don't sneak in their gun-grabbing legislation through the lame-duck session before year-end. That means we need all the help to ensure we keep our Second Amendment intact. Otherwise, only Hunter Biden will be allowed to "legally" own a gun. Don't delay. Every day wasted is a day closer to Biden shredding your right to bear arms! **[Save the Second Amendment today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "Save the Second Amendment today!")** For America,

Chris Dorr
President, American Firearms Association | | [PROTECT THE 2A!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61896839:6akNQ1G2N:m:1:3253819041:B44A4D74D459A12E189E074A08BC309E:r "PROTECT THE 2A!")
---

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q_7ILTqTgAkQMY8mDxTvPl4SN5yPPpUGrZfkz06n6kOYkqvylakWSAdXm_Gazpgl8N54Y0s9qXqzjDNXbxYSu9V7hMwFB5gQgu_QwWW7fxH8vVdafQ4udp4moqy405BuyeVfuhzv5MHwHF3KWEKrW4VOTJlBqyQDE-xdJ6YSRKBtN7gwwzY5cq37tvjFtkUuKA/3r8/JS4wdPwRQTKzPjP3KwEq-g/h0/bDC8KnLySJuSuXUCZRYgOSSChBdk8RuFqO3R6EeVIGo)
Peter, Yesterday, the Respect for Marriage Act came one step closer to law by overcoming the filibuster in the Senate. Twelve Republicans joined every Democrat in voting to advance it. This is a major step forward to protect LGBT families in case the Supreme Court reverses itself, and speaks to how much progress has been made that so many Republicans joined Democrats to pass it. Sinema deserves credit for shepherding this important bill. But here’s the thing: our fundamental rights shouldn’t be determined by what can or cannot overcome a Republican filibuster. The Supreme Court has already gutted the Voting Rights Act and overturned Roe v Wade. Yet, the Senate has been unable to advance voting rights or abortion rights legislation BECAUSE of the filibuster. And Sinema doesn’t seem to care that the clock is ticking on the window to take action. In January, Republicans will be in charge of the House of Representatives, and they won’t pass *any* legislation to protect our rights. In a floor speech yesterday, Sinema again made her disingenuous arguments on bipartisanship and requiring supermajorities to pass legislation. She seemed to say that bipartisanship for bipartisanship’s sake is more important than protecting fundamental rights. She even blamed “both sides of the aisle” for exploiting fear after the Supreme Court overturned abortion rights! Kyrsten Sinema has learned absolutely nothing from the last two years. That’s why we need to replace her with a real Democrat who understands our fundamental rights are more important than the filibuster. [**Chip in so we can start prepping for a 2024 primary challenger for Sinema NOW >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSvBCyFrFZvyRmkQw588rszA_u49ImM4rQIARfSp73WU19lcFdL_LN5TMmfnSJ1reLd_oUN_oPxRw8HS18xds91KXN-P7JFJup2Y4fUSpkOv554z1hXr7IqU72befjiIr64_S20RtqHAzstbENrjFFHhs10UKGtoYKQ6b-QSyX5M3GUpD67nG2U03Z1msTExIh99C0ihdIdNiy-yKP_D0P36dNTpXqZMrUjTivXo9AN6Ss0pTT-yloN9kV5lzKA6Ybd61avuKgruxVwhnzjD0qig/3r8/JS4wdPwRQTKzPjP3KwEq-g/h1/cHOAJtKA0HW28PLueEIAXIH7GoWPgi7jhFTbUDODPB0) [DONATE $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSvBCyFrFZvyRmkQw588rszA264rawyDz1B2mYvpNV9Z5VVz0VhlWGYEiK_xp5MGB6tBMOcmv6cdG-q2QQyO4442Pq3g6LBmC8HC2eLjSTIwS7xEwvj4FmtK-AGasys2FZe7CXlpeIFmekp-TeMOmKzhcGZrfLrEwsb4zw2Sk52rgNXBO2iNGQPuXQTlUfRQSHDPfCRDoYzjNZEZiXVR6ZH4LpLoEMYJESrlK5LY073Mjhn_mRPL45615xYEDR51chsla35uc4oSlwH9P5hWsDzg/3r8/JS4wdPwRQTKzPjP3KwEq-g/h2/RMOYLHJLvNl_YChseuUkvvERM0VbdjF3ilI5rBvt0Sg)[DONATE $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSvBCyFrFZvyRmkQw588rszOWwcjsRJrUv73DhpEmK-b0pDhognPFu0qvfLnM2_r_1oTeaVBZpmMh7OQnhVDsgOHk_HVRwpyxVx3-i__KusZKm4rCxjTpJtGPNLK6xr0j7filnsNg0GgrTKcp9ohLghQ27OvsWJ-cesPvVGM3uxw9V3AEiTiE0hdRlSTSzRyF-u7yiSU_9onWCDscx9wF6mJgT5U4-tXBgvdQnhD-G1ApFWnbyXRxw4NknZEJ0mbAQx2T-YDKNGrXyHh1o2rqm1A/3r8/JS4wdPwRQTKzPjP3KwEq-g/h3/ke9AyQ7xDiCKfgMifwV4PJQiCgTjzIh8Yie7RXqffoE)[DONATE $15](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSvBCyFrFZvyRmkQw588rszFJmS9Wf2LFXRRSFMcPq6TrvB3IwmQgzbjPi0uUXR2SoSzmLxJeqhgOWKbNop5oMNyIeek5VCFXVpsI0CmhtbVhNa_F-lXILLeqy3mk7RaLc7v4CvXoIaNaYgLeyUxsaCLqIMhTvr1dHFwJhuU2iYMylJJ81RtyWR74GSHtWGjtZYP-80now8HWI2ymquOee7LYd3FICxBGt-awgtqQqvE2q75pZpjgUuePU88UK9iGnb4n4RDGxZHjuo2htY-LXFw/3r8/JS4wdPwRQTKzPjP3KwEq-g/h4/B8GFK0nfshhbYf1ets1Yzfv-e_eVZXc2VLplnwvuSUY) The clock is ticking. body:
This is urgent: Donald Trump just announced
he’s running for president in 2024.

We MUST send a clear message this December that battleground Georgia will
NOT be reclaimed by Trump and the GOP—and that starts with defeating
Trump’s handpicked Senate candidate, Herschel Walker: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31661?t=1008&amount=32&akid=6457%2E3611125%2EL0K3Kx ]So please, at
this critical moment, will you split $32 or more now between Rev. Warnock
and Tim Ryan to keep Georgia blue?

Trump knows that Democrats’ strength in Georgia in 2020 cost him the White
House and delivered the Senate for Democrats. That’s why he’s
laser-focused on this state and our toss-up Senate race—already holding
multiple rallies and megadonor fundraisers with Walker to flip this seat.

Now, Trump just strategically launched his presidential campaign right
before the runoff to mobilize the GOP base, try to swing the momentum in
Walker’s favor, and turn Georgia red.

We can fight back and win, but only with an immediate surge of grassroots
energy of our own. GOP donors are pouring more than $37 MILLION into
Walker’s campaign to defeat us and pave the way for Trump—and now, this
race is neck and neck. We set a rapid-response goal to raise $1 million by
midnight tonight so we can fight back and pull ahead—but right now, we’re
dangerously short.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31661?t=1009&amount=32&akid=6457%2E3611125%2EL0K3Kx ]So please, will you split $32 between Tim and Rev. Warnock before
midnight to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

Hi friend – yeah, you, friend! I would like to personally say thank you.
Thank you for your support last year that allowed this people-powered movement to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate.
Thank you for your support as I work to better the lives of Georgians and Americans by fighting for our shared values and progress in the Senate.

Thank you for fighting by my side as we face yet another battleground race to defend this Senate seat. Your support _is_ making a difference.
But with this race headed to a runoff election, I'm counting on your continued support more than ever to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue.

**[So here's what I must ask: Before midnight tonight, can you chip in $5 – or whatever you can spare in this moment – to ensure we have the resources to win in Georgia? With our bold agenda on the line, I'm counting on your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54740131/379486298/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5119-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWY5ZWFmYi05OTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cHhDmbsRMKS5gIylapcC6gYLi6VUOwQplw17JSKg2DA=)**

Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition to your member of Congress: Say NO to higher drug prices
body:
Congress can fix this
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T025d11ba-b1b5-483f-b2cd-de56f7a170a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Peter_ _ - _ **[Sign the petition to your member of Congress: Say NO to higher drug prices](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40bc24df-43ec-4181-90e6-fd0ad7958e08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** High drug costs have been a serious issue for decades, but Big Pharma has always stood in the way. Until now. **For the first time in history, provisions in the Inflation Reduction Act will empower Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices and cap annual drug expenses for seniors**. These reforms are some of the Inflation Reduction Act’s most popular provisions, with [71% support](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6393ebd9-18df-4ae3-ba38-4dc5725e303f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). But instead of supporting policies Americans want, some Republicans in Congress are putting Big Pharma and special interests ahead of working families by [blocking a $35 insulin co-pay bill](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ff69cd3-ae1a-4148-bdc8-8c1be7ba35f7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) from inclusion in the Inflation Reduction Act, and [introducing a new bill to end ALL the lower drug pricing provisions](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf97fed12-84f8-4d1b-b3c2-21ec95bc2004/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). It’s no secret that some members of the GOP have always stood by Big Pharma--it’s one of the reasons the effort to lower drug costs has taken so long. But sponsoring a bill to revert popular reforms and allow Big Pharma to continue price gouging is extreme and out of touch with working families across the country. Americans are tired of Big Pharma’s skyrocketing prices for life-saving medications.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7367f88b-5871-4efb-b694-0c4bd50f6855/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| The Inflation Reduction Act is a good start. But there is still more to do to lower drug prices, and Congress will have a chance to work on insulin reform later this year. They need to hear from you. **[Sign the petition to your member of Congress: Americans want Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices, and every American deserves a $35 insulin co-pay.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94f2ac9e-a3e9-4925-a761-eee03989a898/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks for all you do, Cliff
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —

Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eba408a374b482e83407f9c62056c49&_e=FMC2E72CgMX8hSX2kKOV4IS0aMEyYK06KENmQmBxG7FC3AZjMxeChodsChmdVsHevX4WEK7bYHHVJ_WZZDFLYQwjlO1AaK7YNN0cF60cZATzjWxiryNqcTi3nRCZrdtwznhNOb7KY4XGu6L4lmYxz8IE2-Sn7rH8c3UHffE7Tbx6Zwiq41V1GKVl8lnOgIVegJABMvPCES9qPJdjcse1i0Ionk38jtk-QGCGaXr7Q8KCTPLpGPh5ntGwTiIBNGdV5OP8Uog2tCE64lqHwFJT7-5IGT7mMXvu9YH6A_eO65dmzTR78iGkax39vqA1beh6cdlXLzLJUQ4P54IOcbRwIwRGyDT0Efl4hcM_tqtTgLnm6pmfQ3VfbmTJno6oArBohVCn6KFuAPrqJKRFaRtFknz_TO5ZeVoYeXOdUg550-vXWhuH99-HWAdZDvVH8Jfm_Vk3FJptwnbqf_jkbC-n6A%3D%3D)

Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eba408a374b482e83407f9c62056c49&_e=FMC2E72CgMX8hSX2kKOV4IS0aMEyYK06KENmQmBxG7FC3AZjMxeChodsChmdVsHevX4WEK7bYHHVJ_WZZDFLYQwjlO1AaK7YNN0cF60cZATzjWxiryNqcTi3nRCZrdtwznhNOb7KY4XGu6L4lmYxz8IE2-Sn7rH8c3UHffE7Tbx6Zwiq41V1GKVl8lnOgIVegJABMvPCES9qPJdjcse1i0Ionk38jtk-QGCGaXr7Q8KCTPLpGPh5ntGwTiIBNGdV5OP8Uog2tCE64lqHwFJT7-5IGT7mMXvu9YH6A_eO65dmzTR78iGkax39vqA1beh6n4tZthMDJHvc9PmdgzHyLTXyZrMosdAs9v5WIdhctEXrxLqa94qfHg9n5ELg8I8avZsYzqQxsB--AafiLSn8S0JWxC-pKQx82XMtdvFvf-4lhAkiQXbIBRx_NyfOqNcFoJhVUsYTyfgPRlwA0yQDIQ%3D%3D)**

subject: Florida is RED!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter,
---
After last week’s elections, it’s official: **Florida is a RED STATE!**

I went on Fox News to discuss Florida’s conservative future, and I’m so excited to get to represent the great people of the Sunshine State for another two years.
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=2c1dbefbe0ec45db88818a4798019f5c&_e=5mzUURdvQgDcvP_gPIGfNekElNCO5UBgqguzno13MaGBsw6DPIF0Va38CXkr33PGMqcOoLmeiJ2y4XTHQGmQYxxsK7SgzoK4wBvgwlJih0JBtSg7rWXnL-DkUBHZMhYgzXI8WmiQGEmMaqzAGse-lDvkfdDc0LILc6NK5S2rC7wyqyHKBoXvmAo7c2sGK8V8KmdENM23J8yLj5Q_Cv8SPFmiCXJK1QG7vBfrGsq6HjY1EjJEbf_OIAk7sClMgHcVUPpEvxhm7BipapYWwdOKePfOrDUgORthilYLPEClfFBolwuACTvbn8JxMIKibvssdG_TC-_ZQ8GInkM4NR9DGA%3D%3D)

But we can’t take this momentum for granted, Peter.

It’s up to us to KEEP FLORIDA RED, and we can’t do that without every patriot on our team.
[**Pitch in now to KEEP FLORIDA RED and make sure the Sunshine State is the FREEST STATE IN AMERICA!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=2c1dbefbe0ec45db88818a4798019f5c&_e=5mzUURdvQgDcvP_gPIGfNekElNCO5UBgqguzno13MaGBsw6DPIF0Va38CXkr33PGMqcOoLmeiJ2y4XTHQGmQYxxsK7SgzoK4wBvgwlJih0JBtSg7rWXnL-DkUBHZMhYgzXI8WmiQGEmMaqzAGse-lDvkfdDc0LILc6NK5S2rC7wyqyHKBoXvmAo7c2sGK8V8fTVwv75RrtGwj_uSNjvu3sYHM5ixhlSkaQAzCt5fQApsO_8gojFWAlVmdJm_X0mJkZNNx7FNIjOdMZcfbevdQ2TZpKM_8e4t02wmnL6UCoSt9JzDWqD7mggURh2Ms2JHi4ggivIENK07zb_QqQZvXg%3D%3D)

Peter,

We want this to be memorable.

On November 17th, we're celebrating the NRA's 151st birthday. We can't think of a better time to help spread our pro-Second Amendment message and help move our initiatives forward. That's why we're reaching out to YOU for help.

Everyone knows that the Second Amendment is under siege. Our government's executive branch is determined to tear down your inalienable rights and replace them with big government freedom-restricting regulations that will NOT keep you safe. We can't let that happen.

**In honor of this HUGE 151-year anniversary, we're asking our top supporters like you to chip in $151 to help the NRA keep fighting for your rights.** $151 can go a long way in bolstering our movement. Can you help out?

**[Contribute $151 to proudly stand with the NRA and celebrate our 151st Birthday.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898862:JkwTs1GNr:m:1:3317145305:CD57B17B5BE62611A8CE0FBF6BC3D1B8:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898862:JkwTs1GNr:m:1:3317145305:CD57B17B5BE62611A8CE0FBF6BC3D1B8:r)

The government has made a habit of overstepping its bounds in recent years, and we can't let them think they can get away with continuing down that path by confiscating your guns. That would be a total violation of everything our country stands for. **NOW IS YOUR CHANCE TO FIGHT BACK.**

The NRA is the ONLY THING stopping the anti-gun politicians from achieving their goal to BAN guns. Please don't hesitate to step up.

**[Chip in $151 or more TODAY to support the NRA's efforts to protect our Constitutional rights and STAND UP to an overbearing government.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61898862:JkwTs1GNr:m:1:3317145305:CD57B17B5BE62611A8CE0FBF6BC3D1B8:r)**

The National Rifle Association

Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are on the brink of building a **_51-seat majority_** in the Senate.

body:
Fellow Patriots, The holiday season is upon us and GA2A, Georgia’s leading gun rights organization, is proud to announce our Silent Night Raffle feat
| |
---
[](http://newsletter.ga2a.org/c/440528?id=343900.392.1.e3a99397937a80b01b558211946bbd3c) |
---
Fellow Patriots, The holiday season is upon us and [GA2A](http://newsletter.ga2a.org/c/440528?id=343900.393.1.f97aa76ef228cff9aa764b8dfaa357ac), Georgia’s leading gun rights organization, is proud to announce our Silent Night Raffle featuring The Ultimate Rifle and Suppressor Package from Daniel Defense. Looking for something to put under your Christmas tree? This package includes a Daniel Defense DD4 RIII Rifle (5.56mm NATO), Daniel SoundGuard SG-556 suppressor, Daniel Defense Bulk AR-15 12 Pack, and Daniel Defense Tactical Range Bag.
---
|
---
[Tickets](http://newsletter.ga2a.org/c/440528?id=343900.394.1.119f0c841fbec4a461555f6e1eb76937) for this incredible raffle, valued at over $3400, are $25 each or 5 for $100. All proceeds benefit GA2A and fund our fight to protect the 2nd Amendment in Georgia. Click [HERE](http://newsletter.ga2a.org/c/440528?id=343900.395.1.b08e00bccc4bf8f336169a27a48bf34f) or visit [www.GA2A.org/SilentNight](http://newsletter.ga2a.org/c/440528?id=343900.396.1.4a949842b7135b20223673825e07126f) to participate! Executive Director
GA2A

**100 Wins: A Note from 1776 Project PAC Founder Ryan Girdusky**
When I began the 1776 Project PAC in May 2021, I honestly wasn't sure if anyone would care about school board elections. I was wrong, and this organization has been the biggest accomplishment of my life. I'm proud to have gained respect from thousands of voters in key districts in such a short time. This organization has enabled me to meet so many incredible people from all over the country who are volunteering, running for school board, and donating to make sure that every student can get a quality education without woke curriculums. By working together, we are making a difference.
Since starting the PAC I am happy to share we have a 60 percent win rate, helping 102 candidates win their elections in New Jersey, Ohio, Virginia, Minnesota, Kansas, Colorado, Pennsylvania, Texas, Florida, Arkansas, Maryland, Oklahoma, and Michigan.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/31f556e5-59b3-4e48-8c43-7dddb13bb700?r=1hvr60)|
---|---|---
[Donate to 1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/2642c715-f250-41ba-9581-8917b5d5d3be?r=1hvr60)
A year after our first school board wins, we're seeing policy changes being done at local school boards with candidates we supported:
Last year, our PAC flipped three seats on the Lansing School Board in Leavenworth County, Kansas. In 2022, they passed the Parent's Bill of Rights on a 4-3 vote, cementing the right parents have to play a central role in a child's education.
In Texas we supported two candidates for the Frisco Independent School District board which went on to successfully change its rules to require students to use bathrooms and changing rooms that align with the gender assigned at birth.
Blue Valley, Kansas school boards were successfully able to stop the progressive members from asking pronouns and dropping the SEL survey next year.
Conservative groups across the country are continuing to move the ball forward. Conservative candidates also saw sweeping election victories in Kansas, New Jersey, and Arizona last week and we plan on being involved with more grassroots parent organization going into 2023.
Our work isn't done. Looking ahead, 29 states have school board elections including in many critical swing states. In April we'll be involved in school board elections in Alaska, Illinois, Oklahoma, and Wisconsin. The following month has elections in Nebraska, Texas, and Oregon with Missouri school board elections in May. [Follow us on Twitter](https://substack.com/redirect/66c4812f-8455-4ff0-8fc3-4416487b1def?r=1hvr60) to ensure you're staying up to date with the latest endorsements and school board news.

|
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee64755872514e3c9c5b59d631f9262a&_e=QA8wb3rh34jT7_DZ88oxZ0qxoUqAOhVMa_rojFWDbBBH0sBrsHUhLaf6JJ93zpi_qyRlohBQl2K8dV1SATSwjpU8h1b8kObL0AALG3X_6eC96IHoQ_VuU1o5k3xOOOWCjpY4K-O5_NhiJGqxPXjIqSDC_l7tARjyYV4KEimh7WVQOzf9cE_XEc9fb3jhsxhye37Qu4FDSDVSyoAeG3uj_gTUZnqHvtp7WFl8p3CNKCYAeJSmaLvYmjVVkGGUGUV3UnTzvmYe_A2lajAbHT1uvndBBzPcNy3YS91EMjPd_85-JSnijk0dz2rt3yWh1pP5QYBT2BfljQNiem8TtHHgi_LLeH4P0N9ujMYt3H4Js5umKExHz0x0A6haUtYXhn47pmov1SfxPIsMTzA73kojiWekheape7_fnu2mFWi2nekths_eCm_cgUEOLXEF-unwdvn7Se4fgQfGBorH9kg3yYkIc_Ej4hrdbpLRtqgka-CNV_lc8v8RG3QvsFfuoN76)

Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee64755872514e3c9c5b59d631f9262a&_e=QA8wb3rh34jT7_DZ88oxZ0qxoUqAOhVMa_rojFWDbBBH0sBrsHUhLaf6JJ93zpi_qyRlohBQl2K8dV1SATSwjpU8h1b8kObL0AALG3X_6eC96IHoQ_VuU1o5k3xOOOWCjpY4K-O5_NhiJGqxPXjIqSDC_l7tARjyYV4KEimh7WVQOzf9cE_XEc9fb3jhsxhye37Qu4FDSDVSyoAeG3uj_gTUZnqHvtp7WFl8p3CNKCYAeJSmaLvYmjVVkGGUGUV3UnTzvmYe_A2lajAbHT1uvndBBzPcNy3YS91EMjPd_85-JSnijk0dz2rt3yWh1pP5QYBT2BfljQNiem8TtHHgi_LLeH4P0N9ujMYt3H4Js5sE02TeqkELIbNAJyuwFZ7x4OSuXSRFJRq6qBfaZS9GBWR9uV65U__yJxycxbTBBkVJOKvMC5bLsBkB1GfUi4DmOBmWuFcaQNUqVklHhluH8Omq2e-bfQaSDawS_Xnn59lg5LwIygOhaaTnnuhVDaiu)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee64755872514e3c9c5b59d631f9262a&_e=QA8wb3rh34jT7_DZ88oxZ0qxoUqAOhVMa_rojFWDbBBH0sBrsHUhLaf6JJ93zpi_qyRlohBQl2K8dV1SATSwjpU8h1b8kObL0AALG3X_6eC96IHoQ_VuU1o5k3xOOOWCjpY4K-O5_NhiJGqxPXjIqSDC_l7tARjyYV4KEimh7WVQOzf9cE_XEc9fb3jhsxhye37Qu4FDSDVSyoAeG3uj_gTUZnqHvtp7WFl8p3CNKCYAeJSmaLvYmjVVkGGUGUV3UnTzvmYe_A2lajAbHT1uvndBBzPcNy3YS91EMjPd_85-JSnijk0dz2rt3yWh1pP5QYBT2BfljQNiem8TtHHgi_LLeH4P0N9ujMYt3H4Js5v_yIOw7ddAuVjjXORSITX1sDAit95KvMQjbiYJLFRt7ruWmBuRSscytCjMTO13_WqZbAtWRFEQK94-i1aF4pEwnFkEN8i2zv517sZe026mHyGesGCab1yPcWaCk4DnojN5CfgJGbUX3fMJl-2sbjDF)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee64755872514e3c9c5b59d631f9262a&_e=QA8wb3rh34jT7_DZ88oxZ0qxoUqAOhVMa_rojFWDbBBH0sBrsHUhLaf6JJ93zpi_qyRlohBQl2K8dV1SATSwjpU8h1b8kObL0AALG3X_6eC96IHoQ_VuU1o5k3xOOOWCjpY4K-O5_NhiJGqxPXjIqSDC_l7tARjyYV4KEimh7WVQOzf9cE_XEc9fb3jhsxhye37Qu4FDSDVSyoAeG3uj_gTUZnqHvtp7WFl8p3CNKCYAeJSmaLvYmjVVkGGUGUV3UnTzvmYe_A2lajAbHT1uvndBBzPcNy3YS91EMjPd_85-JSnijk0dz2rt3yWh1pP5QYBT2BfljQNiem8TtHHgi_LLeH4P0N9ujMYt3H4Js5sDloM4yWgceVkiJBweTqUQKSWjFf06BxMYqGq7QRY5FSzieNfLG08IujZQ71X8qlGCtKyZu3fh-LoFRplGZxDoatmAMIfWUfN9yYgWTuBvJbsb5eufdoIenbTCs3RoNfR9DEE5cBU1gp6R7AQKMBXh)**

[TeamHerschel.com](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee64755872514e3c9c5b59d631f9262a&_e=QA8wb3rh34jT7_DZ88oxZ0qxoUqAOhVMa_rojFWDbBBH0sBrsHUhLaf6JJ93zpi_qyRlohBQl2K8dV1SATSwjpU8h1b8kObL0AALG3X_6eC96IHoQ_VuU1o5k3xOOOWCjpY4K-O5_NhiJGqxPXjIqSDC_l7tARjyYV4KEimh7WVQOzf9cE_XEc9fb3jhsxhye37Qu4FDSDVSyoAeG3uj_gTUZnqHvtp7WFl8p3CNKCYAeJSmaLvYmjVVkGGUGUV3UnTzvmYe_A2lajAbHT1uvndBBzPcNy3YS91EMjPd_85-JSnijk0dz2rt3yWh1pP5QYBT2BfljQNiem8TtHHgi_LLeH4P0N9ujMYt3H4Js5vjMids65z9zcorK1Pey2K5RYoo3MuVDQC4t6RxJT4Q_XjRHa24ZlK-I6qmjcY0_BMYDJM8tET3XraseaYcEMswZCn0HuxTcJOmYvG0KlxStz4mrYrbm6r8Qi22-ZJ5DZj1bDXnR9wL4_quiyU9ZtOY)

clean_body: We launched our first ad of the runoff, but we’re not up on as many stations as we’d like to be. | Fellow American, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen Action
subject: [WATCH] How we can kill the Willow project
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
This blew our minds 🤯
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&t=2&akid=13120%2E53494%2Er1ZeAs) Friend, [_**My colleague Hannah called me up the other day with some questions about the Willow project—and the answers blew her mind. Watch our conversation, then sign our petition calling on President Biden and the Bureau of Land Management to reject this project!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&t=3&akid=13120%2E53494%2Er1ZeAs) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&t=4&akid=13120%2E53494%2Er1ZeAs) | [WATCH THE VIDEO](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&t=5&akid=13120%2E53494%2Er1ZeAs)
---
Willow is ConocoPhillips' pet project—a plan to lock us into three decades of destructive drilling in sensitive Arctic ecosystems near Indigenous communities.
The Arctic is already melting _four times faster_ than the rest of the world, and the Willow project could make it so much worse. It would unleash devastating levels of pollution and directly undermine Biden's climate goals.
But there's good news: If Biden rejects the permit, that's it. The project's dead.
**Thousands of people have already called on President Biden to stop the Willow project. Now, we need you.[_Watch and share our video, then tell Biden and his Bureau of Land Management to reject Willow once and for all._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&t=6&akid=13120%2E53494%2Er1ZeAs)**
[WATCH + SIGN](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-Biden-shut-down-willow-letter-video/?utm_source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&source=ema_2022-11-17_Willow_Video_&t=7&akid=13120%2E53494%2Er1ZeAs)
---
Mattea Mrkusic
Policy Lead, Evergreen Action

subject: Our first Give Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
We have a lot to celebrate!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754861/379527321/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179)
| Fellow activist,

Your support and investment in our organization have allowed us to provide consistent, year-round voter registration, civic engagement and mobilization within the communities we center.

Today, we’re excited to celebrate the successes of our first full year on the ground with our very first Give Day! Chief among them, **_we registered 20,000 voters_** in 2022, centering historically disenfranchised communities of color, immigrant communities and the youth across the Commonwealth! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754862/379527322/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179) **[Consistent, year-round voter registration, civic engagement and mobilization are key to building community power and achieving a reflective democracy that represents ALL Pennsylvanians. Will you give today to help us keep up this work and build a more representative democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754863/379527323/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754864/379527324/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179) We have a lot more than just our own achievements to celebrate this Give Day.

In a historically difficult year to make progress, we nonetheless saw Pennsylvania stand up and elect a Democratic Governor, a Democratic Senator, and a Democratic majority in our State House.

And we didn’t just win races — we built a more diverse and representative democracy:
* We elected Austin Davis, Pennsylvania’s first Black lieutenant governor.
* We elected Summer Lee, Pennsylvania’s first Black Congresswoman.
* We elected Pennsylvania’s most diverse state legislature in history, with the addition of 7 people of color this election: 4 Black, 2 Asian Americans, and 1 Latino.
* With our projected new majority in the State House, Joanna McClinton will be the first woman and Black woman to serve as Speaker of the House in Pennsylvania.
* We elected Arvind Venkat, Pennsylvania’s first Indian American state representative.
* We elected Latasha D. Mayes, Pennsylvania’s first Black lesbian legislator.

**[Fellow activist, these are the kind of wins that come from expanding the electorate, necessary steps towards a reflective democracy – and we’re just getting started. Will you donate right now to help us keep up the momentum and achieve even more in the years to come?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754865/379527325/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754866/379527326/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179) In solidarity,

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754867/379527327/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_Signoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754868/379527328/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_BIO&am=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54754869/379527329/1519639429?ms=EM_FR_221117GiveDay_N_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_BIO&r=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjllNWEyNzc2LWNhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BAFMqomOBbz0GQR4Dmgn2fGlEqvwj80EBXGt_2VM5Uw=&emci=f2eb2d99-aa66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=9e5a2776-ca66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1522179)**_

clean_body: We have a lot to celebrate! | Fellow activist, Your support and investment in our organization have allowed us to provide consistent, year-round voter registration, civic engagement and mobilization within the communities we center. Today, we’re excited to celebrate the successes of our first full year on the ground with our very first Give Day! Chief among them, we registered 20,000 voters in 2022, centering historically disenfranchised communities of color, immigrant communities and the youth across the Commonwealth! We have a lot more than just our own achievements to celebrate this Give Day. In a historically difficult year to make progress, we nonetheless saw Pennsylvania stand up and elect a Democratic Governor, a Democratic Senator, and a Democratic majority in our State House. And we didn’t just win races — we built a more diverse and representative democracy: We elected Austin Davis, Pennsylvania’s first Black lieutenant governor. We elected Summer Lee, Pennsylvania’s first Black Congresswoman. We elected Pennsylvania’s most diverse state legislature in history, with the addition of 7 people of color this election: 4 Black, 2 Asian Americans, and 1 Latino. With our projected new majority in the State House, Joanna McClinton will be the first woman and Black woman to serve as Speaker of the House in Pennsylvania. We elected Arvind Venkat, Pennsylvania’s first Indian American state representative. We elected Latasha D. Mayes, Pennsylvania’s first Black lesbian legislator. In solidarity, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 2023, TBD GENERAL: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

And I have to say, **I couldn’t have done this without your support.** [**I’m asking you to stay in this fight with me as we still have a long road ahead of us. You’ve heard me say it time and time again: this race was going to be one of the most competitive in the entire country. And now, with more than 95% of the vote reporting, _we’ll end up winning this race by**just around 4 points.**_
Even though Republicans spent over $14 million to unseat me, you stepped up and stopped their money machine in its tracks. I knew we had it in us to win and you all proved me right.
But folks, as it was just announced that the GOP will achieve a thin majority in the House, it’s clear our work has only just begun. We need to fight with everything we’ve got to protect Medicare, Social Security, and our most fundamental rights.
So just as I needed your help to win this race, it looks like I’m going to need it more than ever to fight back against the radical Republican agenda.
[**Your support helped me win this race and now I’m going to fulfill my promise of working for working people across Nevada. Can you chip in to help me keep up the good fight on the floor of the House?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54754849/379527280/202043377?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_221117_FR_WITHOUTYOU_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2E5OTI0ZS1jYTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l0T7YEzBUGaR6IejsBrVGgl6aLLpatteiBMp2jJ0o_s=)

clean_body: | | | = Team, I’ve been named the winner of my battleground race here in Nevada’s Third District! This House seat was critical for Democrats to defend to prevent an overwhelming Republican majority. And I have to say, I couldn’t have done this without your support. = | | | = You’ve heard me say it time and time again: this race was going to be one of the most competitive in the entire country. And now, with more than 95% of the vote reporting, we’ll end up winning this race byjust around 4 points. Even though Republicans spent over $14 million to unseat me, you stepped up and stopped their money machine in its tracks. I knew we had it in us to win and you all proved me right. But folks, as it was just announced that the GOP will achieve a thin majority in the House, it’s clear our work has only just begun. We need to fight with everything we’ve got to protect Medicare, Social Security, and our most fundamental rights. So just as I needed your help to win this race, it looks like I’m going to need it more than ever to fight back against the radical Republican agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for being such a strong supporter. In a historically difficult year to make progress, we nonetheless saw Pennsylvania stand up and elect a Democratic Governor, a Democratic Senator, and a Democratic majority in our State House.

And we didn’t just win races — we built a more diverse and representative democracy:

* We elected Summer Lee, Pennsylvania’s first Black Congresswoman.
* We elected Pennsylvania’s most diverse state legislature in history, with the addition of 7 people of color this election: 4 Black, 2 Asian Americans, and 1 Latino.
* With our projected new majority in the State House, Joanna McClinton will be the first woman and Black woman to serve as Speaker of the House in Pennsylvania.

* We elected Latasha D. Mayes, Pennsylvania’s first Black lesbian legislator.

**[Fellow activist, these are the kind of wins that come from expanding the electorate, necessary steps towards a reflective democracy – and we’re just getting started. clean_body: If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. | Fellow American, Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today. Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American. Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff! If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: Senator Warnock needs us | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Friends, Even though November 8th is behind us, the midterms are far from over. The Georgia Senate race between Reverend Raphael Warnock and Hershel Walker is going to a runoff. That's right, the Senate hangs in the balance of this Georgia runoff.= | = With likely a razor-thin MAGA majority in the House, a strong Democratic Senate majority is absolutely crucial to stopping the GOP from undoing years of progress on abortion rights, common-sense gun reform, and LGBTQ+ equality. It's the difference between a democracy that works for the people and one that's actively defying them. Senator Warnock has been on the front lines fighting for progress every day since he took office last year. His opponent, however, is an extremist in all forms and is a threat to our democracy. Walker supports a federal abortion ban with NO exceptions. The December 6th runoff will be pivotal to deciding the fate of abortion rights. We can’t afford to lose here. Georgia and the rest of America deserve far better than a dangerous extremist like Herschel Walker. If we want to continue delivering crucial wins for the American people as much as possible, defending our democracy and bolstering our civil rights, sending Raphael Warnock back to the Senate to strenghten our defenses against Republicans is a must. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for all your support so far. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54755813/379530950/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDAyNjRjZS1jZTY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lbK8tli-Ds0223EcZJmTpmvYGRXZ4l1ZCJOqMEtdQqs=&emci=1e591069-ce66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=8d0264ce-ce66-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=9818364)

| | Since election night, we have seen a strong rebuke of Trumpism and MAGA politicians. The American people made it clear that this toxic movement does not align with their values. Despite this, Donald Trump just announced his campaign for the 2024 presidential election. Another Trump presidency would be a disaster. We must spend the next two years working as hard as we can to prevent him from returning to the office, because we've seen what a Trump presidency means for our country. We have a lot of work to do, and I'm going to continue fighting alongside Democrats in the Senate to deliver on the priorities that matter to American families. **Let's stay focused on what matters** – lowering the cost of health care and prescription drugs, ensuring billionaires pay their fair share, protecting data privacy, protecting marriage equality for all, and expanding access to abortion care. We saw voters come out in droves to protect our democracy and reproductive freedom. We protected our Senate majority – now it's time to get back to work. **Together, we can create an America that works for everyone **–** ** not just the wealthy few. A world where democracy isn't just a word we throw around at election time but a way of life. And a place where equality is codified into our laws. In the Senate, I am committed to moving the United States toward a more progressive future in 2022 and beyond. **[Are you body:
| | | Join me on December 10 in Houston for a special empowerment event. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3ollc3rs6Dy0JEPpsFN9qb3kal03Im9GgKOTXtfjMDIP_FSJ3fiOmEdqVuR7geEBBb5aCFngF9z9ULV3bpJiU-IFs8E9pQSdcN-uNKac_i3Gt4qjqN-rXEiPlqNDl8nCLH4HJZQZdhXriGb13BQ3gG0L_pWqsb77YwVcqxFPOT4XI8VVYn8sWOl2o8Ag4clTEomEWX9bQykGIglzkuH4fQgCco6rbqcikEVw4xroi-hX4kx5BtLYHmSJYo1--TWb_tYpqJF4Fslezve_fvNRWSpzv3H5LP8ZWLcQcUvCnrU2E2eiY3iToezFppjkhE3SSV2TjeFdHcVH0tzJknu0_8Kx9WslUHOcJzy2AKQZTMDLvrufdXWNBFfui6rY__OtIXlbCbeUqAVBHd9B2fec0FSyRfN2U2QqiFuqFmQEkPTyqWz_-A0CSuQpKZjQCivGm/3r8/kPxYyVk7TD-xWW2xBVU_bw/h0/xAgggxFrA48CuW1ZX7B98EEPLCSu19Yx2fYA3Jc_6lI) | | Team,

I founded Women for Amanda to mobilize and empower Houston women with the tools to make a difference in our city and amplify their voices on issues that matter most to create a Houston where everyone has an opportunity to thrive. And, team, I couldn’t be more excited to continue on that journey with our latest special event.
