Peter,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden's disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899569:6NgI81GUN:m:1:3317145305:13C606211B1A10BB2C3222C234804F7F:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899570:6NgI81GUN:m:1:3317145305:13C606211B1A10BB2C3222C234804F7F:r)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Peter.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they're running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899569:6NgI81GUN:m:1:3317145305:13C606211B1A10BB2C3222C234804F7F:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899570:6NgI81GUN:m:1:3317145305:13C606211B1A10BB2C3222C234804F7F:r)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $25 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899569:6NgI81GUN:m:1:3317145305:13C606211B1A10BB2C3222C234804F7F:r)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $25.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899569:6NgI81GUN:m:1:3317145305:13C606211B1A10BB2C3222C234804F7F:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: I'm ALL-IN behind President Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Let’s rush President Trump a big boost of support. ACT NOW >>>
| | | Peter, The 2024 presidential race is officially underway. I’m making it clear where I stand. **I am ALL-IN behind former President Donald J. Trump** , as he launches his campaign to become the 47th President of the United States! If you’re on board too, [**please rush a special contribution now**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/fe3eeb30ec775c82/d93051a4b0c8a9cec3d6b838967d376c/33013). I want to send President Trump a big boost of support to show him where Team Tuberville stands in the fight for our great nation’s future.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/fe3eeb30ec775c82/aa41564bc960797ec3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
President Trump announced his candidacy at Mar-a-Lago the other night. He knows better than anyone what’s at stake and that we cannot waste a moment as we seek to take back the White House from Joe Biden and his socialist radical-left pals. Victory in this race will not come easy. But as President Trump: _**“Remember, there is no mountain we cannot climb, there is no summit we cannot reach, there is no challenge we cannot meet, and there is no victory we cannot have. We will not bend. We will not break. We will not yield. We will never give in, we will never give up, and we will never, ever back down.”**_ When I look at the country we had two short years ago and the country we have today, I can’t help but shake my head. It’s stunning how far off track we’ve gotten. President Trump is the proven leader we can count on to **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN**! We need him back in the White House to get our economy firing on all cylinders, secure the border, restore our energy independence, and reclaim our standing on the world stage. Step up now to show where YOU stand, Peter. **[Pitch in your most generous possible donation to SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/fe3eeb30ec775c82/af8a5c0a400c505fc3d6b838967d376c/33013).** \- Coach

body:
It’s time for the real deal. | | | | | | |
---
Fellow Conservative,
---
Our nation is hanging in the balance. We cannot let Tuesday night’s results distract us from our next goal: **t he White House in 2024.** Fellow Conservative, this fight isn't over, it's only just beginning.
If we’re going to see the results we are hoping for in 2024 we have to start NOW. That is why we are **kick-starting** the fight to **FIRE** Joe Biden in 2024 and **RESTORE THE MAGA NATION**.
---
| | [**FIRE JOE BIDEN**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=8c5985ae1f&e=fdefed58de)
---
We cannot afford to let the results stop President Trump from running in 2024. Fellow Conservative, we must show him that the GOP is a rock SOLID party prepared to FULLY support him and SAVE America.
---
[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP IN 2024**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2fd04da38d&e=fdefed58de)
---
Fellow Conservative, it is full steam ahead toward the White House in 2024. **[The only question is if YOU will be by our side?](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3a8a6ae745&e=fdefed58de)**
---
[**RESTORE THE MAGA NATION**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f6bcfbbeed&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you for your commitment to restoring America. MAGA Nation

subject: It’s our birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Thank you. | We're happy to be in touch. This November 17th is the 151st anniversary of the NRA's founding...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899384:6LIik1GN1:m:1:3370555685:389E0E75B499CB84ABED24CB3DB93DFB:r)

_**" For [over] 150 years, millions of Americans from all walks of life, races, colors, and creeds have been proud members of the National Rifle Association of America. From Presidents of the United States, military heroes, those with household names to rank and file Americans like us, all have entrusted the NRA to be the guardians of their Second Amendment, their self-defense and hunting rights, and indeed their freedom as Americans."**_
\- Wayne LaPierre, CEO, NRA

Peter,

We're happy to be in touch.

This November 17th is the 151st anniversary of the NRA's founding, and we are so proud of everything we've accomplished since then.

Amid unprecedented attacks, the NRA has spent years pushing hard to preserve your invaluable Second Amendment rights. We'd be thrilled to see that the association's strongest supporters like you are with us in this fight.

_**Peter, we are giving you the opportunity to sign the NRA's Official Birthday Card this year. There are only a few spots left on this card, so hurry and add your name now!**_

**[Please sign this Official Birthday Card TODAY to celebrate 151 years of the NRA.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899384:6LIik1GN1:m:1:3370555685:389E0E75B499CB84ABED24CB3DB93DFB:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899384:6LIik1GN1:m:1:3370555685:389E0E75B499CB84ABED24CB3DB93DFB:r)

The NRA is the only thing standing between your Second Amendment rights and those who want to strip them away. In a time when civil liberties are under siege, we're proud to continue to defend the American people's constitutional rights.

Can you show your support by signing the _**NRA's Official Birthday Card?**_

**[Add your name to the Official NRA Birthday Card TODAY to help commemorate this huge occasion.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899384:6LIik1GN1:m:1:3370555685:389E0E75B499CB84ABED24CB3DB93DFB:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895581:66UKk1GNe:m:1:3371220873:51E100491A763FD53E4EBC6BA6454A34:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895581:66UKk1GNe:m:1:3371220873:51E100491A763FD53E4EBC6BA6454A34:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895581:66UKk1GNe:m:1:3371220873:51E100491A763FD53E4EBC6BA6454A34:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895581:66UKk1GNe:m:1:3371220873:51E100491A763FD53E4EBC6BA6454A34:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895581:66UKk1GNe:m:1:3371220873:51E100491A763FD53E4EBC6BA6454A34:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61895581:66UKk1GNe:m:1:3371220873:51E100491A763FD53E4EBC6BA6454A34:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899544:JvAtk1GNx:m:1:3331421248:904BAC0D851BE6606BE27CFA1EF8912A:r)

Peter,

We want this to be memorable.

On November 17th, we're celebrating the NRA's 151st birthday. We can't think of a better time to help spread our pro-Second Amendment message and help move our initiatives forward. That's why we're reaching out to YOU for help.

Everyone knows that the Second Amendment is under siege. Our government's executive branch is determined to tear down your inalienable rights and replace them with big government freedom-restricting regulations that will NOT keep you safe. We can't let that happen.

**In honor of this HUGE 151-year anniversary, we're asking our top supporters like you to chip in $151 to help the NRA keep fighting for your rights.** $151 can go a long way in bolstering our movement. Can you help out?

body:

Peter,

Who do you want running the country?

_Biden, a spinless hypocrite, and a lifelong career politician._

**Or Ron DeSantis -- a veteran, father and husband, and freedom fighter.**

Biden changes his stances to follow the political breeze. He has flip-flopped on issues like protecting our Southern border from illegal immigration to cater to the woke Left.

**Ron DeSantis has a clear track record of keeping his promises and standing firm on his principles.**

Peter, who do you want in the White House?

[_**If you want Ron DeSantis in the White House, then we need your help today. Please click here to help us recruit Ron to run against Biden >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61891985:JEd161GNt:m:1:3346849603:6227871192F2B0B3FF5D4559505E3B35:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Election Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Check your ballot's status before it is too late! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ce4c4ba4bb&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

**This election ENDS this Tuesday, November 29th and ballot challenges MUST be resolved by Monday, November 28th in order for your vote to be counted.** Our teams have stayed out in the field to cure ballots, especially in tight races like in the 3rd Congressional District, 10th Legislative District, 26th Legislative District, and 42nd Legislative District.

**What many of our volunteers in the field are reporting is that lots of the** **voters they are contacting had no idea that their ballots had been challenged! **This is why it is so important that you check your ballot status at [votewa.gov](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=39bf396bdb&e=6a281f566d) BEFORE November 28th and if you have a challenged ballot - make sure you get the issue corrected ASAP!
**> >> [Check the Status of your Ballot NOW](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c66cd1697e&e=6a281f566d) <<<**
**Nationally, Republicans have taken back control of the House of Representatives, ENDING one-party rule in Washington DC.** Checks and balances have been restored, which is something to celebrate! Republicans will act to stop Biden's radical agenda that has caused crime and inflation to skyrocket. They will hold this administration accountable and also work to deliver on their [Committment to America.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e44ad9c9d8&e=6a281f566d)

As things stand right now in our Washington's Congressional races, we have managed to hold two Congressional seats and are in a neck and neck race between Joe Kent and Marie Glusenkamp Perez in another. Joe is down by around 3,000 votes with over double that in rejected ballots that still need to be cured. There are still some more votes to count as well, so we want every legally cast ballot to be counted.

In our Legislative races, we have a few incredibly close races in Washington's 10th, 26th, and 42nd Legislative Districts. In the 10th District Greg Gilday is in a neck-and-neck race with Clyde Shavers, split by only 238 votes.

**If there is one thing you can do TODAY to help, it is to check your ballot status at[votewa.gov](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=fbc8c8a50a&e=6a281f566d) and ensure your vote is COUNTED!**

To further help us secure wins in these tight races before the election is certified on November 29th, please reach out to our field teams and volunteer your time to help us cure ballots and swing races our way before it is too late! Get involved in your area by reaching out to those listed below _(even if you are not in any of the areas below, you can still help! Our teams are making calls from across the state into these Swing district to help tip the scales in our favor!)_

_**3rd Congressional District:**_
* **Clark County: **[ozzie@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:ozzie@joekentforcongress.com?subject=Ballot%20Curing)
* **Cowlitz County: **[colby@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:colby@joekentforcongress.com?subject=Ballot%20Curing)
* **Lewis and Thurston: **(564)-204-7276 / [kim@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:kim@joekentforcongress.com?subject=Ballot%20Curing)

_**10th Legislative District**_
* Contact: [Seth@wsrp.org](mailto:Seth@wsrp.org?subject=Ballot%20Curing)

_**26th Legislative District**_
* Contact: [coordinator@votejy.com](mailto:coordinator@votejy.com?subject=Ballot%20Curing)

_**42nd Legislative District:**_
* Contact: [Jeremiah@wsrp.org ](mailto:Jeremiah@wsrp.org?subject=Ballot%20Curing)

---
| **This election is not over yet!** Thank you all for your support over this past year to elect Republicans and fight back against the Democrats' radical agenda, both in our state and nationally.

To victory,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/ballot-curing-1340560?e=6a281f566d)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: President Trump's 2024 run...
body:
what we can expect in the 2024 primary and more. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=f6564bbe3b&u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=405a5801d0)
---
|
---
|
---
## Midterms wrapped, Trump’s 2024 run and more...
Just released the last of my midterm special podcasts. In this one I break down all the things we heard from Trump in his announcement speech, what I think the 2024 primary will look like, why I think a primary would be good for the GOP, midterm races that have finally been called, things the GOP should have done differently in 2022 and of course the leadership elections in Congress that happened this week. Lots of really important information in this one, don’t miss it:
| [ Listen here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=78d4fee54a&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=feed855136&e=f6564bbe3b)
| [Subscribe here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ee8821d2a2&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
## It’s official, Nancy Pelosi has been fired as Speaker of the House...
The GOP has officially hit 218 seats and regained a majority.
|
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Xi humiliates Trudeau on camera as he tears strips off Canadian PM](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=713f1c3a19&e=f6564bbe3b) — via DailyMail[Arizona approves measure to give non-citizens in state tuition](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=17e889bfa3&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AP News [Ex-Wife Asks Court To Bring Senator Warnock in for Questioning in Child Custody Battle](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=87b2ce9abc&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Free Beacon[Study: 47 Liberals, ZERO Conservatives on Late Night During Fall Campaign ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9fb56d5315&e=f6564bbe3b)— via News Busters[Election Day saw few major problems, despite new voting laws](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f426981a18&e=f6564bbe3b) — via APNewsThe media lied about the impact of efforts to make voting more secure — and now they are struggling to explain how/why so many people voted easily in state like Georgia. [Biden mistakenly thanks Colombia for hosting ASEAN summit in Cambodia ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f64bc7dba4&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Apple News[Jan 6 committee staffers told preliminary plan for final report would focus largely on Trump, not on law enforcement failures, sources say](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d48518282d&e=f6564bbe3b) — via NBC News[Federal judge blocks Biden student loan giveaway](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d4ed4be39e&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Washington Post [Georgia Senate runoff: Herschel Walker hauls in $3.3 million on first day of new campaign](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=59d9295b94&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News

The GOP has officially hit 218 seats and regained a majority. | Stories I’m reading... — via DailyMail — via AP News — via Free Beacon— via News Busters — via APNewsThe media lied about the impact of efforts to make voting more secure — and now they are struggling to explain how/why so many people voted easily in state like Georgia. — via Apple News — via NBC News — via Washington Post — via Fox News | ICYMI: Jason Miller on Spicer & Co broke down President Trump’s announcement at Mar-A-Lago... | | Follow along on social media: | | | | | | | | mailto:contact@seanspicer.com ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2022 RigWil LLC. clean_body: There's trouble in Georgia... | | | | | Herschel Walker is in trouble. In last week’s Georgia Senate election, Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock got more votes. That means as the two candidates head into a runoff, Herschel is the clear underdog. But as a legendary football player, Herschel knows a thing or two about a “comeback.” That’s why I’m heading to Georgia to support Herschel’s campaign, and I’m hoping you will do your part too. | If Herschel is going to flip this seat and make Georgia RED again, "he’s going to need your immediate support!" | | To date, Warnock has raised over $100 MILLION from big-money Democrats. While Warnock relies on the help of left-wing billionaires and Hollywood liberals, Herschel relies on grassroots patriots like YOU. name: John Fetterman
subject: My friend Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This could be our last chance to save + expand our Democratic Senate majority.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221117-8138-header&t=1&akid=8138%2E434096%2EFYzxim)
Hi Derek, it’s John Fetterman.
I’ve been trying to give you a break from too many emails, but I’m reaching out right now about something urgent.
**My friend + Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock is facing a runoff election against Herschel Walker on December 6 and he *really* needs our help.**
Just like here in PA, Donald Trump + Mitch McConnell spent million$ trying to defeat Senator Warnock during the General Election. And now, they’re lining up even more shady GOP mega-donors to dump _even more_ $$$ into Georgia.
This grassroots team (yes, I’m talking about YOU 🥰) already helped us make history once this year. **So now, I’m urgently asking for your help again:**
**[Will you rush an emergency donation of any amount split between my friend Sen. Warnock’s campaign and mine right now? Your donation will help him fight back, win this runoff + keep Georgia blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221117-1?refcode=em20221117-8138&refcode2=8138_434096_FYzxim&akid=8138%2E434096%2EFYzxim)**
**[RUSH $5 NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221117-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221117-8138&refcode2=8138_434096_FYzxim&akid=8138%2E434096%2EFYzxim)**
**We can’t afford to lose Senator Warnock in the U.S. Senate.**
Whether it’s a vote to protect our democracy or a vote against the GOP’s national abortion ban, we need his help to get things done for working people in Georgia, in PA + across the entire country.
**[Will you rush an emergency donation of any amount split between Sen. Warnock’s campaign and mine right now? This could be our last chance to expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221117-1?refcode=em20221117-8138&refcode2=8138_434096_FYzxim&akid=8138%2E434096%2EFYzxim)**
Thanks for always standing with me, Derek.
– John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
U.S. Senator-Elect from Pennsylvania

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: thank you, Speaker Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I have been so grateful for her friendship and mentorship.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54757099/379543823/-2130083693?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221117-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYThmZjQyNy1kNzY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5mwgeNinKB6plEad7lbFijSJBkXbL5gXtUi4JsX1yDA=)
---
| Earlier today, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced that she will be stepping down from her leadership role in Congress.

I have looked up to Nancy Pelosi my entire adult life, but I never fully appreciated the depth of her talent, grace, and leadership until I had the opportunity to serve with her.

As the first woman Speaker, she paved a path for so many of us to follow and has helped us navigate the stresses, double standards, and sexism women face in politics – all while wearing 4-inch heels. Women throughout Congress – members, staff, and reporters in the press gallery – knew there was a place for us here because of her example.

Time after time, in the most consequential moments in American history, Speaker Pelosi has been the steady leader we needed. On January 6 – as I was trapped in the House Gallery on my third day in office – I remember thinking, ‘Thank goodness Speaker Pelosi is in charge.’ Her leadership saved our democracy and so many of our lives that day.

I have been so grateful for her friendship and mentorship and her willingness to uplift my voice, ideas, and legislation in my first term. I’m thankful that she is remaining in Congress, and that we will all continue to benefit from her guidance and counsel.

\- Sara
---

clean_body: I have been so grateful for her friendship and mentorship. | = | Earlier today, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi announced that she will be stepping down from her leadership role in Congress. I have looked up to Nancy Pelosi my entire adult life, but I never fully appreciated the depth of her talent, grace, and leadership until I had the opportunity to serve with her. As the first woman Speaker, she paved a path for so many of us to follow and has helped us navigate the stresses, double standards, and sexism women face in politics – all while wearing 4-inch heels. Women throughout Congress – members, staff, and reporters in the press gallery – knew there was a place for us here because of her example. Time after time, in the most consequential moments in American history, Speaker Pelosi has been the steady leader we needed. On January 6 – as I was trapped in the House Gallery on my third day in office – I remember thinking, ‘Thank goodness Speaker Pelosi is in charge.’ Her leadership saved our democracy and so many of our lives that day. I have been so grateful for her friendship and mentorship and her willingness to uplift my voice, ideas, and legislation in my first term. I’m thankful that she is remaining in Congress, and that we will all continue to benefit from her guidance and counsel. \- Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress 660 Pennsylvania Ave SE Suite 202 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFQIzSqBtPLJyFcDxkf8ctYq__wnUIW5ki97Ka5mWXv7gp7t2s-w8TULaGxv_bERNmjcnTobCBnB7aGnwjReWI4Hq8iOuDOKSQ5yaaY236FKocV15_1MGTbrpNfRFE0qqTQvfh12m6KnmEgTwfHoH9GfNpunHvRwDnoEuYdFTKZZkogFJ1tIxE1Q9ZLRyzVe8uzp3d3nzsAzn-KouFPl_70WCANu87M3JfJ_zHE9kTVX8O_KrmyDBcr28KbuEjJ-HaNxbnLBSaw6tnlB1jBjbxFJj52fOtrIpplwQQJwUD5f/3r8/MVA58Nu1TCyq99GFGhbyCQ/h0/w3ZLmpmr0bjhi4SsOSeyWMIE2leVqwVOwx3ziYRYTaY)

Hi there, Peter.
I wanted to send a quick update from Washington, where I’ve been preparing for my first term in Congress. I’m participating in a rite of passage for every new member: freshman orientation.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzK8awaSru2ypvUTct2qobvb01VBWQKMshWS54miUWdq_vEEmB9QJj2tKZg1ok5m6dqmB7WwMseaAsCjY1sf3iURuz-i7w8nnoqThnl-XDqH5Ye7KRXzxRqrNBf5ym1vZ5GaQe64Ij5tTgUJ9KPK2U_PbUeSFAouKvhm9VdSVeN9Jfz4Nf0ZHR6H2Zyr7NVyxwvidbeRpBqm3iT0fQBR45zcU7ygTMYCtvbELFmbuqt9cHrVsWuZbRrgwgSVFtnfujjejr8iokPsRAwvPGpec65oHCqcW5zTiMs3Gg6s0ocU8VgmmkB_Xrqg4LqtVk02PzX5A3o-VZnhB8PpWnh33cuA/3r8/MVA58Nu1TCyq99GFGhbyCQ/h1/-f-b5lG9Yl8RjFZRzc15Z_0SMk8sVeQuMS02Vso6UeQ)
---
_Inside the Capitol dome._
---
It's been humbling, and a bit surreal, stepping in the Capitol for the first time knowing that I'll be taking votes and making decisions on behalf of our community. A wise person told me this week, "if you aren’t in awe every time you walk onto the floor of the House or see the Capitol, it’s time to leave.” I agree with that wholeheartedly, and I'm ready to go to work every single day for the people of Northwest and Central Illinois. I already had the chance to meet some of my future colleagues on both sides of the aisle. As you know, Democrats likely won’t have the Majority in the House, and we’ll need to work hard to build support across the aisle for sensible policies. I will work with anyone if it means improving lives in our district. **I'd like to stress again that I would not be here without your support.** The time, energy, and resources you gave are why we now have this opportunity to make progress on the issues that matter -- health care, strengthening our economy, protecting our environment, and so much more. It’s sinking in that I will soon represent the region where I was born and raised. To me, there truly is no higher honor and I can't wait to get started. Thanks again for your continued support. This is your victory too, Peter, and you should be proud of it! More soon, Eric
---

As you know, Democrats likely won’t have the Majority in the House, and we’ll need to work hard to build support across the aisle for sensible policies. I will work with anyone if it means improving lives in our district. I'd like to stress again that I would not be here without your support. The time, energy, and resources you gave are why we now have this opportunity to make progress on the issues that matter -- health care, strengthening our economy, protecting our environment, and so much more. It’s sinking in that I will soon represent the region where I was born and raised. To me, there truly is no higher honor and I can't wait to get started. Thanks again for your continued support. This is your victory too, Peter, and you should be proud of it! More soon, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL running for U.S. Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . name: American Firearms Association
subject: [ALERT] Tuesday’s Results Mean Gun Rights will be Abolished
body:
The Red Wave didn't happen... Now our 2A rights are in jeopardy.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "Headline") Peter: Guess what? The Red Wave didn't happen. Now, our Second Amendment rights are in jeopardy. Biden has spent the past several months calling for more erosions of our Constitutional rights, including passing the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban." And with the poor showing on Election Day, we could see the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" become law! Let me tell you, neither Kevin McCarthy nor the conservative stalwarts in Congress will be able to stop this so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" unless you step up and help us fight back TODAY! **[We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "We desperately need your help to protect the Second Amendment from
being erased from the Constitution. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help us protect your right to bear arms?")** Here at the American Firearms Association, we are working around the clock to rally opposition against Biden's increasing efforts to take away your guns. We've got to mobilize now and get Senators and Members of Congress to commit to the Second Amendment and state their clear opposition to Biden's gun grab. But that means increasing the pressure on them. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "Headline")**Because if you sit and do nothing, the so-called "Assault Weapons Ban" will be the least of your concerns.** **National Gun Registration.** **Ammo Bans.** **Magazine Bans.** **National Red Flag Gun Confiscation.** **Forcing you to give the code to your gun safe to Federal Agents.** **[Even the complete seizure of the guns you own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "Even the complete seizure of the guns you
own right now is well within reality. We need your support to STOP THEM TODAY!")** If you value defending your family from criminals, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "donate today.")** If you value owning as many guns as you damn well please, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "donate today.")** If you don't want Brandon to freely decide what guns you're allowed to keep in your home, then **[donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "donate today.")** **[Whatever you can chip in, whether it's $100, $500, or $1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "Whatever you can chip in, whether it’s $100, $500, or
$1,000, know that we are fighting to stop the confiscation of your guns!")** We're working around the clock to make sure Pelosi and Schumer don't sneak in their gun-grabbing legislation through the lame-duck session before year-end. That means we need all the help to ensure we keep our Second Amendment intact. Otherwise, only Hunter Biden will be allowed to "legally" own a gun. Don't delay. Every day wasted is a day closer to Biden shredding your right to bear arms! **[Save the Second Amendment today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "Save the Second Amendment
today!")** For America,

Chris Dorr
President, American Firearms Association | | [PROTECT THE 2A!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899575:6xbH61G2N:m:1:3317145305:1BACD58DE4D9DC05DF6F8168382B8FE6:r "PROTECT THE 2A!")
---

name: last chance [update from VPP]
subject: ⇒ Georgia EMERGENCY (please - Raphael Warnock needs us!) ⇒
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we have some bad news
| **_We have good (okay fine, GREAT) news:_**

Raphael Warnock’s Senate race in Georgia is going to a **runoff!** If he wins, he’ll deliver Democrats an IRONCLAD Senate majority.

**_But we also have some bad (okay fine, HORRIBLE) news:_**

Mitch McConnell’s SuperPAC just flooded Georgia with $14 million dollars to DESTROY Sen. Warnock’s chances. If we can’t keep up with McConnell and his mega-donors, we’ll lose...

We rely on grassroots donors like you – so if we’re going to keep up, we need to raise an emergency $15,000 before our end-of-week deadline to WIN in Georgia. [This is your LAST chance to help Democrats like Raphael Warnock win their runoff. Chip in right now! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34864?t=6&akid=5397%2E878179%2EynasLJ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34865?t=7&akid=5397%2E878179%2EynasLJ)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34866?t=8&akid=5397%2E878179%2EynasLJ)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34867?t=9&akid=5397%2E878179%2EynasLJ)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34868?t=10&akid=5397%2E878179%2EynasLJ)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/34869?t=11&akid=5397%2E878179%2EynasLJ)

body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6832f7c745314cbbaf502e15d6b03c84&_e=f7WkZDaGTjZoe5I7eMIxqeqI3JY9jNGBVEn7tMjaj3kpawmHSPMBcTckp3LSUcskIQ6SjwRIh5mV6j6xb59FUIGSgEAW7VUnDNgpgM3U23LquwcAj2V1BiJcNDX4cd1moO9DUdzMIHPUGkiRt19TiJqxB-ZNKN6RAXPCYzNb9V4rbeDVaRqjF_9Z5UfDf56ut-HywVJhh7qq5sv2NoiJ37rCn5d1yk670vcJN0pgwEmhWTzBw6KmXpVl5sS0DIrpfO5FWdtZ1ZxZudGah8skp3VvU2c_jo4D2rQB17fhONngC5dpkvbntRp4J6e7NRoeXv88HmOtP5X1bKOb1Z7LzOSHyyk8MKwd5V57fLO_yZD_jf4T8A1jr0Zt0eLQqpv-IIYT_No4lAwvoD3V44g0qVl62SiP3iDzMGkywvtI8kxY_1foxPxfAF2X2GTLJfiYre789RCTB1hH6aS_wN_EFQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6832f7c745314cbbaf502e15d6b03c84&_e=f7WkZDaGTjZoe5I7eMIxqeqI3JY9jNGBVEn7tMjaj3kpawmHSPMBcTckp3LSUcskIQ6SjwRIh5mV6j6xb59FUIGSgEAW7VUnDNgpgM3U23LquwcAj2V1BiJcNDX4cd1moO9DUdzMIHPUGkiRt19TiJqxB-ZNKN6RAXPCYzNb9V4rbeDVaRqjF_9Z5UfDf56ut-HywVJhh7qq5sv2NoiJ37rCn5d1yk670vcJN0pgwEmhWTzBw6KmXpVl5sS0DIrpfO5FWdtZ1ZxZudGah8skp3VvU2c_jo4D2rQB17fhONlTU8b43NPbPg81K6VPVu4mXH7C_bLWDmywERXXE7_e23uVwBwfWT_0ypiICJsnIVC4eXoLcq3Axj7VzYpJtx6pXTQT_5Bg9Nwfk1k2VRTki1rScd-qLelzagnG4s0FGQxS2wlDAwY96fZpfObqlNpctcluqIlcXj_cYtbLFPRVQg%3D%3D)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

subject: It’s our birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Thank you. | We're happy to be in touch. This November 17th is the 151st anniversary of the NRA's founding...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899289:6D1zp1GUN:m:1:3350876382:57E4E5C841F31828A92F52AC9062F971:r)

_**" For [over] 150 years, millions of Americans from all walks of life, races, colors, and creeds have been proud members of the National Rifle Association of America. From Presidents of the United States, military heroes, those with household names to rank and file Americans like us, all have entrusted the NRA to be the guardians of their Second Amendment, their self-defense and hunting rights, and indeed their freedom as Americans."**_
\- Wayne LaPierre, CEO, NRA

Peter,

We're happy to be in touch.

This November 17th is the 151st anniversary of the NRA's founding, and we are so proud of everything we've accomplished since then.

Amid unprecedented attacks, the NRA has spent years pushing hard to preserve your invaluable Second Amendment rights. We'd be thrilled to see that the association's strongest supporters like you are with us in this fight.

_**Peter, we are giving you the opportunity to sign the NRA's Official Birthday Card this year. There are only a few spots left on this card, so hurry and add your name now!**_

**[Please sign this Official Birthday Card TODAY to celebrate 151 years of the NRA.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899289:6D1zp1GUN:m:1:3350876382:57E4E5C841F31828A92F52AC9062F971:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899289:6D1zp1GUN:m:1:3350876382:57E4E5C841F31828A92F52AC9062F971:r)

The NRA is the only thing standing between your Second Amendment rights and those who want to strip them away. In a time when civil liberties are under siege, we're proud to continue to defend the American people's constitutional rights.

Can you show your support by signing the _**NRA's Official Birthday Card?**_

**[Add your name to the Official NRA Birthday Card TODAY to help commemorate this huge occasion.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899289:6D1zp1GUN:m:1:3350876382:57E4E5C841F31828A92F52AC9062F971:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

Team, Nancy Pelosi just announced she’s stepping back from leadership after decades of inspiring service to our country!

As the first woman _ever_ to serve as Speaker of the House, she helped lead the nation to historic achievements like President Obama's Affordable Care Act, President Biden's Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, and so much else -- and she was pivotal in defending American democracy against Donald Trump.

We want to celebrate Speaker Pelosi’s trailblazing accomplishments with a thank you card signed by _thousands_ of Democrats. **So please -- we need 50,000 signatures by midnight, and we're inviting YOU to be one of the first to sign:**

| | Peter – I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.**

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.**

**_[So please, Peter, will you split $25 between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54751365/379513874/1583625711?refcode=20221117.4_RW_A29&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDc4MzMyZi1iNjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cjXfPsk4JZZR8NFHYD1NIN33aNNunZDjKBy6eQ82u3I=)_**

Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Peter Welch
subject: Raphael Warnock and Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We have less than three weeks to help push Raphael Warnock across the finish line.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1212%2E61531%2ElKHUWH)
Team,
It’s been a long election year, but you’ve been here every step of the way — so I’d like to start by saying how deeply grateful I am for your support. But as we celebrate our wins here in Vermont, we must also remember that our work isn’t done yet, because **we’re less than three weeks away from Georgia’s must-win Senate runoff election.**
Right now, the entire GOP establishment is focused on flipping Georgia red. Here’s why we can’t let that happen: not only does Senator Warnock deserve to win for being an effective legislator who has delivered for Georgians, leading the fight for voting rights and to expand health care access in Congress — **but his re-election is also critical for the success of our progressive agenda.**
**If his extremist MAGA Republican opponent wins in Georgia, then we will have a knife’s edge Senate split 50/50 once again — drastically limiting our ability to advance a progressive agenda.**
But if we can help Senator Warnock win, then we expand our majority and limit the ability of conservatives to block our progress.
[**That’s why we’re hard at work doing everything we can to ensure we send Raphael Warnock back to the Senate. Can you split a contribution to ensure we’re able to give him the resources he needs to win this critical race?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5099?t=3&akid=1212%2E61531%2ElKHUWH)
While Senator Warnock is spreading his positive, pro-democracy message across the state, his extremist opponent has chosen to do the exact opposite — spreading far-right conspiracy theories that further threaten our democracy. Georgians deserve better.
And on December 6th, people will head to the polls to make their voices heard in this critical race, so we can’t afford to lose momentum now.
[**Early investment is critical if we’re going to help power Raphael Warnock to victory. If you’re able, please split $3 or anything you can to help win in Georgia and expand our Senate majority.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5099?t=4&akid=1212%2E61531%2ElKHUWH)
Thank you so much,
Peter

---

name: Candace Owens
subject: Let’s stop idolizing criminals
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899630:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)

Peter,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in just $25, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899630:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899630:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899630:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899631:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899632:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899633:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899634:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899635:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899636:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899637:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899638:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899630:JhgkL1GNy:m:1:3317145305:D1784F672065A6E4CC3D4AC04811577F:r)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
Co-Founder & President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899616:6lQAL1GPN:m:1:3331703221:4974261E5B392AAA94D78E95FC3380FC:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899616:6lQAL1GPN:m:1:3331703221:4974261E5B392AAA94D78E95FC3380FC:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899616:6lQAL1GPN:m:1:3331703221:4974261E5B392AAA94D78E95FC3380FC:r)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899616:6lQAL1GPN:m:1:3331703221:4974261E5B392AAA94D78E95FC3380FC:r)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899616:6lQAL1GPN:m:1:3331703221:4974261E5B392AAA94D78E95FC3380FC:r)**

name: Fair Courts America
subject: BREAKING: On election integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Do you want secure and fair elections? Then you’ll... | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=943c371d241f4591bdb3044a03ef19ee&_e=g3tatG-G67nIh6nfjdZ50dMhCL_FSx_j-IpEHx-nJYJdMQH2o0uRUXFfHg1_oG0RWVwAtYeA08iPq-W-Mf57hlz-B5v-PejX9sM6NWX-bWK9sFXZoZSUDPg84PKz6BT8JoDGN5i9hH4R_zjDpFn9cexkww8Pj3WmmJT2x_LaVEu-iQwevowy4XR_s-BjYG4DImZ4sSEsXhmhv3_UZ_-r0DIZ4Pa4X8oYUmPzuXLNcBm99g3JcNId_RU2O1mzm5pS-xePm_lyXhZQr-INcxMcCvewPCUn5R3hK8eIe55V9blcS6TeZ0sjlm4PLqWvKLTXmOEN4tKiOkm3NJkv4ZMf8qBaUQPQsJVhA11_oxGFP8HUzmIHeVZOUoJTjT9IOtA5la7N2ICZ7mTqDPXNgdpcelHsarFSr4vC0ef7jOebTDERJyaeSXEfDH_SaHEN8Mfq)
---
Peter, There’s a lot of conversation these days about fair elections. Voters are skeptical of a system that feels broken or rigged. And they’re not wrong... Election security IS under attack. Across the country, liberal-majority courts have upheld unconstitutional ballot practices that undermine voting rights and threaten the integrity of our elections. **_This is not just a battle we can fight every two years on Election Day. It’s a battle we must fight every single day against the woke mobs and deep-pocketed liberal donors coming for our courts._** It’s one of the reasons Fair Courts America exists. And today, we want you on our side to defeat those who want to turn our entire judicial system into their liberal enforcement offices.
---
[** JOIN THE FIGHT TO SAVE OUR COURTS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=943c371d241f4591bdb3044a03ef19ee&_e=g3tatG-G67nIh6nfjdZ50dMhCL_FSx_j-IpEHx-nJYJdMQH2o0uRUXFfHg1_oG0RWVwAtYeA08iPq-W-Mf57hlz-B5v-PejX9sM6NWX-bWK9sFXZoZSUDPg84PKz6BT8JoDGN5i9hH4R_zjDpFn9cexkww8Pj3WmmJT2x_LaVEu-iQwevowy4XR_s-BjYG4DImZ4sSEsXhmhv3_UZ_-r0DIZ4Pa4X8oYUmPzuXLNcBm99g3JcNId_RU2O1mzm5pS-xePm_lyXhZQr-INcxMcCvewPCUn5R3hK8eIe55V9bkDpcyTx8ZcNStLf2_e2iXwmk2YZutE4-eIsBksIuMnyX1D6d8Ox4PceNrtyIubrEKQ-Tuq6f6RqbBGFSEKkiotEsuzTQ6q2pck__rHyu94aZrFH86sv676H0nZhRGFnDbWtE7D-tYW4U28XLZ_sdhT)
---
Peter, the partisan manipulation of our elections through our court system has disenfranchised millions of voters.** **
* Through shady redistricting and gerrymandering...
* Through unprecedented ballot practices...
* Through state constitutional amendments made without the consent of the people...** **

Conservative justices on state courts have been outnumbered, and our voices have been silenced on these crucial election rulings.

clean_body: Do you want secure and fair elections? Then you’ll... | | | Peter, There’s a lot of conversation these days about fair elections. Voters are skeptical of a system that feels broken or rigged. And they’re not wrong... Election security IS under attack. Across the country, liberal-majority courts have upheld unconstitutional ballot practices that undermine voting rights and threaten the integrity of our elections. This is not just a battle we can fight every two years on Election Day. It’s a battle we must fight every single day against the woke mobs and deep-pocketed liberal donors coming for our courts. It’s one of the reasons Fair Courts America exists. And today, we want you on our side to defeat those who want to turn our entire judicial system into their liberal enforcement offices. Peter, the partisan manipulation of our elections through our court system has disenfranchised millions of voters. Through shady redistricting and gerrymandering... Through unprecedented ballot practices... Through state constitutional amendments made without the consent of the people... Conservative justices on state courts have been outnumbered, and our voices have been silenced on these crucial election rulings. If we want to secure elections representing the people, we MUST defeat the liberal majority on courts across our country. That is the ONLY way to ensure elections are safe and fair. But we cannot do it without patriots like you. Please, add your name today to defeat the woke mob and protect election integrity in the courts. name: Candace Owens
subject: I’m tired of criminal idols
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899686:6p3jr1GNH:m:1:3331421248:AAF5EF8C849EAFE08F13AEBBECF584DA:r)

Peter,

The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon.

But I don't care about idolizing a criminal.

**He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. **

Nothing more.

Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities.

But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death.

**Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination.**

Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, _**The Greatest Lie Ever Sold.**_

I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. [_**Can you help fight for the truth and stop media lies by chipping in just $25, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send a gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899686:6p3jr1GNH:m:1:3331421248:AAF5EF8C849EAFE08F13AEBBECF584DA:r)

The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899686:6p3jr1GNH:m:1:3331421248:AAF5EF8C849EAFE08F13AEBBECF584DA:r)

**Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. **

[_**Click here to help eradicate the victimhood mentality >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899686:6p3jr1GNH:m:1:3331421248:AAF5EF8C849EAFE08F13AEBBECF584DA:r)

BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures.

**BLEXIT Chapters** bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs.

They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message.

**The BLEXIT Leadership Academy** focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization.

We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development.

**The BLEXIT Student Movement** is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time!

The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike.

**These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors.**

What are victors?

Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family.

Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899687:6p3jr1GNH:m:1:3331421248:AAF5EF8C849EAFE08F13AEBBECF584DA:r)

clean_body: Peter, The media has turned a criminal drug addict into an icon. But I don't care about idolizing a criminal. He was no saint -- he died of a fentanyl overdose. Nothing more. Still, the Media used him as an excuse to gather mobs and burn down cities. But the Media is trying to cancel me because I am speaking the TRUTH about George Floyd and his death. Peter, I am not afraid of the media. The truth is more important than their lies and indoctrination. Above all else, I want to fight for the truth. And I exposed the truth about George Floyd in my new documentary, The Greatest Lie Ever Sold. I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to help Black and urban communities EXIT from the victimhood mentality. The media teaches us to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, and that racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. Our communities learn to hate and fear the police while the media lifts up criminals as icons. Victimhood is a mental virus that infects our Black and minority communities. We need to eradicate it. BLEXIT's programs empower minorities to pursue the American Dream and shape their own futures. BLEXIT Chapters bring our mission to life in their communities through local events and programs. They serve as the arms and legs of BLEXIT on the ground. They work with urban, minority, and at-risk communities to demonstrate and communicate our message. The BLEXIT Leadership Academy focuses on fostering and growing the numerous BLEXIT leaders within the organization. We provide opportunities for people to learn skills they wouldn't otherwise. These are skills they can utilize to benefit their communities or for their personal development. The BLEXIT Student Movement is working to make an effectual change in minority communities, one campus at a time! The vision and heart behind the BLEXIT Student Movement are to showcase excellence and honor the rich history and legacy created by these academic institutions, their founders, and their students at HBCUs and non-HBCUs alike. These programs help Black and urban communities to EXIT the victimhood mentality and become victors. What are victors? Victors are individuals who think for themselves and promote a healthy community of Faith, Freedom, and Family. Peter, you can be the reason for someone's BLEXIT? Click below to send your gift. Thank you, Candace Owens Co-Founder & President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. name: Nikki Haley
subject: What can Republicans do better?
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=742bede583ce4eff8ef4c8dd7bbc93a7&_e=uddT_Y2-0p_uPGYDP3vn3Cy1ncvHSf-t_0MkVheUQT7nFspwJjnDlDL6ywTCi1AJD2g9jUXgITwFuiyoL-WG2XDjzcjmcLc2YlKmKbgrtgb5M9Numubuj6XGkJeK9MNMaHVe_UpQaAuBpivfggmo2mo3lUf-QffhMnfephr-vp_UBIuXy0RCtN8VnP_ylyTTt7cy9BBPFOITSrT3nQP_PkOKhqs3y06idyibGkpp6w2CEbGX6PzEGWyaZBYSItN7L7RgDCmnU-OliyP64tPORzryXLVDi2cLDdK1eEH0pKva5_f-TRzCZZSWIAWAehBsxlwcc7iK0OxA7YwI0kuHgMdVs-qcRlhkZFrgW_dYJoRvopOyEdRtNZiMxlfZafWd)

Friend,
---
The Republican Party offers a message of hope — a message of faith. Faith in God, our country, and ourselves. We support policies that can lift up Americans. But there is always room to keep improving. Americans are frustrated and looking for help. We have to come through for them — with results, not rhetoric. I know we will, but I want your input. [**What do you think Republicans can do better?**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=742bede583ce4eff8ef4c8dd7bbc93a7&_e=uddT_Y2-0p_uPGYDP3vn3Cy1ncvHSf-t_0MkVheUQT7nFspwJjnDlDL6ywTCi1AJD2g9jUXgITwFuiyoL-WG2XDjzcjmcLc2YlKmKbgrtgb5M9Numubuj6XGkJeK9MNMaHVe_UpQaAuBpivfggmo2mo3lUf-QffhMnfephr-vp_UBIuXy0RCtN8VnP_ylyTTt7cy9BBPFOITSrT3nQP_PkOKhqs3y06idyibGkpp6w1321_7gYHrabua8FskMjzuO2WnupbaiG4fQ6wDrJEUOirJ4C1B0QC4oVruCO565yYxRR9TT9iyaVHKDfRub9-v5xKFXmsZJuEZRd6Vby_ZDs5qtq-7nM7qPzecxITwberEam9fpWhlhmdBAdPVfR4L)

Our party was made for this moment. We can never stop improving and growing our efforts so that we can help lift up all Americans I look forward to your response. ** ** My very best,

name: National Rifle Association
subject: It’s our birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Thank you. | We're happy to be in touch. This November 17th is the 151st anniversary of the NRA's founding...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899372:JEnyr1GNC:m:1:3369487795:17934E96A5BAAE457757914B67D5850F:r)

_**" For [over] 150 years, millions of Americans from all walks of life, races, colors, and creeds have been proud members of the National Rifle Association of America. From Presidents of the United States, military heroes, those with household names to rank and file Americans like us, all have entrusted the NRA to be the guardians of their Second Amendment, their self-defense and hunting rights, and indeed their freedom as Americans."**_
\- Wayne LaPierre, CEO, NRA

Peter,

We're happy to be in touch.

This November 17th is the 151st anniversary of the NRA's founding, and we are so proud of everything we've accomplished since then.

Amid unprecedented attacks, the NRA has spent years pushing hard to preserve your invaluable Second Amendment rights. We'd be thrilled to see that the association's strongest supporters like you are with us in this fight.

_**Peter, we are giving you the opportunity to sign the NRA's Official Birthday Card this year. There are only a few spots left on this card, so hurry and add your name now!**_

**[Please sign this Official Birthday Card TODAY to celebrate 151 years of the NRA.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899372:JEnyr1GNC:m:1:3369487795:17934E96A5BAAE457757914B67D5850F:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899372:JEnyr1GNC:m:1:3369487795:17934E96A5BAAE457757914B67D5850F:r)

The NRA is the only thing standing between your Second Amendment rights and those who want to strip them away. In a time when civil liberties are under siege, we're proud to continue to defend the American people's constitutional rights.

Can you show your support by signing the _**NRA's Official Birthday Card?**_

**[Add your name to the Official NRA Birthday Card TODAY to help commemorate this huge occasion.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899372:JEnyr1GNC:m:1:3369487795:17934E96A5BAAE457757914B67D5850F:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

name: AZ Dems
subject: We’re heading to a major recount

| Team, now that the ballot curing deadline has passed, **we’re almost certain to be heading to a recount in the Arizona Attorney General's race.**

And while we already had a good election cycle, we can’t give up on this race.

**Arizona’s Attorney General has a critical role in certifying elections and the Republican candidate is the last MAGA election-denying candidate left standing. We can’t let him win.**

**[Team, we’re keeping our election protection team of attorneys and election observers on staff until every race is final, because this is too important. Can you donate $5 today to help fund our recount and election protection team to make sure we finish this year strong?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZ_xfRVPpwP1VuAQ4-GC43fpO2wuiQIT2TIrFTXUpk4CLhPoCtZ4l6oLzbh1Ofztyd6_o3GVWm4ufBqEy3iGjxZv9NcYHm_Q_osk7sLk2C7Es1N6noVb2t_rJ8Oub6VcAbcBSLjEnN5mcI43r6KroUJO8wCi8QDuUUjMARX1Gu-Dz-sh_u3edLDh5I7N8BYlW-pfBzigjF8p3vpcfhGnYF_nBLaMhjAfH0kcsiyuGZlBeI51TvOBaPgFdSOVKaATlDhwOPMo21U_Qkr9I_cvtZNcaW4rr0dtPHqZltj3JW6LQUp-nD_PNGjlJTtjqpjHHYGg8nVhkcs4IOVP-IPHx0QAtE9KXWS8GSbT0HhyeTCW3-kLhQDPYVgeZbhI4Cy7I/3r8/3tUarVKvSFi6thViG1yT_Q/h1/3wYeEAEWcQpQ2BzwX83u_8wFs5MZAgdajSvksyZFMxI)** [

name: Garrett, Interim Executive Director
subject: 2012 vs. 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
What a difference 10 years makes.
|
---

Friend,

In 2012, the first federal election after 2011 redistricting, Democrats won 1.5 million more U.S. House votes than Republicans. And yet, the GOP won a 33-seat majority. The reason? Gerrymandering.

In 2022, the House election took place on what _The New York Times_ called the fairest map in 40 years. Democrats may have lost the majority, but our seat share was more proportional to our vote share.

What a difference 10 years makes. **What a difference _this movement_ made.** I firmly believe that without the NDRC, the race for the House would not have been as competitive or defied historic trends.

**_You did this, friend._** The calls you made to elected officials, the events you showed up for, the petitions you signed, the money you so generously gave: **You made the congressional map more fair.** And last Tuesday’s results prove it.

[**_If you can, will you make a donation now to help us keep up our crucial work to make our elections more fair?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54752478/379518545/1926255334?amount=30&refcode=20221117.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlZGEyZWQwLWJhNjYtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0MmNkMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZpO9pEO9ebySh0f2NrrTOvkvRI_ypnjSqA2fX6H36R4=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Make no mistake, securing fair maps is an ongoing struggle. Lawsuits over 2021-2022 redistricting are in motion in several states. Republicans no longer see redistricting as a once-per-decade event; they’re going to keep trying to manipulate the maps, year in and year out. So our work is far from finished.

But with you on our side, I know we can achieve even more great things.

clean_body: What a difference 10 years makes. | Friend, In 2012, the first federal election after 2011 redistricting, Democrats won 1.5 million more U.S. House votes than Republicans. And yet, the GOP won a 33-seat majority. The reason? Gerrymandering. In 2022, the House election took place on what The New York Times called the fairest map in 40 years. Democrats may have lost the majority, but our seat share was more proportional to our vote share. What a difference 10 years makes. What a difference this movement made. I firmly believe that without the NDRC, the race for the House would not have been as competitive or defied historic trends. You did this, friend. The calls you made to elected officials, the events you showed up for, the petitions you signed, the money you so generously gave: You made the congressional map more fair. And last Tuesday’s results prove it. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Make no mistake, securing fair maps is an ongoing struggle. Lawsuits over 2021-2022 redistricting are in motion in several states. Republicans no longer see redistricting as a once-per-decade event; they’re going to keep trying to manipulate the maps, year in and year out. So our work is far from finished. But with you on our side, I know we can achieve even more great things. = Thanks, Garrett = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. body:

name: Tom Fitton
subject: The new Congress must investigate Biden family corruption!
body:
You have an enormous stake in helping protect the honesty and integrity of American elections...the linchpin of our Republic.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I ask you to support our call for the new **Republican-controlled U.S**. **House of Representatives Committee on Government Oversight and Reform** to _join Judicial Watch_ in launching a full-scale investigation into Biden family corruption as soon as the new Congress takes office in January!
[And I ask you to back up your support by making a special contribution to Judicial Watch today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61103&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61103&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

**_Judicial Watch is now in federal court with multiple lawsuits_** working to uncover one of the sleaziest and most outrageous Washington influence-peddling schemes ever...the very real scandal of Biden family corruption, the same scandal that the current Congress and the leftist elite media have ignored, dismissed or covered up because it centers on President Joe Biden!

The House Government Oversight and Reform Committee is the major investigative arm of the House, with broad authority, including subpoena power, to investigate allegations of corruption and wrongdoing in the federal government...

...and now, _**for Judicial Watch to succeed in our legal efforts**_ , we need for the _new_ _Republican majority_ to use their investigative powers (_including the all-important subpoena power_) to also investigate this scandal.

_And we are ready to help them_ , since Judicial Watch's investigators and lawyers are ready to _meet_ with members of the Committee and their staff, _brief_ them on what we have already discovered and _share_ with them the documents that our own legal actions have already uncovered about Biden influence-peddling!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61103&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

Judicial Watch is pursuing multiple investigations and lawsuits related to serious and credible allegations that **Hunter Biden** leveraged his father's position as vice president to make massive amounts of money on deals in both **China _and_ Ukraine**...some of which may have made it back to his father. Especially troubling is that we now see **China** benefit from Biden administration policies:
* Cancellation of the Keystone XL pipeline, which will divert Canadian oil west to petroleum-hungry China, and
* Re-entry into the **Paris Climate Agreement** that directly benefits China's excessively polluting coal industry...in which **Hunter Biden** is heavily invested.

I urge you to join us in calling on the Committee to launch a full-scale investigation into all the facts and evidence because:
* For the last two years, under Democratic control, **Congress** refused to take its oversight responsibilities seriously.

* **The Justice Department and its FBI** are conflicted in investigating matters that could implicate the president and/or his immediate family in criminal activity.

* The same mainstream media that actively pursued every report, rumor or outright lie about **Donald Trump** and his family during his presidency is so "in the tank" for **Joe****Biden** that it refuses to investigate or publicize allegations of Biden family corruption.

That's why we calling on the new Republican-controlled House Government Oversight and Reform Committee to _join with us_ and to get all the facts about these serious allegations of Biden family corruption.

That's _also_ why Judicial Watch is in federal court _and_ [why I I am asking you to help us today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61103&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61103&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

Clearly, getting to the truth about Biden family corruption is long overdue!

**That 's why we filed 5 active lawsuits and 10 Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests with federal agencies including the Departments of Justice, State, Homeland Security and Treasury. _We are searching for key records_.**

Now, _we want the new Congress to join with us_ , even as we continue all our independent research and lawsuits to uphold the rule of law and the American people's "right to know!"

If you agree with me that no president of the United States should be shielded from investigation into credible allegations of corruption, [I urge you to give your support to Judicial Watch today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61103&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

Thank you for helping us at this critically important moment in the battle to uphold the rule of law and the American people’s “right to know!”

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61103&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

subject: First ad of the runoff

body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899670:JSaXr1GsN:m:1:3317145305:2744EEFD51A60EAB212CB34EA227572B:r)

---
Peter,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899670:JSaXr1GsN:m:1:3317145305:2744EEFD51A60EAB212CB34EA227572B:r)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $25, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899670:JSaXr1GsN:m:1:3317145305:2744EEFD51A60EAB212CB34EA227572B:r)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899670:JSaXr1GsN:m:1:3317145305:2744EEFD51A60EAB212CB34EA227572B:r)**

Thanks,

clean_body: | Peter, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. Remember, Peter, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. Thanks, P.S. We saw it. You saw it. **But we can’t afford to get distracted now, Derek. We have a Senate Majority to expand.**
Our biggest Senate Majority in almost a decade is up for grabs and rests on the shoulders of Reverend Raphael Warnock and the State of Georgia. With the Republicans winning a House Majority last night, we are ramping up our efforts to send Young Democrats down to knock doors **and we have agreed to pay for all their room and board when they do it.**
[If you want to help us with this effort, please donate $25, $50, $100, or more right now so we can give these volunteers a place to stay. We want to give our Senate Dems the biggest advantage possible which means we have to go all in on the Peach State. Will you commit to helping a canvasser with a night’s stay with your financial contributions right now?
