name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Election Integrity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fa0bed6c5dda447f901ccfc08aaf116f&_e=mYZHGgHYc1UWdPWzoXoGBbcKKjLGZH2KfApYHwF3ppg7JWp3ovu-UZaZTDilHBGO6a58OAfq3-nWAHAHV2ZRn6PFvO0OFmyLN4XxklHKD2z-3Ai9BhakRFB1YCYDwuLUEhHvRk3JhlB5yC8OsEE6P3iOSyTuNHK7FG00vcmqmZCBeeVWDdoStH6oMlZSs69pXtpVsiXKTs29YtoTEreFV3Dx3Eqq8qhjxaX9CyV0-9NZlNhFAn3f1GbVW-5ghC2J)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.

clean_body: Help protect my Senate seat, fight back against Herschel Walker and Trump's divisiveness, and support Democrats across the nation. | | Derek, Donald Trump is officially running for president again. But we don’t need to wait until 2024 to see Trump’s divisiveness on the ballot: My opponent, Herschel Walker, is endorsed by the failed former president -- and the runoff election is in just 20 days. This grassroots team has spent the year supporting Democrats nationwide. Now, I'm counting on your support to bring this election home. Split a $10 contribution between my campaign and the DNC to help protect my Senate seat, fight back against Herschel Walker and Trumpism, and support Democrats across the nation. Republicans like Trump and Walker don’t put the American people first. They seek power to benefit themselves and their far-right buddies who fund their campaigns. They've already spent millions of dollars to defeat me -- and you can bet Trump, McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment will keep up their attacks in the next 20 days until the runoff and this next critical phase of the election. But Derek, they'll be no match for this team if everyone pitches in. We've got strength in numbers, so I am asking you once again: I'm so grateful for all that you do. Thank you. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving these emails. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: If there is anyone who knows how to win a race in Georgia, it is Senator Raphael Warnock. It may be hard to believe, but he's won 3 statewide elections in Georgia in just 2 years!
body:
Midnight deadline
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79026377-03b7-4ace-815d-9a7e912dae0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_If there is anyone who knows how to win a race in Georgia, it is Senator Raphael Warnock. It may be hard to believe, but he's won 3 statewide elections in Georgia in just 2 years!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1c59869-0168-4ef3-89a5-4ba6ec1bd45c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The special election in November of 2020, the runoff January 5th, 2021 and last week. And now we know if he has the resources, he'll do it again on December 6th, when he takes on Herschel Walker, whose latest speech debated whether vampires or werewolves would win in a fight (I wish I were kidding. I am not. I guess he cherished "The Twilight Saga")._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Raphael Warnock for Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T862f6e51-bcff-4581-984c-c8b752c44beb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Senator Warnock has a deadline at midnight tonight(!) and is currently running to $50,000 short. We must do all we can to help him make up the ground. Or instead Georgia's Senator being a scholar who bestrides a pulpit once occupied by Martin Luther King, Jr., it may become someone who's brain is occupied by werewolf vs vampire battles._** **[Can you please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Senator Raphael Warnock, so he can make up his 50K fundraising shortfall by midnight tonight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10a9ed0b-80bf-4671-a791-e4de7f42697a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you, Blue Amp Action Community!**
---
Cliff

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Lauren Boebert Recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Every vote should be counted, and every vote should count.
In Colorado's 3rd congressional district, conservative superstar **Lauren Boebert** is locked in a tight race against liberal Democrat Adam Frisch. With 99% of the votes in, Boebert led by just over 1,000 votes -- 0.4% of all votes cast.
Races this close in Colorado always go to a recount, and we all know what can happen when bureaucrats go behind closed doors with the ballots. In this race, it's all about election integrity now.
**[Please support the Lauren Boebert Recount Fund!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7f79c70e0ab4e5f86bc160d70a1f967&_e=X_PZxoeAuq9rk-gzEvR30nyMjWcTBoX4xLza3Q5tSF9FHWERk93OZKITWxp1r-0bVZHRXMiEG_-fM_bpYLiCSQCTOuqg0rATshp_L6evAFnBzgej-dns3hi6tS82ZeknaKRjsv35eMcEerJJR4oXdEl5TYQOlxnuAKHltFQj1FUwB8iPiAJiz1J7bjE1e5A4Tb2EQ9xLGOvTWxUiqfA-LZGQLtlxAsA2DUpSUgui97d0hsuiG8NF47UkfGmYA_xv)**
Rep. Boebert will need money to pay the costs of monitoring the process and enforcing the law, so every legally-cast vote is counted.
Boebert's opponent will have the bottomless resources of the woke elite to draw on. Conservatives must help her answer, dollar for dollar.
**[You can help by supporting her recount fund today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7f79c70e0ab4e5f86bc160d70a1f967&_e=X_PZxoeAuq9rk-gzEvR30nyMjWcTBoX4xLza3Q5tSF9FHWERk93OZKITWxp1r-0bVZHRXMiEG_-fM_bpYLiCSQCTOuqg0rATshp_L6evAFmRBcjKtIi0beYE8ceOReB61MvT7GgTJJnttApLjgUZdjwQZK0rYeysSoAg8FSnql1UFV_7shyNdBaq6YoTEXRQQjcV_4As9pE80GYZlg5fTuwuj_MMSSKXKs1BN1Q5H_YPMP-AUvgwFZ5ET3ox8gYo)**
_Individuals are allowed to contribute any amount up to $2,900 to this fund, and just like before, HFF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation to her campaign._
If we want real election integrity, we must ensure every ballot gets the honest process it deserves.
Lauren Boebert won this race. A true recount will find that. But whether she gets a TRUE recount partly depends on us.
**[Please support Lauren Boebert and election integrity now.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7f79c70e0ab4e5f86bc160d70a1f967&_e=X_PZxoeAuq9rk-gzEvR30nyMjWcTBoX4xLza3Q5tSF9FHWERk93OZKITWxp1r-0bVZHRXMiEG_-fM_bpYLiCSQCTOuqg0rATshp_L6evAFmsedm12M9BlGCs56yiTEyiV3M4jqQZpbMhcp_qJ3BKqjVpWDFqCrekV7f_uQKlWD19p8jvDenw95bxmSK4qol3z1bNRwBan1uHB3F7C4JruwXBfpGqTWLZ6l0Rt8BA56AfxKqw-NFI-dqZPZXJKu5o)**
Your support will pay for the lawyers, monitors, and other resources she will need to finish this fight.
If we work together, we can make the difference between a full, fair review of votes and a shadowy process behind closed doors.
Time is short. Lauren Boebert stands for freedom. Now we have to stand with her. The fight for election integrity is now the fight for a fair recount for Lauren Boebert in Colorado!
Thank you for helping us push so many of our Freedom Caucus candidates on to victory. We are grateful for your generous support. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---
|
---
**LAUREN BOEBERT RECOUNT**
---
---
Please help Lauren Boebert fight for a fair recount. Don't let the Democrats hijack the process and disenfranchise voters who want to send this fighter back to Washington.
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7f79c70e0ab4e5f86bc160d70a1f967&_e=X_PZxoeAuq9rk-gzEvR30nyMjWcTBoX4xLza3Q5tSF9FHWERk93OZKITWxp1r-0bVZHRXMiEG_-fM_bpYLiCSQCTOuqg0rATshp_L6evAFlghd_wNTGfzqA0CApQccCC9PgIMyiLpme30oBlFcTCbmDeA1qXnotA1wuDTK8ZjMd6WCVbOuyaNKTm2lVrUDWwflWh3fhjrUJMnvLANQjgb05NL3HSJI4jpWqhk_wA9vMOoQfkgPcaiz0BYUYwAWgk)

|

clean_body: | Peter, Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel. We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election. He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad. But we have good news, for now... Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be. We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help? Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink. name: Gwen Moore
subject: Thank you Speaker Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
It's been an honor and will continue to be | | |
---
Peter, our beloved democratic champion, Speaker Nancy Pelosi, announced she will not seek re-election to House leadership. I want to share my heartfelt appreciation for all the challenges we’ve overcome, and especially for the victories we’ve celebrated together.
---
---
From reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act, to passing Obamacare that provides millions with healthcare, reducing child poverty, creating good-paying jobs, making a once-in-a-lifetime investment to our infrastructure, to the Inflation Reduction Act, and so much more, it’s been an honor to have Speaker Pelosi at the helm of our Democratic House Caucus. **Thank you, Madam Speaker. **
---
Together, #WeRepresent Gwen Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!
---
|
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: The Federal Election Commission’s filing deadline for the runoff is tonight ... we have LESS THAN 24 HOURS TO HIT OUR FUNDRAISING GOAL. | Friend, The Federal Election Commission has one final financial deadline before the runoff: 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT. We have LESS THAN 24 HOURS to raise every dollar we can. This is the financial report that Democrats will be following closely to see if we've been able to build momentum since the runoff was declared. I am counting on you to help show the Left that conservatives will not give up the fight against the Democrats' policies that are destroying our country. I know how to win, and I'm ready to win this battle for conservatives all over the country. However, I can't hold Senator Raphael Warnock accountable for his disastrous voting record without the help of patriots far and wide. Senator Warnock has outraised us every single filing deadline, but with your help, we can put up some of our biggest numbers since the race began. The deadline is TONIGHT. Thank you for continuing this fight with me. Your support is greatly appreciated. Thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. Federal law prohibits us from extending this runoff fundraising deadline, | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: It’s simple
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We just helped elect two brand new Justice Democrats who will join the
Squad in Congress — proving once again that people-powered progressives
win! Our mission is simple, but effective: we elect leaders who are
accountable to the people, not corporate interests.

It’s not easy going up against the entire political establishment and
winning, but it is possible. It just takes the resources to sustain our
movement 24/7, 365 days a year.

We’re coming to you first,
Peter. Can you donate today to
make sure we can fund our work, support new Justice Democrats, and win?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121212?refcode=em20221117-26124&t=1001&akid=26124%2E1203867%2Ep__s9s ]→ Yes, I will make a donation to help grow the Squad in 2024!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121212?refcode=em20221117-26124&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26124%2E1203867%2Ep__s9s ]Contribute

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121213?refcode=em20221117-26124&t=1003&akid=26124%2E1203867%2Ep__s9s ]→ Yes, and I will start a monthly donation to help sustain through
2024!

Traditional Democratic campaigns are full of message polling, call time
with rich donors, scripted talking points, and obsession with optics. Ours
are a little different.

We recruit existing community leaders to run for office who are nominated
by members of their own communities — like friends, family, neighbors, &
coworkers.

We empower and support our candidates through the entire cycle (even if
they’re attacked by high-powered Democratic leaders for running). We help
them organize their existing base, build authentic relationships with
local leaders, and make sure they hit the pavement themselves.

We raise significant amounts of money through our own grassroots donor
base so our candidates have the resources to reach all types of voters in
their district. And when they win — like Summer Lee and Greg Casar did
just days ago — we support them in their transition to Congress.

And that’s how we grow the Squad cycle after cycle. We challenge the
status quo of politics because we know it doesn’t work — so we built a
grassroots movement that does.

We have to prepare for candidate recruitment early to make sure we can hit
the ground running with our next Justice Democrats on day one. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121212?refcode=em20221117-26124&t=1004&akid=26124%2E1203867%2Ep__s9s ]We’re
asking you to go all in with us to grow the Squad and strengthen our
progressive movement – are you in?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=26124%2E1203867%2Ep__s9s ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=26124%2E1203867%2Ep__s9s ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221117-26124-footer&t=1007&refcode2=26124_1203867_p__s9s&akid=26124%2E1203867%2Ep__s9s

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=26124%2E1203867%2Ep__s9s

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Can I have a moment?
I just announced that I am not running for the Democratic Leadership in the next Congress, but I will continue to represent my beloved San Francisco in the House of Representatives.
[I’m honored to help bring up the next generation of Democratic leaders that will move our country forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54756145/379532216/1694517773?refcode=20221117_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWU2NDUwYS1kMDY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQN3WhNvN0r4fGzGYfkyKOZIk-ebmM3OtRo1AeupxrY=)

But make no mistake: this does not mean I’m abandoning the fight to elect Democrats and protect our Democracy.

clean_body: No. Stopping. Now. | Team — The Swamp took their best swing at Trump-Endorsed Herschel Walker and almost However, we’re now on to a runoff, and we’ll need ALL the help we can get. Herschel needs us. This is no time to let up! We have one last opportunity to rid Georgia of Swamp insiders who have for too long been a part of the problem in Washington, DC. This race has been a knockdown, drag-out brawl. And it’s getting even tougher. | - This is your opportunity to be a part of a movement. We will send shockwaves nationwide when we win this race, but we can’t do it without your help. Your support won’t go unnoticed. Herschel and the entire GOP will remember that you had his back when he needed it most. Thank you in advance for your support. It means the world to the team. Thank you, Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Leader James Beverly (via Georgia House Democrats)
subject: An invitation for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
We couldn’t have accomplished this without you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54756282/379532628/294255004?refcode=EM_C_221117EventInvite_N_LEADER_30DO_5_G_TESTA_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzhkZmQyNC1kMjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abck9hNzQYQxisEVuW8PgvEdcBi16ovTfc51gksoGQM=) Peter, I wanted you to be the first to receive this invite.

You’ve been one of our most loyal supporters, and with all the success we had this November, we wanted to celebrate with you. The Georgia House Democrats flipped 3 new seats and expanded our Democratic power in the State House, along with welcoming 24 new members to our caucus. None of that would have been possible without you, and now it’s time to celebrate.

[**_Will you join us**November 30 from 5:30 to 8 PM at the Commerce Club of Atlanta** to celebrate our November victories and chart a path forward from here? We have so much to be proud of, and with your support and input, we can make even more progress on the road to a blue Georgia._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54756283/379532629/-258672258?refcode=EM_C_221117EventInvite_N_LEADER_30DO_5_G_TESTA_l2&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzhkZmQyNC1kMjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abck9hNzQYQxisEVuW8PgvEdcBi16ovTfc51gksoGQM=) [PURCHASE YOUR TICKET TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54756284/379532630/-258672258?refcode=EM_C_221117EventInvite_N_LEADER_30DO_5_G_TESTA_b1&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzhkZmQyNC1kMjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abck9hNzQYQxisEVuW8PgvEdcBi16ovTfc51gksoGQM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54756285/379532631/-258672258?refcode=EM_C_221117EventInvite_N_LEADER_30DO_5_G_TESTA_p1&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzhkZmQyNC1kMjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abck9hNzQYQxisEVuW8PgvEdcBi16ovTfc51gksoGQM=) This post-election celebration serves as a networking social and a fundraiser as we decompress from election season and enter the 2023 General Assembly legislative session. Now that we’ve expanded our influence in the State House, we’re in a stronger position to fight for Georgians and their families. We want as much input from our supporters as possible so that we can go into the session with a clear strategy for expanding our influence further. That’s why we invited you, Peter.

You and thousands of regular folks who have supported us throughout the election season have been our secret weapon against the Georgia GOP. They may hold power right now, but after seeing our consistent gains these past few cycles, they’re starting to sweat. No longer are we in a deep red state with no hopes of taking power; we have a legitimate chance to make our Democratic agenda a reality. But the fight is only just beginning.

[**_Join us November 30 to celebrate, relax, plan out the future of expanding our Democratic power in Georgia, and help us enter the 2023 legislative session in the best position possible. We’ve made so much progress, and there’s lots to celebrate, but we can’t get complacent. A blue Georgia is just around the corner, Peter; will you help us get there?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54756286/379532632/-258672258?refcode=EM_C_221117EventInvite_N_LEADER_30DO_5_G_TESTA_l1&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzhkZmQyNC1kMjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abck9hNzQYQxisEVuW8PgvEdcBi16ovTfc51gksoGQM=) [PURCHASE YOUR TICKET TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54756287/379532633/-258672258?refcode=EM_C_221117EventInvite_N_LEADER_30DO_5_G_TESTA_b1&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzhkZmQyNC1kMjY2LWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abck9hNzQYQxisEVuW8PgvEdcBi16ovTfc51gksoGQM=) Onwards,

James Beverly
Minority Leader
Georgia House Democratic Caucus | The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to _flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia._ **To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?**

name: National Rifle Association
subject: It’s our birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
Thank you. | We're happy to be in touch. This November 17th is the 151st anniversary of the NRA's founding...
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899403:J5jx11GaN:m:1:3371220873:36A22F2CB599552009E610BCA8B2E300:r)

_**" For [over] 150 years, millions of Americans from all walks of life, races, colors, and creeds have been proud members of the National Rifle Association of America. From Presidents of the United States, military heroes, those with household names to rank and file Americans like us, all have entrusted the NRA to be the guardians of their Second Amendment, their self-defense and hunting rights, and indeed their freedom as Americans."**_
\- Wayne LaPierre, CEO, NRA

Peter,

We're happy to be in touch.

This November 17th is the 151st anniversary of the NRA's founding, and we are so proud of everything we've accomplished since then.

Amid unprecedented attacks, the NRA has spent years pushing hard to preserve your invaluable Second Amendment rights. We'd be thrilled to see that the association's strongest supporters like you are with us in this fight.

_**Peter, we are giving you the opportunity to sign the NRA's Official Birthday Card this year. There are only a few spots left on this card, so hurry and add your name now!**_

**[Please sign this Official Birthday Card TODAY to celebrate 151 years of the NRA.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899403:J5jx11GaN:m:1:3371220873:36A22F2CB599552009E610BCA8B2E300:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899403:J5jx11GaN:m:1:3371220873:36A22F2CB599552009E610BCA8B2E300:r)

The NRA is the only thing standing between your Second Amendment rights and those who want to strip them away. In a time when civil liberties are under siege, we're proud to continue to defend the American people's constitutional rights.

Can you show your support by signing the _**NRA's Official Birthday Card?**_

**[Add your name to the Official NRA Birthday Card TODAY to help commemorate this huge occasion.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61899403:J5jx11GaN:m:1:3371220873:36A22F2CB599552009E610BCA8B2E300:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association
